name: 4Patriots
subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:
Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark...

Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator - a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6ir10db8h3pfd5huq5sni3g17i03trfoqb3ncc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4shj69o36clh2bs)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _"Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product."_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. **[>> See what all the hoopla is about and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z33j1sc8vmqf1oc0ojclvi1ffgnscssm4at8ke3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4shj69o36clh2bs)**
---

1600 Daily
---

name: Rand Paul
subject: Taking the fight to corrupt teachers unions
body:
Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652464%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gZFQz0fF%2bGWpNyu0eaKGeg&sysid=1)
Friend,

Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

They have taken over classrooms and indoctrinated hundreds of thousands of students with Critical Race Theory. They would rather focus lessons on pronouns and gender identity than teach trade skills, science, or basic math.

_It's no wonder our kids have developed the highest levels of anxiety and depression in the world._

I’d like to introduce you to an organization that is leading the fight to take back our school boards from the radical Left and protect our children, **Parents Union of America (PUOA).**

I just talked with Jessi Melton, President of PUOA, and told her that I would reach out to my supporters and help raise $15,000 this week to fund their efforts.

[_**Friend, can I count on you to share my support for PUOA? Click here to donate $10, $25, $50, or any amount today >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652475%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tPj0q6mmvsJ%2byfiZv6X%2fxg&sysid=1)

I want to share a message from PUOA:

_**“We stand as a counter-offensive**_ _**against the powerful, agenda-driven Teachers' Union**_ _**, which has systematically sought to destroy wholesome American values and indoctrinate our children."**_

_Parents Union of America is the ANTI teachers-union_.

Their mission is to target the most populous school districts and remove the incompetent school board members put in place by the Anti-American, corrupt Teachers' Union.

**I, for one, am sick and tired of socialists indoctrinating our children. And the corrupt Teacher Unions are to blame.**

We can’t allow the same people who turn a blind eye to inappropriate textbook material and socialist indoctrination to remain in charge of American schools.

[_**Will you join the fight to save America’s schools from the corrupt Teacher’s Union? Please send your urgent donation NOW >>> **_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652476%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AxNCskbEuBg4vIYmZQkl4w&sysid=1)

PUOA does more than fight to remove corrupt school board members. They work to fill school boards with America-First candidates and parents.

They plan to replace corrupt school board members with America-First candidates. They recruit and train conservative candidates and raise money to get them elected. These candidates MUST display the ability and willingness to fight for conservative values by going on the offensive.

**Parents Union of America refuses to stay on the defensive when our children are involved. **

I know this is a lot to ask, but can you help me keep my promise to raise $15,000 this week for Parents Union of America?

** Click below to send your gift.**
[_**Donate $10**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652477%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=04l%2f6sJKls1nIfox6ltpFQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $25**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652478%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JDq2%2f5nAWiN4aWpao1O9pg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652479%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CbIVeixd63pSPHFfz3SIhg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652470%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cKDOB5Kc2yuJSZCTA1RzKQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652471%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BkQz2LaEpuOCE8inXqu8rw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652472%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jvctV5GhacwZuCYGt349tg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652473%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9EdXBDuoupnkvXbYetqlaA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652474%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D35ZVbxV3qpma5OSm8dNCw&sysid=1)

Thank you,

Senator Rand Paul

name: Dave McCormick
subject: Who I am
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Rising PAC
body:
This is a story from my book that’s close to my heart

|
---
| | | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zueglvv5r6hg391dm4v9apaq9vnmfa8kqs2esvh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4shgm0o72cdh2bs)
---
I want to tell you a story that shows you exactly who I am - from where I started to what made me the man I am today. All I'm asking from you is that you read it all the way through. Thank you in advance.

I was the son of two working-class teachers. I spent my winters deer hunting and my summers trimming Christmas trees on our family farm. Throughout high school, I wrestled, which created opportunities I never thought possible - like going to West Point for college. At West Point, I continued to wrestle, but I also began a new journey in service to our country. I trained hard and became a paratrooper, working my way up to a 2nd Lieutenant.

One day I learned I was headed off to the Gulf War as part of Operation Desert Storm.

Because of the chaos and secrecy of the mission, we didn't get a chance to call home and say goodbye to our families before deploying, and were only able to stay in touch by mail, so I sent my parents letters as often as I could. My mom even still has them in a box at home!

It became harder and harder to keep in touch.There were a lot of restrictions for security reasons, so we really didn't get our mail very regularly.

Until one day shortly before Christmas.

A huge box showed up at our camp right before Christmas. My unit opened it up to find a Christmas tree that my dad had picked out from the farm. By some miracle - a Christmas miracle! - it somehow made it past all the censors and restrictions.

So for a few days in the middle of the Saudi desert, my camp had some proper Christmas cheer, and for me, I had a piece of home and a reminder of where I had come from.

This unexpected blessing made even the most hard bitten soldiers smile.

I tell you this story because it summarizes who I am and where I came from. **My new book,_Superpower in Peril_ , draws on experiences like these to set out on a new path toward America greatness.**

America used to be a global superpower as recently as the 90s, but now, that status is in peril. When writing my plan for America, I drew on my childhood, growing up on a Pennsylvania Christmas tree farm, to my training days at West Point to fighting in Desert Storm to my experience as a job creator, ultimately crafting and creating my conservative agenda to renew America.
_**[If you'd like to claim a signed copy of Superpower in Peril, my team set up a link here for you to claim your exclusive copy:](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zeclfrckurv7h0hjb028qvjdif36mi5m4dl7fme8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4shgm0o72cdh2bs "If you’d like to claim a signed copy of Superpower in Peril, my team set up a link here for you to claim your exclusive copy:")**_
---
| | | [CLAIM MY SIGNED BOOK!](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za57vgg7cbsaj4u69eiovpjsv2rbgvgltt9qial8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4shgm0o72cdh2bs "CLAIM MY SIGNED BOOK!")
---
**This is the book that Fox News Anchor Mark Levin, UN Ambassador Nikki Haley, and 70th Secretary of State Mike Pompeo are all raving about, and you can get your copy signed.**

I hope I'll be signing your book soon! Thank you for being dedicated to restoring America to power.

Sincerely,
Dave McCormick

name: Cherise Trump, Speech First
subject: A University is making me pay up because my name is“Trump”
body:
Trinity University in Texas labeled me an “elevated risk” for their school’s security

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2ojdf84s93s6j94ulstnhuv9t22dmr5jno0tcgo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4shgm0o76c9h2bs)
---
Friend, **Trinity University in Texas labeled me an “elevated risk” for their school’s security ... _simply because my last name is Trump!_** That’s right... before I can step foot on campus for my event promoting Free Speech Rights, my organization, Speech First, is being forced to pay for special liability insurance. In fact, my hosts, the Young Conservatives of Texas, tell me they have NEVER seen this happen to a speaker before. [**Will you join me in telling the Trinity University leadership that they should overturn this****outrageous decision? Add your name to our open letter right now.** ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrb8fb2a3h65jo4nmkrndkp6i505jjplmf7pa868_rp22sh2s8i66pr4shgm0o76c9h2bs)
---
[Stand with Speech First](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0lc0tje0sun74vidj0jb5ran5k6p7b9p14g35i0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4shgm0o76c9h2bs)
---
Friend, even if I _were_ related to President Trump (I’m no relation), Trinity University would still be making a bad call – and setting a dangerous anti-free-speech precedent. Not only is it wrong to burden anyone who shares a name with a famous political conservative ... but it also caters to the “Woke” student mob in trying to preemptively silence anyone far-left students might find objectionable. Put simply, when school administrators let “Woke” student protestors hold their schools hostage, this is where the next generation – and our educational system – ends up: A small number of far-left student activists are feared and coddled, while free speech and free thinking suffer! **After all, do you think this would be happening if my last name were Biden, Obama, or Clinton instead?** I don’t think so! Friend, let’s add one more win for free speech to Speech First’s Texas Victory Tour. [**Add your name to Speech First’s open letter right now to tell Trinity University to overturn their outrageous decision ... and show their support for free thinking and free speech instead.** ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpa1rehc8ts6b4b1qtip8aascfce56f3m8b90vi0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4shgm0o76c9h2bs) There’s barely any time left, and I urgently need you to sign this Open Letter and stand with me against the Leftist Administrators at Trinity University. Thank you for your support!
---
Cherise TrumpSpeech First
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjbns1po16mqcud0fbqi0542ssp1t6fnbof47va8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4shgm0o76c9h2bs)

name: Dave McCormick
subject: Walking to the cafeteria with dad…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Rising PAC
body:
|
---
| | | I grew up in a home with two teachers. Two or three times a week, my brother, mom, dad, and I would walk from our house to the student dining hall. My parents would chat with the students, groundskeepers, maintenance workers, and professors we saw along the way.

Once we got to the cafeteria, we would get in line with the students waiting to have their IDs checked to get their meals, and then we'd sit down at the tables with them.

At the time, what I valued most about these trips was the soft-serve ice cream. I eventually valued something much more important.

My dad, the school president, would talk to everyone in the college community and loved every minute of it. He spoke to everyone the same and treated everyone the same, and he always found common ground.

When he heard of a problem that needed solving, he did his part to get things back on track.

I still carry that with me. When on the campaign trail for Senate in PA, I listened to folks' problems that needed solving.

And just like my dad, I'm doing my part to get things back on track.

**You can claim a signed copy of my book,_Superpower in Peril: A Battle Plan to Renew America_ , at this secure link which explains exactly how we get it done to save America: _[secure.winred.com/pennsylvania-rising/superpower-in-peril/?signed-copy-for-dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62448798:6rZTWzGNY:m:1:3391001263:2992957B391C93481A918480EE847F24:r "\[LINK\]?signed-copy-for-Peter")_**

We need to get our country back on track. Americans are hurting, and until we confront China, revive trust in our institutions, and unite behind strong conservative leaders, we will not fix the problems we're up against.

_**[If you're with me, I hope you'll donate $40 today to get a signed copy.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62448798:6rZTWzGNY:m:1:3391001263:2992957B391C93481A918480EE847F24:r "If you’re

clean_body: | | | | I grew up in a home with two teachers. Two or three times a week, my brother, mom, dad, and I would walk from our house to the student dining hall. My parents would chat with the students, groundskeepers, maintenance workers, and professors we saw along the way. Once we got to the cafeteria, we would get in line with the students waiting to have their IDs checked to get their meals, and then we'd sit down at the tables with them. At the time, what I valued most about these trips was the soft-serve ice cream. I eventually valued something much more important. My dad, the school president, would talk to everyone in the college community and loved every minute of it. He spoke to everyone the same and treated everyone the same, and he always found common ground. When he heard of a problem that needed solving, he did his part to get things back on track. I still carry that with me. When on the campaign trail for Senate in PA, I listened to folks' problems that needed solving. And just like my dad, I'm doing my part to get things back on track. You can claim a signed copy of my book,Superpower in Peril: A Battle Plan to Renew America , at this secure link which explains exactly how we get it done to save America: "\[LINK\]?signed-copy-for-Peter" We need to get our country back on track. Americans are hurting, and until we confront China, revive trust in our institutions, and unite behind strong conservative leaders, we will not fix the problems we're up against. "If you’re with me, I hope you’ll donate $40 today to get a signed copy." | | | "CLAIM YOUR BOOK FOR $40!" name: American Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652497%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=padrw%2fOfxAOlVoqK6NNR2A&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652498%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bYpYTHMX4JIsADWaMfxWag&sysid=1) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652498%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bYpYTHMX4JIsADWaMfxWag&sysid=1) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

| American Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Your 2023 Second Amendment Survey
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution

This sponsored message from Conservatives Gives is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4cf14a0855514409beaefcd329dfd7e2&_e=Y2RXLiZzY1GpOtGO7X0-U7_N-Y9TvsxDrjgtkxBWKyn6g4afeiEwW_K6Vlx7JpPtm_qoCptqKgKbjoFLA137fnH19v3dvB7LEwUFjYszk7xgUgIvE0lNcB9UxLtYiHEKd0LlOwEh8dfExLHjDO_o8lXdkpLEInLzKIKvjxtf_WeLjq0651XSXueWJcspecUrRl9PpbM8Z2Q0qMEdS9C9VBXk6aqYwKloa5cW66rq1EhxCppWhDQa_CagB6w-bEcV7Hg5VaNLlEop8Fgyo9yRQB2Zauh7yv6-897eQjtogTX7SfiFIOes76kdah_CV_X70KS2YML3oa3zlY4MXti2B2nKAZhI1ORQffginC-1bg4%3D) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution--with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's **Second Amendment Survey** because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4cf14a0855514409beaefcd329dfd7e2&_e=Y2RXLiZzY1GpOtGO7X0-U7_N-Y9TvsxDrjgtkxBWKyn6g4afeiEwW_K6Vlx7JpPtm_qoCptqKgKbjoFLA137fnH19v3dvB7LEwUFjYszk7xgUgIvE0lNcB9UxLtYiHEKd0LlOwEh8dfExLHjDO_o8lXdkpLEInLzKIKvjxtf_WeLjq0651XSXueWJcspecUrRl9PpbM8Z2Q0qMEdS9C9VH0uLWIGRMXAegcNwpfTAhD8c7aK_ILV4PzB6H_XgN--xcX8mfJZB0ebkQnOhZ8Ja2jsKJEG3sFbGBax9F4NKNu0IfVWdZFuxHxtvLyu6vSlH_I9jx3GDtVLvnZjqegZMCstuFvvPbS9TIEKP5HVjoA%3D "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/") Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**." This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it 's more important to DO something about it.** That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4cf14a0855514409beaefcd329dfd7e2&_e=Y2RXLiZzY1GpOtGO7X0-U7_N-Y9TvsxDrjgtkxBWKyn6g4afeiEwW_K6Vlx7JpPtm_qoCptqKgKbjoFLA137fnH19v3dvB7LEwUFjYszk7xgUgIvE0lNcB9UxLtYiHEKd0LlOwEh8dfExLHjDO_o8lXdkpLEInLzKIKvjxtf_WeLjq0651XSXueWJcspecUrRl9PpbM8Z2Q0qMEdS9C9VCQF4QNhTzQsv--6ZTcHP2d51jdLitlvSmptnoYW-7ie-y4denN5ZoZKnQ-JCQaM3tQPOMQvlib5bJ2Jc9PpDkgK92eWE4eV1IZ3y5sZbZ92YuIMKs4pwgevmhv3uXM0GK5k1FQDb1cMCo-O3gqK3f8%3D) We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry--supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution--including the Second Amendment--is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4cf14a0855514409beaefcd329dfd7e2&_e=Y2RXLiZzY1GpOtGO7X0-U7_N-Y9TvsxDrjgtkxBWKyn6g4afeiEwW_K6Vlx7JpPtm_qoCptqKgKbjoFLA137fnH19v3dvB7LEwUFjYszk7xgUgIvE0lNcB9UxLtYiHEKd0LlOwEh8dfExLHjDO_o8lXdkpLEInLzKIKvjxtf_WeLjq0651XSXueWJcspecUrRl9PpbM8Z2Q0qMEdS9C9VNM36DlLpstuQvSMT4R9t9TmKgTcO7kdKi8WrsPqxIRdbSRJD10etJrhpXPQqAEjP44lczThhOg5ZmZc6mrAOLxAS1UQO3wg1XaoS_-NVOaj1QPTMjUikrXzLQL6SmNfDBpwMtx0t2GbKlZKWoFQHtE%3D)
---

Conservatives Gives

clean_body: The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution This sponsored message from Conservatives Gives is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution--with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's Second Amendment Survey because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our Second Amendment Survey using the secure link below? "" Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is ignorance. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in Imprimis , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of first principles." This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. But instead of just TALKING, it 's more important to DO something about it. That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief Second Amendment Survey. You can complete the survey today at this secure link: We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we reach and teach millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations. After completing your Second Amendment Survey , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry--supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed Second Amendment Survey. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. Our Constitution--including the Second Amendment--is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our Second Amendment Survey at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! Conservatives Gives 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: My thoughts about SVB
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
This news has sent shockwaves through our financial system and highlights the need to not only root out corruption in our financial system, but our government.

|
Fellow American,

Silicon Valley Bank is the latest example of crony capitalism running wild.

It makes my blood boil.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3214755a8f7445c1a333c2eea54b6f3b&_e=ULvjKwFxJhgKMYt3wgiqRzMfgtXVbEWo_lcvYm60j7_2NwYDhnH98v6mCOU2EntXfjWDJ9kSfJwPcpObGTTIfHUFy9cjKfZWh5tTeUjRsNqwocGfKbxfinr-aaOJ6OUcPmDm2-KtMb6y8LMsJF1dQJg1LmrGvVKYS54uyarQOq7He7E5W6dDzMQSJIqxf9bXzYkwnNKsIjlI_GNclA9m582XxRTnQvnETX-D-zhs1Ge_mjq6--mR2NW4FMfv5I7zl3vSQDIlzX-4nNvfSwFQRVXQfO98RyvE6UyAi89TwujbvW1Q8_JqXm19sOVM1E-YIxsYEV5L3pPGPID6-5j93K9tKAozKQF0fqpUoVotXDWgZrxaU10XS2IrFVuDz-ZAph8MBAjkPAnOcsrE1i1igQ%3D%3D)
The recent collapse of SVB has once again exposed the dangers of big government and the risks associated with government intervention in our economy. Our country cannot afford to have politicians in power who believe in reckless spending and uncontrolled government intervention in our financial markets.

**This is exactly why we need to support conservative principles and candidates who believe in limited government and fiscal responsibility.**

| [** STAND WITH VIVEK -> **](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3214755a8f7445c1a333c2eea54b6f3b&_e=ULvjKwFxJhgKMYt3wgiqRzMfgtXVbEWo_lcvYm60j7_2NwYDhnH98v6mCOU2EntXfjWDJ9kSfJwPcpObGTTIfHUFy9cjKfZWh5tTeUjRsNqwocGfKbxfinr-aaOJ6OUcPmDm2-KtMb6y8LMsJF1dQJg1LmrGvVKYS54uyarQOq7He7E5W6dDzMQSJIqxf9bXzYkwnNKsIjlI_GNclA9m582XxRTnQvnETX-D-zhs1GcW99wc6eYXKB_ccXBBEAkmrJf4z-4VyrTmRnGZi08xvQt4jLmidNonk8F5H6PifcC1_uH3D8u8zYhQ1TGDUG62X0i2lVlu4cXPQez3JMI8jPHo53bWRmFcvgNX0DPkqYlnSv6ZFVkW7fZUuWWfNAMOqLs5pXlv3CS0oayuZGi-KA%3D%3D)
---

It's time we put an end to the reckless spending and wasteful government programs that have caused so much harm to our country. We need leaders who will fight for free markets and individual freedoms, not crony capitalism and bureaucrats who think they know better than the American people.

Fellow American, I know that you share my concerns about these issues. **[That's why I'm asking for your help in our fight to protect our economy from the dangers of big government from the Oval Office.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3214755a8f7445c1a333c2eea54b6f3b&_e=ULvjKwFxJhgKMYt3wgiqRzMfgtXVbEWo_lcvYm60j7_2NwYDhnH98v6mCOU2EntXfjWDJ9kSfJwPcpObGTTIfHUFy9cjKfZWh5tTeUjRsNqwocGfKbxfinr-aaOJ6OUcPmDm2-KtMb6y8LMsJF1dQJg1LmrGvVKYS54uyarQOq7He7E5W6dDzMQSJIqxf9bXzYkwnNKsIjlI_GNclA9m582XxRTnQvnETX-D-zhs1Gc1DDuHpPk5F9_jHFLG2GGqE871JApQgCxGSrGzLOXPq96Dj5jGDWowNMqM7Wwy69GTgjeSff4K2AMqqgxwhl5y2OM3AN3ygton_ITsNO2orwAOs_vvBr_S-Ci0QrhLXfL_lSxeyXh1Bf6DXyTUJFYhneyUY4a6XYtPdTo4TX-rZA%3D%3D)**

I am asking you to take 60 seconds of your day to watch a video I recorded about the SVB collapse. After, I hope you join Team Vivek **[by chipping in $5 or more to ensure that our economy remains strong and free.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3214755a8f7445c1a333c2eea54b6f3b&_e=ULvjKwFxJhgKMYt3wgiqRzMfgtXVbEWo_lcvYm60j7_2NwYDhnH98v6mCOU2EntXfjWDJ9kSfJwPcpObGTTIfHUFy9cjKfZWh5tTeUjRsNqwocGfKbxfinr-aaOJ6OUcPmDm2-KtMb6y8LMsJF1dQJg1LmrGvVKYS54uyarQOq7He7E5W6dDzMQSJIqxf9bXzYkwnNKsIjlI_GNclA9m582XxRTnQvnETX-D-zhs1GdZMIuqfZjnbQyIbYSMl_YfERcMUZHd-mEOcw12MOraKafIVLeScJRrkdYQgdl2xewdY-Rh1-VFARHyD4ZZN6o-kpO1EU5-NiqXVVRi8ajs7WvdVzZLPdxDu2LO11ISW_KWVdb5WioZTayOgObes5G748T1F-ST8c4G17WYvr0r7g%3D%3D)**

I would be glad if the rest of the Republican Presidential contenders jump on the train and speak truth. It's telling that they have been quiet. I'll speak from firsthand observation: many Republicans are afraid of Silicon Valley's donor class and behave accordingly. But not me.

Together, we can fight against the forces of big government and protect the economic freedom that has made our country great.

Thanks,

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: This news has sent shockwaves through our financial system and highlights the need to not only root out corruption in our financial system, but our government. | Fellow American, Silicon Valley Bank is the latest example of crony capitalism running wild. It makes my blood boil. The recent collapse of SVB has once again exposed the dangers of big government and the risks associated with government intervention in our economy. Our country cannot afford to have politicians in power who believe in reckless spending and uncontrolled government intervention in our financial markets. This is exactly why we need to support conservative principles and candidates who believe in limited government and fiscal responsibility. | It's time we put an end to the reckless spending and wasteful government programs that have caused so much harm to our country. We need leaders who will fight for free markets and individual freedoms, not crony capitalism and bureaucrats who think they know better than the American people. Fellow American, I know that you share my concerns about these issues. I am asking you to take 60 seconds of your day to watch a video I recorded about the SVB collapse. After, I hope you join Team Vivek I would be glad if the rest of the Republican Presidential contenders jump on the train and speak truth. It's telling that they have been quiet. I'll speak from firsthand observation: many Republicans are afraid of Silicon Valley's donor class and behave accordingly. But not me. name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3b6c24c02f54ba8829208d4a996d0f8&_e=nzf-cxnmhA2YuYsjY9PYpH0v65n46u7V_fWMiDEqJQgGejKBDJXorKjV4ONT22hsKBthX15GhGvH9-e7PhC_dFQIFXFbtactbt7bwC_YlMnuxw2FG_TSDyHce5FczxA2gEhCJIxjLhyJQdH24DJP8y8M4lKmg38M4o7LKrSB7y0IPd_poqnqlFTVDjkrwSRVTpufp9HpWNGERuspbKZyuTOcoBf22fesa24f4fU0TZnh5Tnpk_fVus20Wy26GnqBPGAEV4_VK_bfzgVIRH1Udood8lWLSyfqbuQPviwfIr8p2daIV1pXu_KkdvfB1lIcfVcf4QbHtwAMv_2XNy8rlX2Q9ZhR-cfLUbTSrV0szDdG_jCgKxeltAZgbZ9c1_s9gbFg2wZcWego1ZTCi6xyRQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3b6c24c02f54ba8829208d4a996d0f8&_e=nzf-cxnmhA2YuYsjY9PYpH0v65n46u7V_fWMiDEqJQgGejKBDJXorKjV4ONT22hsKBthX15GhGvH9-e7PhC_dFQIFXFbtactbt7bwC_YlMnuxw2FG_TSDyHce5FczxA2gEhCJIxjLhyJQdH24DJP8y8M4lKmg38M4o7LKrSB7y0IPd_poqnqlFTVDjkrwSRVTpufp9HpWNGERuspbKZyuTOcoBf22fesa24f4fU0TZnh5Tnpk_fVus20Wy26GnqBYghHSUPk_NHDMBN7ky2Rn-z329HWgML_9UEcwK6QBduqTANZgnS3nXfimhI8z1OlyCzcfjlrMaIS_EvvLNun-5ZaicIQj2vSK_jQSffTvOlL54bL1GfC6YZGGbSdPH0JrrDrGWlANgDDL2-QAasu3Q%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3b6c24c02f54ba8829208d4a996d0f8&_e=nzf-cxnmhA2YuYsjY9PYpH0v65n46u7V_fWMiDEqJQgGejKBDJXorKjV4ONT22hsKBthX15GhGvH9-e7PhC_dFQIFXFbtactbt7bwC_YlMnuxw2FG_TSDyHce5FczxA2gEhCJIxjLhyJQdH24DJP8y8M4lKmg38M4o7LKrSB7y0IPd_poqnqlFTVDjkrwSRVTpufp9HpWNGERuspbKZyuTOcoBf22fesa24f4fU0TZnh5Tnpk_fVus20Wy26GnqBle3aSHM_xYDkGg4pN8cmbdqCqESyn-iNQb7YagqtZ-5UsyRzrUh3oLLH6EOFNBE12J0l2puZOWXF6sYjnah5OhAug6d8oaafQxFam02S2VhJ5RT8wjP1-1MUyL3CrxGCvFEQiT5ltlBQb2-ZSPKPeQ%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Retired Sheriff David Clarke
subject: This is a death sentence. Please help!
disclaimer_text: paid for by the infamous George Soros, wants to sentence Sgt
body:
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450863:J1j2czGjN:m:1:3331421248:E561DE96DCDF74DF8E27361078F3225C:r)
---
| | [**A progressive district attorney wants to put an innocent cop in prison for 99 years. This is a****death********sentence****. Please help!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450863:J1j2czGjN:m:1:3331421248:E561DE96DCDF74DF8E27361078F3225C:r)**[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450863:J1j2czGjN:m:1:3331421248:E561DE96DCDF74DF8E27361078F3225C:r) ** This is Sheriff David Clarke. Please just take a moment to read my urgent text to you -- an innocent cop's life may depend on it. [**A progressive district attorney, bought and paid for by the infamous George Soros, wants to sentence Sgt. Josh Blake to 99 years in prison for doing his job.**** **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450863:J1j2czGjN:m:1:3331421248:E561DE96DCDF74DF8E27361078F3225C:r) If we can't raise the crucial funds needed to get a top lawyer for Josh, the rabid**** progressive**** D.A., Jose Garza will win. [**And if that happens, I'm deeply concerned Josh won't live long enough to die of old age in prison. Because violent criminals -- maybe some he arrested himself, will****murder****him.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450863:J1j2czGjN:m:1:3331421248:E561DE96DCDF74DF8E27361078F3225C:r) On May 31st, 2020, in Austin, Texas, an anti-police mob started rioting. They looted and vandalized buildings. They even set police cars on fire! Then the mob blocked a major highway that runs through Austin. No one could get through, not even police cars, fire trucks, and ambulances. The rioters then began to throw objects at the officers. So Josh and his fellow police officers deployed non-lethal bean bag rounds at the rioters that were throwing rocks and other objects. **Then what did progressive D.A. Jose Garza do? Did he indict the rioters for arson, looting, assault, and more?[NO! He indicted Josh and 19 other Austin police officers for committing first degree felonies!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450863:J1j2czGjN:m:1:3331421248:E561DE96DCDF74DF8E27361078F3225C:r)** Josh himself was charged with two counts of aggravated assault, which can mean a 99-year sentence. That's a death sentence one way or another. [**Sgt. Josh Blake may die behind bars because a rabid****progressive****D.A. is on a mission to destroy good cops!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450863:J1j2czGjN:m:1:3331421248:E561DE96DCDF74DF8E27361078F3225C:r) And Josh and his wife simply don't have the money to hire a top-shelf lawyer. Thankfully, National Center for Police Defense, Inc stepped in. With your generous support, the NCPD will help provide an excellent, aggressive legal defense for Josh. The NCPD was founded in 2015 to help law enforcement officers and military service members in their time of greatest need, when they're unjustly charged for crimes they didn't commit. NCPD helps pay for legal expenses. And even help pay for food, rent, utility bills, and more so innocent cops and their families don't go under as they endure the brutal legal process. NCPD can do all that only with the generous support of concerned people like you. You may be the only thing standing between Josh and violent criminals who plan to harm him, even kill him. [**Please help save Josh's life by fully funding his crucial legal defense with your very best gift immediately.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450863:J1j2czGjN:m:1:3331421248:E561DE96DCDF74DF8E27361078F3225C:r) Thank you so much. Retired Sheriff David Clarke
---

clean_body: | | | | | This is Sheriff David Clarke. Please just take a moment to read my urgent text to you -- an innocent cop's life may depend on it. If we can't raise the crucial funds needed to get a top lawyer for Josh, the rabid** progressive D.A., Jose Garza will win. On May 31st, 2020, in Austin, Texas, an anti-police mob started rioting. They looted and vandalized buildings. They even set police cars on fire! Then the mob blocked a major highway that runs through Austin. No one could get through, not even police cars, fire trucks, and ambulances. The rioters then began to throw objects at the officers. So Josh and his fellow police officers deployed non-lethal bean bag rounds at the rioters that were throwing rocks and other objects. Then what did progressive D.A. Jose Garza do? Did he indict the rioters for arson, looting, assault, and more?** Josh himself was charged with two counts of aggravated assault, which can mean a 99-year sentence. That's a death sentence one way or another. And Josh and his wife simply don't have the money to hire a top-shelf lawyer. Thankfully, National Center for Police Defense, Inc stepped in. With your generous support, the NCPD will help provide an excellent, aggressive legal defense for Josh. The NCPD was founded in 2015 to help law enforcement officers and military service members in their time of greatest need, when they're unjustly charged for crimes they didn't commit. NCPD helps pay for legal expenses. And even help pay for food, rent, utility bills, and more so innocent cops and their families don't go under as they endure the brutal legal process. NCPD can do all that only with the generous support of concerned people like you. You may be the only thing standing between Josh and violent criminals who plan to harm him, even kill him. Thank you so much. Retired Sheriff David Clarke | | The National Center for Police Defense is a 501c3 Charitable Institution. All Contributions are Tax-Deductible. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: A big, blazing neon sign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
The executives responsible for the recent bank failures must face legal and financial consequences — and we must bring back strong banking regulations in order to prevent the next crisis. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60367226/396902594/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ12F_SVB_E_20230318_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWUzOGRlYy05OWM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f8yimbk9tve3yvx7IpEOcSz5dx1UNzCFe4Q463MU1Co=&emci=44e38dec-99c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=45e38dec-99c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9027908)
---
Ever since Silicon Valley Bank and Signature Bank collapsed, I've been working to prevent failures like those from happening again. Part of it means stronger laws. Part of it means tougher oversight. But deterring this kind of risky behavior also means making sure the people responsible for it don’t get rewarded. You see, bank executives had dollar signs in their eyes when they successfully lobbied for weaker regulations in the Trump era. With less rules and oversight, they juiced their salaries and their bonuses by taking on more and more risk in the short-term. Their get-rich-quick scheme worked great — until the banks exploded last week. Let’s take Greg Becker of SVB for instance. He took home $9.9 million in compensation last year, including a $1.5 million bonus for boosting bank profitability — and its riskiness. And there’s Joseph DePaolo of Signature Bank, who got $8.6 million in the same year. Even last Friday, just hours before the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation rushed to take over SVB, executives were busy paying out congratulatory bonuses — leaving countless businesses and nonprofits with accounts at the bank alarmed that they wouldn’t be able to pay their bills and employees. [_**We should claw all of that pay and bonuses back, and prosecutors and regulators should investigate whether any executives engaged in insider trading or broke other civil or criminal laws. Add your name if you agree.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60367227/396902595/635355475?refcode=EMZ12F_SVB_E_20230318_V1S1&ms=EMZ12F_SVB_E_20230318_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWUzOGRlYy05OWM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f8yimbk9tve3yvx7IpEOcSz5dx1UNzCFe4Q463MU1Co=&emci=44e38dec-99c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=45e38dec-99c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9027908) | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60367228/396902596/635355475?refcode=EMZ12F_SVB_E_20230318_V1S1&ms=EMZ12F_SVB_E_20230318_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWUzOGRlYy05OWM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f8yimbk9tve3yvx7IpEOcSz5dx1UNzCFe4Q463MU1Co=&emci=44e38dec-99c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=45e38dec-99c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9027908)
---
Make no mistake: If those executives walk away with millions of dollars for running their banks into the ground — for gambling with the survival of small businesses, nonprofits, and the health of our economy — it’ll be a big, blazing neon sign encouraging other bank CEOs to run the same playbook.
The executives responsible for the recent bank failures must face legal and financial consequences — and we must bring back strong banking regulations in order to prevent the next crisis.
This past week, I wrote letters to the ex-CEOs of SVB and Signature Bank, asking for details on SVB’s last-minute bonuses, as well as all the compensation and bonuses the executives received in the past 10 years, what specific metrics they met to earn those bonuses, and whether they got any bonuses for successfully lobbying to limit regulation of SVB and Signature.
Look, when Wall Street greed crashed our economy and destroyed millions of lives in the 2008 financial crisis, bankers walked away with multi-million-dollar bonuses. It was outrageous.
Now we’re watching this start to unfold again. I’m fighting so that these Big Bank executives can’t continue getting away with this.
[_**Add your name if you agree: The executives responsible for these bank failures should not be rewarded — and must be held accountable.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60367229/396902597/635355475?refcode=EMZ12F_SVB_E_20230318_V1S1&ms=EMZ12F_SVB_E_20230318_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWUzOGRlYy05OWM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f8yimbk9tve3yvx7IpEOcSz5dx1UNzCFe4Q463MU1Co=&emci=44e38dec-99c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=45e38dec-99c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9027908)
[**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60367230/396902598/635355475?refcode=EMZ12F_SVB_E_20230318_V1S1&ms=EMZ12F_SVB_E_20230318_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWUzOGRlYy05OWM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f8yimbk9tve3yvx7IpEOcSz5dx1UNzCFe4Q463MU1Co=&emci=44e38dec-99c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=45e38dec-99c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9027908)
---
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth
**Elizabeth Warren is leading the charge to hold Big Banks accountable and pass strong regulations that protect consumers and our economy. If you’re able, please chip in to support this critical work.**

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Crony Capitalism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
This news has sent shockwaves through our financial system and highlights the need to not only root out corruption in our financial system, but our government.

|
Fellow American,

Silicon Valley Bank is the latest example of crony capitalism running wild.

It makes my blood boil.

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5570fd8a9bac4ca6b5f4acd887172d57&_e=6dueS82krVg6OIqiSZRdNdZuU6O8AZYCpodvKqP8zWRhohE1hDIBhHJ5o2H_XATnSUFfuFXaZilDiPLRBZgWB73aQwf-lzMWDvmaHsqMWeVt6rRLSalofITchDIdBCw4g7SwLBqhLBgNKg-xuNfplEoNc8NmvJM3XUgoe6IIJZ05DGLAFZ60cjkhQjBWddDHY7tFTbVDlAgfoam3mT8uxJa_SOMS7yUaSdsQWZn41RntIV9Un7PbIIOuSBEo8SvhlGL35NLCiCjKTz4jJNfoeux3yHwd9zIImQ7fW0WAQsV0av3uzwdKiL2GBJu1y6SwgIyGbOhAWoSwIxTbkmcmM_rzITf02F-EFfGo3epnxv6D15k35jQyPrW1nSFMiCZGVJ2TXGDmz5N0GiolykVfSA%3D%3D)
The recent collapse of SVB has once again exposed the dangers of big government and the risks associated with government intervention in our economy. Our country cannot afford to have politicians in power who believe in reckless spending and uncontrolled government intervention in our financial markets.

**This is exactly why we need to support conservative principles and candidates who believe in limited government and fiscal responsibility.**

| [** STAND WITH VIVEK -> **](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5570fd8a9bac4ca6b5f4acd887172d57&_e=6dueS82krVg6OIqiSZRdNdZuU6O8AZYCpodvKqP8zWRhohE1hDIBhHJ5o2H_XATnSUFfuFXaZilDiPLRBZgWB73aQwf-lzMWDvmaHsqMWeVt6rRLSalofITchDIdBCw4g7SwLBqhLBgNKg-xuNfplEoNc8NmvJM3XUgoe6IIJZ05DGLAFZ60cjkhQjBWddDHY7tFTbVDlAgfoam3mT8uxJa_SOMS7yUaSdsQWZn41RnhaLoiHtswj2XQ-sJdW2jbtTVqAmU6SG7VXc_mewlT6MjKjbe6wpi69So9F-ttQgTQx3R3ooyIeN4peXoQDy9YeNiGnp-N-MmXmArixtStYYoCMlQdA5fQY6JB03EootYtZ_-PxHdBoLql91wJO6zkePRborJo1YS1sW4SvgMY6Q%3D%3D)
---

It's time we put an end to the reckless spending and wasteful government programs that have caused so much harm to our country. We need leaders who will fight for free markets and individual freedoms, not crony capitalism and bureaucrats who think they know better than the American people.

Fellow American, I know that you share my concerns about these issues. **[That's why I'm asking for your help in our fight to protect our economy from the dangers of big government from the Oval Office.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5570fd8a9bac4ca6b5f4acd887172d57&_e=6dueS82krVg6OIqiSZRdNdZuU6O8AZYCpodvKqP8zWRhohE1hDIBhHJ5o2H_XATnSUFfuFXaZilDiPLRBZgWB73aQwf-lzMWDvmaHsqMWeVt6rRLSalofITchDIdBCw4g7SwLBqhLBgNKg-xuNfplEoNc8NmvJM3XUgoe6IIJZ05DGLAFZ60cjkhQjBWddDHY7tFTbVDlAgfoam3mT8uxJa_SOMS7yUaSdsQWZn41Rk6d-LiFqYCpsfMxKBDl3JT05vTraqbk46_5Kp6l-3N272_Pp5BqPlt37GM0lO3yeJVcYwaELH0aF2tpoQBkQeJbEZmj5a570OMaHk9x5KYwfhFa7_jFxPO4lO7MFpTjRe1Zoo8-ycBpdioW0f7QK0ehQnLQoZND1bu0atMbR_9JQ%3D%3D)**

I am asking you to take 60 seconds of your day to watch a video I recorded about the SVB collapse. After, I hope you join Team Vivek **[by chipping in $5 or more to ensure that our economy remains strong and free.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5570fd8a9bac4ca6b5f4acd887172d57&_e=6dueS82krVg6OIqiSZRdNdZuU6O8AZYCpodvKqP8zWRhohE1hDIBhHJ5o2H_XATnSUFfuFXaZilDiPLRBZgWB73aQwf-lzMWDvmaHsqMWeVt6rRLSalofITchDIdBCw4g7SwLBqhLBgNKg-xuNfplEoNc8NmvJM3XUgoe6IIJZ05DGLAFZ60cjkhQjBWddDHY7tFTbVDlAgfoam3mT8uxJa_SOMS7yUaSdsQWZn41RmkVpF5Z_Aqn1j_z7-fJ94ozGnylwyUOlykc-qLsp2VldCU06RR5xFyqUaI8L8IEcIYzL5ptbe8agbvUd5MKGWvQz2-Qb73lF56fYNlEnFARLnTgjl0Z8X5hWOF40f4z0E1Fm_vfn4uaToPTqAyopuCdiAyD6jq63J0ab12XCRFwQ%3D%3D)**

I would be glad if the rest of the Republican Presidential contenders jump on the train and speak truth. It's telling that they have been quiet. I'll speak from firsthand observation: many Republicans are afraid of Silicon Valley's donor class and behave accordingly. But not me.

Together, we can fight against the forces of big government and protect the economic freedom that has made our country great.

Thanks,

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5570fd8a9bac4ca6b5f4acd887172d57&_e=6dueS82krVg6OIqiSZRdNdZuU6O8AZYCpodvKqP8zWRhohE1hDIBhHJ5o2H_XATnSUFfuFXaZilDiPLRBZgWB73aQwf-lzMWDvmaHsqMWeVt6rRLSalofITchDIdBCw4g7SwLBqhLBgNKg-xuNfplEoNc8NmvJM3XUgoe6IIJZ05DGLAFZ60cjkhQjBWddDHY7tFTbVDlAgfoam3mT8uxJa_SOMS7yUaSdsQWZn41RmQ4on8dOgxqUiPB7AFH75q8EgkkG31ltmeNjcdWRnWqXCeWx2CJ9kGEwXbdfxOp8fMUy6zU-D2yQ4Hrecw4s8fL9_6LKg1KP17VQe1Xx1qeGicBJszp5FKpG8zIJdbfrbdAT8X5eHW8nAEspNwIRNJYsGGp5lprBsz2jJzAq6iQA%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P. S. The collapse of SVB is a wake-up call for all of us. It's time we take action and support candidates who will fight for the principles that put this country into motion 250 years ago. **[Please help me build this movement by chipping in $1 or more!](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5570fd8a9bac4ca6b5f4acd887172d57&_e=6dueS82krVg6OIqiSZRdNdZuU6O8AZYCpodvKqP8zWRhohE1hDIBhHJ5o2H_XATnSUFfuFXaZilDiPLRBZgWB73aQwf-lzMWDvmaHsqMWeVt6rRLSalofITchDIdBCw4g7SwLBqhLBgNKg-xuNfplEoNc8NmvJM3XUgoe6IIJZ05DGLAFZ60cjkhQjBWddDHY7tFTbVDlAgfoam3mT8uxJa_SOMS7yUaSdsQWZn41RkgJxPwt26a1IFcK9lhf9lSkkwoEmt32d2SMhXM5kP1r-vX3kryQitlv-3caE7CAoh7giEhcDT0VLO-RLEcWkwrGnAY67TgP4hdRr90YlXc4eVTkQ_l1etBL761m2mxHUH3EfPd6edLN6Yw6JlTajCvtd-zHvbiS-BbyYgQwS6kGw%3D%3D)**

---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: This news has sent shockwaves through our financial system and highlights the need to not only root out corruption in our financial system, but our government. | Fellow American, Silicon Valley Bank is the latest example of crony capitalism running wild. It makes my blood boil. The recent collapse of SVB has once again exposed the dangers of big government and the risks associated with government intervention in our economy. Our country cannot afford to have politicians in power who believe in reckless spending and uncontrolled government intervention in our financial markets. This is exactly why we need to support conservative principles and candidates who believe in limited government and fiscal responsibility. | It's time we put an end to the reckless spending and wasteful government programs that have caused so much harm to our country. We need leaders who will fight for free markets and individual freedoms, not crony capitalism and bureaucrats who think they know better than the American people. Fellow American, I know that you share my concerns about these issues. I am asking you to take 60 seconds of your day to watch a video I recorded about the SVB collapse. After, I hope you join Team Vivek I would be glad if the rest of the Republican Presidential contenders jump on the train and speak truth. It's telling that they have been quiet. I'll speak from firsthand observation: many Republicans are afraid of Silicon Valley's donor class and behave accordingly. But not me. Together, we can fight against the forces of big government and protect the economic freedom that has made our country great. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy P. S. The collapse of SVB is a wake-up call for all of us. It's time we take action and support candidates who will fight for the principles that put this country into motion 250 years ago. GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. [**_DEFEAT DEMOCRATS LIKE TESTER >> TAKE BACK THE SENATE_**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f9c0fab7cc4f4018abe107c35476cc65&_e=INTpfSE-Ba-rgDkJVOlQAx_yw4UvVp5_VTOH2mN7pKQD6id9N0kmVEOOYBLuJ_bV3Pol0346shxxd8SejOuKxEupYWQm2Zn1w4zAcBfbyLuDCvwz5Ngf9XzcQV70oaiB7Z0HXL8pFvrNT3kfwB2U2I5b04QWfOGGu0C1J1tJwZX3nf73nYsj6SP1JLKemg2N-9CSSb37rlgDnfypiaXTIZGyEvGFTgCI8dxzKdP0vgG7yGHSW2xVfqEAEiZgC83ky41J9_5aGD_VTsgyxTX1Q5uREeNtKkPWLJmxA94uKGnJQF_uU1v-v-o2rRD1wwfJFeMsywQZXr4qNMnmI1KYgmKXnvIAcAAYNJs0AHFZQeUpSIgRqPyFIR6CLdxFPpvopai3FiX09ol7e826Oed7JxVGHUx41njxYGyk3sLYRyyHzgg52Zh6l4uBEpWkRyvX)
---
Democrat Senator Jon Tester officially launched his re-election campaign last week, claiming that he is running to keep fighting for Montana values and against the people in Washington who don't understand working families' challenges. But Jon Tester isn't fooling anyone, _not in Montana or D.C._ , and we**have the receipts to prove it.** According to campaign finance records, his campaign and leadership PAC has spent at least $1.2 MILLION at swanky restaurants and on catered events since 2006.** ** Tester has shelled out more than $270,000 in campaign dollars on meals since 2019, including $31,000 at a fancy steakhouse in DC. For the past two years, Jon Tester has voted for anything Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden wanted him to. **He holds the single vote that could have stopped the Biden agenda — _but didn't._****_ _** Instead, Montanans and Americans across the country are facing the highest inflation rate in three decades, a wide-open southern border allowing record amounts of fentanyl to devastate our communities, and attacks on made-in-Montana and made-in-America energy that cost Montana jobs and raise prices at the gas pump.
---
[**_DEFEAT DEMOCRATS LIKE TESTER >> TAKE BACK THE SENATE_**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f9c0fab7cc4f4018abe107c35476cc65&_e=INTpfSE-Ba-rgDkJVOlQAx_yw4UvVp5_VTOH2mN7pKQD6id9N0kmVEOOYBLuJ_bV3Pol0346shxxd8SejOuKxEupYWQm2Zn1w4zAcBfbyLuDCvwz5Ngf9XzcQV70oaiB7Z0HXL8pFvrNT3kfwB2U2I5b04QWfOGGu0C1J1tJwZX3nf73nYsj6SP1JLKemg2N-9CSSb37rlgDnfypiaXTIZGyEvGFTgCI8dxzKdP0vgG7yGHSW2xVfqEAEiZgC83ky41J9_5aGD_VTsgyxTX1Q5uREeNtKkPWLJmxA94uKGniSLgeSIoYX2q-31tOopvTs47YAtBcqUP4fDZNTTok8M0V8hufhuQVSe9Ge94sVTgcfJiQxLDwQH1gmv8hPOgqXWd-2R8nNis1MFm-tI2A4DloBaRtmDknwuBheh86Il7NH2zy2NUOWVMDQbaSFTHb)
---
Tester can no longer try to hide behind his 'Everyday Montanan' facade. He can continue to lie about being _'the Senate's only farmer'_ or mark his role in the upper chamber as a _"tireless defender of rural America,"_ but we know the truth: **Jon Tester has left his Montana roots in the dust and****the longer he is in D.C., the richer he gets.**** ****Senate Republicans need your help in Montana, Peter.** Jon Tester already has $3 million in the bank and will add more from liberal donors nationwide who want to keep the Senate blue. Remember, Biden, lost Montana by over 16 points. Montana is the **KEY** to securing a GOP Senate Majority. We have what it takes to _FLIP vulnerable Senate seats like Tester's for Republicans,**but only if we begin securing the financial resources for this match-up TODAY.**_ **[Can we count on you to chip in $5 or even $25 right now?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f9c0fab7cc4f4018abe107c35476cc65&_e=INTpfSE-Ba-rgDkJVOlQAx_yw4UvVp5_VTOH2mN7pKQD6id9N0kmVEOOYBLuJ_bV3Pol0346shxxd8SejOuKxEupYWQm2Zn1w4zAcBfbyLuDCvwz5Ngf9XzcQV70oaiB7Z0HXL8pFvrNT3kfwB2U2I5b04QWfOGGu0C1J1tJwZX3nf73nYsj6SP1JLKemg2N-9CSSb37rlgDnfypiaXTIZGyEvGFTgCI8dxzKdP0vgG7yGHSW2xVfqEAEiZgC83kzCCVC904QGtjp9YQrqTZ9ZWinKvPp9d7oWFpNhKjsp8X3-1Bkuip-Ls35T2j0lYAJhTFHaJVK-A4ceDAZyVIqAIelDR2P6Km4AI8Onx4NPGynJtfF6I0wuZ7SWHRvDM9lYC8cKS6YWFgtZGyewufaya7njp3zUzyJKNVNbMkuMmH73bUCXzWR-YXGkmAq3VH)**

clean_body: Jon Tester has left his Montana roots in the dust, and the longer he is in D.C., the richer he gets. | | | | | SHOT: Senator Jon Tester (D-MT) dedicated part of his re-election campaign launch last week to railing against "multi-millionaires" who he said didn't "understand what a hard day's work looks like." CHASER: Tester has a net worth between $1,768,009 and $6,695,000. | | Peter, our country's future hinges on Senate seats like Tester's in Montana.We need your help to defeat Democrats like Tester and reclaim our Senate Majority, Peter. Democrat Senator Jon Tester officially launched his re-election campaign last week, claiming that he is running to keep fighting for Montana values and against the people in Washington who don't understand working families' challenges. But Jon Tester isn't fooling anyone, not in Montana or D.C. , and wehave the receipts to prove it. According to campaign finance records, his campaign and leadership PAC has spent at least $1.2 MILLION at swanky restaurants and on catered events since 2006. Tester has shelled out more than $270,000 in campaign dollars on meals since 2019, including $31,000 at a fancy steakhouse in DC. For the past two years, Jon Tester has voted for anything Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden wanted him to. He holds the single vote that could have stopped the Biden agenda — but didn't. Instead, Montanans and Americans across the country are facing the highest inflation rate in three decades, a wide-open southern border allowing record amounts of fentanyl to devastate our communities, and attacks on made-in-Montana and made-in-America energy that cost Montana jobs and raise prices at the gas pump. Tester can no longer try to hide behind his 'Everyday Montanan' facade. He can continue to lie about being 'the Senate's only farmer' or mark his role in the upper chamber as a "tireless defender of rural America," but we know the truth: Jon Tester has left his Montana roots in the dust andthe longer he is in D.C., the richer he gets. Senate Republicans need your help in Montana, Peter. Jon Tester already has $3 million in the bank and will add more from liberal donors nationwide who want to keep the Senate blue. Remember, Biden, lost Montana by over 16 points. Montana is the KEY to securing a GOP Senate Majority. We have what it takes to FLIP vulnerable Senate seats like Tester's for Republicans,but only if we begin securing the financial resources for this match-up TODAY. Control of the Senate could come down to just one seat. We cannot afford to leave anything up to chance.
