name: Candace Owens
subject: A bigger plague than COVID
body:
There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4272785669b4d3f8195d6ba6d07f5f3&_e=J09WkHnPoFs2tjF_RI4_7k7paeBdBrBqzyYHx0npxMtinkUX0Kxqv9zC6xwijrR3k-OBQieQ8ZInQXJuzER1gBWZUoo_K13TVRnvmeC7_xQSW7rCJXuoKUXRAUcTmiNfRBvONWWPH32nfOKvsYuo-g1KJQEkpIN-rWDrYTFlqhnDDDkLs1j2S939otuleGKymAem_gSqq1kn1RRkihUDs-b50mewldwbV8iV6QnQ3rf_wr6aye3YpT43j8RFhofQ1f-0sythv5_gy6OZQohpa14jxKMEzQkgjOD91vW84qU%3D)

Friend,

There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality.

This plantation of the mind traps people into believing that they are powerless. It prevents them from seeing themselves as anything but a victim.

**If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor.**

The victimhood mentality is destroying the Black family. It's killing our children with abortion. It's keeping us dependent on government welfare.

My name is Candace Owens, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to SHATTER the victimhood mentality in America. And to help do that, I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month to support education and resources for these communities.

[_**Can you help leave a legacy of freedom and victory instead of oppression and victimhood? Click here to rush your support with $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4272785669b4d3f8195d6ba6d07f5f3&_e=J09WkHnPoFs2tjF_RI4_7k7paeBdBrBqzyYHx0npxMtinkUX0Kxqv9zC6xwijrR3k-OBQieQ8ZInQXJuzER1gBWZUoo_K13TVRnvmeC7_xQSW7rCJXuoKUXRAUcTmiNfRBvONWWPH32nfOKvsYuo-nc-DZMoLEOa3wzPjSBLzOPj0pSztOTtAUmYLuclk3VW-I78nGhj3FZk-VOtPYbfTdkxfkUPQfc-LZuyF9mHB_V_TSOGPuo9iLNHJ_bYjf3RyYmFdD9psOn_lVQu-xc-XU3GpoLxMf0qdWKH-Shy5jI%3D)

I, too, once believed the narrative of victimhood until my grandfather told me a story that changed my life. _It taught me never to be a victim again_.

My grandfather grew up during the Jim Crow era and lived through real racism -- not this fake racism you see in the media.

As a boy, he worked on the family's share crop farm. Each morning he would wake up at 4 am to lay out the tobacco to dry. **Despite their difficult circumstances, they stayed together as a family and persevered. **

**Then one night, the KKK showed up. **

My grandfather woke up to the sound of gunshots. Bullets came flying through the walls of his home. He and his siblings had to hide underneath their beds.

_But a smirk always came across my grandfather 's face when he told me what happened next. _

_**" My father got his shotgun and fired back at them boys!" **_

My grandfather was proud of how, in the face of this real danger, his father refused to cower and fought back!

I've been the target of racism and death threats because I've spoken out about my beliefs. But I'm not going to let that stop me.

I overcame the victimhood mentality and want to help offer others the education and resources to do the same.

[_**Will you send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount to END the victimhood mentality?**__**Click here to rush your support >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4272785669b4d3f8195d6ba6d07f5f3&_e=J09WkHnPoFs2tjF_RI4_7k7paeBdBrBqzyYHx0npxMtinkUX0Kxqv9zC6xwijrR3k-OBQieQ8ZInQXJuzER1gBWZUoo_K13TVRnvmeC7_xQSW7rCJXuoKUXRAUcTmiNfRBvONWWPH32nfOKvsYuo-roYqxus5eLKZNO7rusyVfC9r2icPNb65tLo7UV6k11YVKpPYwZV1Q1Pe5fqBvg7kZpWfKJez3-MkhrXbm8lUzmLzOgwVNR59XttvAIpJj3ABuDFW5dHXC1ZYI4Zfalyj5JTm5yZmkuV8Ut4qiLYtVc%3D)

Here's how BLEXIT is connecting with Black and minority communities:

We put together **BLEXIT 's Guide Against Critical Race Theory** for parents, grandparents, and teachers.

This guide walks you through how to spot Critical Race Theory (CRT) in the classroom and gives examples so you can spot it. It also explains the rights of students and parents and offers ways to fight back.

This resource encourages people to think critically about the victim mentality promoted by CRT and how it affects the next generation.

**In addition to our online resources, BLEXIT State Chapter members bring our inspirational message directly to their communities.**

Our state chapters are the hands and feet of BLEXIT. Our volunteers and state chapter leaders are changing the narrative surrounding America's minority communities through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events.

We currently have 43 chapters across the nation made up of more than 14,000 volunteers!

Your generous support will give people access and a platform to realize that they're more powerful than they can imagine and help them break free from the victimhood mentality.

Will you chip in today and help us reach our February goal of raising $50,000 to reach Black and minority communities? Click below to donate.

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4272785669b4d3f8195d6ba6d07f5f3&_e=J09WkHnPoFs2tjF_RI4_7k7paeBdBrBqzyYHx0npxMtinkUX0Kxqv9zC6xwijrR3k-OBQieQ8ZInQXJuzER1gBWZUoo_K13TVRnvmeC7_xQSW7rCJXuoKUXRAUcTmiNf3KuvV7MPSC-a2nu11W8IRR3AvTU1vtqWTx7XmYjT_vrNH4sftVJ5LvMOOnctpXR62cXq51PVlQA7M8Dsw69ooEyMOisutdAw1eWpltJ1NyLy1L7PovblrJL3JWrbr00ijDwSZ03u7y7QMmPC7TlKVMFjz3_DcFJlCMXs5yQm2Eo%3D)

clean_body: There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality. Friend, There's a plague worse than COVID that no one is allowed to talk about -- the victimhood mentality. This plantation of the mind traps people into believing that they are powerless. It prevents them from seeing themselves as anything but a victim. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor. The victimhood mentality is destroying the Black family. It's killing our children with abortion. It's keeping us dependent on government welfare. My name is Candace Owens, and I co-founded the BLEXIT Foundation to SHATTER the victimhood mentality in America. And to help do that, I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month to support education and resources for these communities. I, too, once believed the narrative of victimhood until my grandfather told me a story that changed my life. It taught me never to be a victim again. My grandfather grew up during the Jim Crow era and lived through real racism -- not this fake racism you see in the media. As a boy, he worked on the family's share crop farm. Each morning he would wake up at 4 am to lay out the tobacco to dry. Despite their difficult circumstances, they stayed together as a family and persevered. Then one night, the KKK showed up. My grandfather woke up to the sound of gunshots. Bullets came flying through the walls of his home. He and his siblings had to hide underneath their beds. But a smirk always came across my grandfather 's face when he told me what happened next. " My father got his shotgun and fired back at them boys!" My grandfather was proud of how, in the face of this real danger, his father refused to cower and fought back! I've been the target of racism and death threats because I've spoken out about my beliefs. But I'm not going to let that stop me. I overcame the victimhood mentality and want to help offer others the education and resources to do the same. Here's how BLEXIT is connecting with Black and minority communities: We put together BLEXIT 's Guide Against Critical Race Theory for parents, grandparents, and teachers. This guide walks you through how to spot Critical Race Theory (CRT) in the classroom and gives examples so you can spot it. It also explains the rights of students and parents and offers ways to fight back. This resource encourages people to think critically about the victim mentality promoted by CRT and how it affects the next generation. In addition to our online resources, BLEXIT State Chapter members bring our inspirational message directly to their communities. Our state chapters are the hands and feet of BLEXIT. Our volunteers and state chapter leaders are changing the narrative surrounding America's minority communities through community service, social engagement, educational activities, and virtual events. We currently have 43 chapters across the nation made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! Your generous support will give people access and a platform to realize that they're more powerful than they can imagine and help them break free from the victimhood mentality. Will you chip in today and help us reach our February goal of raising $50,000 to reach Black and minority communities? Click below to donate. Thank you, Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law. | Conservatives Gives 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=35df87f82e354862b108f26e0cf6c166&_e=OyQVQ_-5-dZpYTjm9XabtSOZu3ZR9cE9edKTJKTmeZ8ZVflEOqz0OiYrevU6AnxbMKjzFa3NU3wonAfamQzf5IdpPTI7Zs-ufwuyruEIlYlB1CEf6sgL76NkydlcDwbv1KX6MeQsEFQvjLNFjQcjJguqniV9Cew8Qin6b1dKsx0I3nCe8SDQzqrCY-AV0clzZw9SDoowKRGqxB-bOCWBlvuAsPvgybWcTXmDL8Zewb5XjQhZqRkdtjrvkwDHx7CWb7NTUgXKzQfFCG0msOfRdSlF8B6sC7aKkoKbjawIod6HyKcHQnPwH7DdSzi-c7U_TsyiEM7-iqlMChC6l_ve_j8ZG16nnu7YUVxWbekuRqNEZhU4kwaILouwLFrW-LajJL8lfMkPbM4sbmZZ4CkVKA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=35df87f82e354862b108f26e0cf6c166&_e=OyQVQ_-5-dZpYTjm9XabtSOZu3ZR9cE9edKTJKTmeZ8ZVflEOqz0OiYrevU6AnxbMKjzFa3NU3wonAfamQzf5IdpPTI7Zs-ufwuyruEIlYlB1CEf6sgL76NkydlcDwbv1KX6MeQsEFQvjLNFjQcjJguqniV9Cew8Qin6b1dKsx0I3nCe8SDQzqrCY-AV0clzZw9SDoowKRGqxB-bOCWBlvuAsPvgybWcTXmDL8Zewb5XjQhZqRkdtjrvkwDHx7CWSu5krzW3DfXzzoHCxKgssqfPhk-YRmEYpxNpdxxU2SlFCy99uMVo2Ey09njMPALmFCDHpb1uqlAD_jud7CUd0o_fct-buGCUyJMLGelhyHF762n_nbKTovX3zMhqFKhEU8F3J_fXcaXxeO34cqMpUQ%3D%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=35df87f82e354862b108f26e0cf6c166&_e=OyQVQ_-5-dZpYTjm9XabtSOZu3ZR9cE9edKTJKTmeZ8ZVflEOqz0OiYrevU6AnxbMKjzFa3NU3wonAfamQzf5IdpPTI7Zs-ufwuyruEIlYlB1CEf6sgL76NkydlcDwbv1KX6MeQsEFQvjLNFjQcjJguqniV9Cew8Qin6b1dKsx0I3nCe8SDQzqrCY-AV0clzZw9SDoowKRGqxB-bOCWBlvuAsPvgybWcTXmDL8Zewb5XjQhZqRkdtjrvkwDHx7CWMr6iIuXfH5rkuC9NDnxSxCn1cg3D-IWcTX7jl5USQuTszbdVkS973RJ8zDwxDpEoFImGWPh5j5BLiWL2NnzUdCWtW40U_V83HGKLHMEOgTsiXuwQ0nwVtPcHPjLKapGwcuTf0UmHE6AwyWZvYihkhA%3D%3D)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! RSVP NOW for the March 27th Party Builder Awards!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ShJbRpQiF2u_EgscvVzuGLCdzZ3KnC4k-DdFNv-kBSg=/JSCrui5gJpEsrscVo5S9_CbGU-v6dMmbHwyqfDDQsaE=?refcode=EM_EV_230318PBR2_N_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_Logo)
Fellow Democrat,

In case you missed it, our 2023 Party Builder Awards Reception will now be held on March 27th!

We are celebrating two of our partners in labor -- Deborah Cosey-Lane of the ATU Local 308 and Mike Macellaio of the Chicago & Cook County Building Trades Council -- with a reception at the Mid-America Carpenters Regional Council Hall (12 E. Erie, Chicago).

Deborah and Mike have done so much for the Democratic Party. We hope you will join us in celebrating them at our rescheduled reception.

**[If you have not RSVP'd yet, click the link now to get your ticket! Previous tickets and pledges will be honored at the event.](https://act.myngp.com/el/ShJbRpQiF2u_EgscvVzuGLCdzZ3KnC4k-DdFNv-kBSg=/cBMn_JLjXnCu0cccf5wOgcH9el8WgKVDvWkxG8Zoto4=?refcode=EM_EV_230318PBR2_N_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_L1)** [**RSVP NOW**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ShJbRpQiF2u_EgscvVzuGLCdzZ3KnC4k-DdFNv-kBSg=/cBMn_JLjXnCu0cccf5wOgcH9el8WgKVDvWkxG8Zoto4=?refcode=EM_EV_230318PBR2_N_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_B1&amount=5)
All proceeds go towards our crucial work building the Democratic Party's grassroots strength and electing Democrats across Illinois.

If you need more information about the event and where to get your ticket, check down below:

_**Please join us for IDCCA 's 2023 Party Builder Awards Reception**_

**WHEN:** Monday, March 27th from 5:30 pm - 7:00 pm

**WHERE:** Mid-America Carpenters Regional Council Hall, 12 E Erie St, Chicago

**Honorary Event Co-Chairs: Tim Drea** , President of the Illinois AFL-CIO & **Bob Reiter** , President of the Chicago Federation of Labor

**Honorary Event Host Committee:** Hon. **JB Pritzker** , Hon. **Juliana Stratton** , Hon. **Kwame Raoul** , Hon. **Alexi Giannoulias** , Hon. **Susana Mendoza** , Hon. **Mike Frerichs** , Hon. **Don Harmon** , Hon. **Emanuel "Chris" Welch**, Hon. **Lisa Hernandez** , and Hon. **Toni Preckwinkle**

**RSVP HERE:****[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2023partybuilderawards](https://act.myngp.com/el/ShJbRpQiF2u_EgscvVzuGLCdzZ3KnC4k-DdFNv-kBSg=/cBMn_JLjXnCu0cccf5wOgcH9el8WgKVDvWkxG8Zoto4=?refcode=EM_EV_230318PBR2_N_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_L2)**

We hope to see you there,

Team IDCCA

Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the Majority for Democrats.

| Dear Reader, Silicon Valley Bank was the second-largest bank collapse in history. Second only to Washington Mutual when it went under in 2008. Then Signature Bank of NY was taken over by regulators Making it the second massive bank failure in 3 days. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: What Mississippi needs to prosper – update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132916?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**I might be British by birth, but I’m Mississippian by choice** – and I can’t think of a better place to live. In my opinion, this is the greatest state in the greatest republic on earth.

I’m not the only person that has decided to make my home in the southern United States. **Each year hundreds of thousands of folks leave the traditional business clusters of New York, Chicago and California, and head south.** After 30 years of growth, the South is today the most populous region in the country.

**The South is a great success story.** A generation ago, young Americans aspired to work in cities in the northeast or along the west coast. Today, the young want to go to Nashville, Atlanta or Dallas.

Companies, such as Tesla, have moved South. **New data published this week showed that 47 percent of all the jobs created in America since February 2020 were in either Texas or Florida.** If this southern success story continues, the South will soon be America’s center of economic and demographic gravity.

**But, of course, there’s one state in the South not yet part of the southern success story; our own state of Mississippi. Why?**

If we want to improve Mississippi, we need to recognize what has been holding us back. **Here are five things that are preventing Mississippi from thriving:

1\. Mississippi has too much government: **Jackson has far too many government boards and commissions, each with the power to impose rules and to regulate. This might be good news for politicians, who enjoy the power to appoint people, but it is bad news for taxpayers. In Mississippi, approximately one in five of the workforce is working for the government — either at the state, local or federal level.
**2\. Too many regulations:** If you have an army of bureaucrats, unsurprisingly, they will generate endless bureaucracy. Our state is held back by excessive red tape. Licenses and permits are required for all kinds of activity.

**3\. Taxes are too high:** Every time our Governor announces that another company is coming to Mississippi, I notice that a deal is done that allows the company to pay less tax as a condition for coming. So why not allow every business in our state to pay lower taxes?

Despite the recent reduction in state income tax, Mississippi’s tax burden is still too high compared to neighboring states, like Tennessee, Alabama and Louisiana.

**4\. Too dependent on Washington welfare:** When Lyndon Johnson created the modern welfare system under the guise of ‘The Great Society’, he did not eliminate poverty. He instead entrenched a system of welfare dependency. Today, it is obvious that welfare dependency has been bad for families. It is not that great for states, either.

**If federal handouts created prosperity, ours would be the richest state in the Union.** In reality, federal dependency has harmed our state. For too long, Mississippi has sent politicians to Washington who see securing subsidies as their primary goal. Federal slush funds might be good news for politicians who get a lot of buildings named after them. It’s not been great news for everyone else.

**5\. We need a functioning capital city and airport:** Georgia has Atlanta, Tennessee Nashville, and Texas both Dallas and Houston. It is difficult to imagine any of those states being what they are without successful cities, fed by hub airports.

Mississippi, meanwhile, has Jackson, a city that has lost a quarter of its population in 40 years, last year had one of the highest homicide rates in America and has long had a persistent problem providing residents with clean water. This needs to change. At the very least, we need to ensure that the city airport is properly run.

**There’s something else that needs to change, too; we need to see more pride in Mississippi.** For as long as anyone can remember, the mainstream media has pushed a sneering narrative about our state. It is time to stop feeling so defensive about Mississippi.

The truth is that Mississippi is a model of civility. I have never met anyone that has visited this state that was not struck by how friendly Mississippians of every background actually are.

If you, or your local club or Rotary group would ever like me to come to talk about the change our state needs, please get in touch with me [here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=078d85a2d9&e=5703353baa).
---
| Have a wonderful weekend!
---

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Friend, I might be British by birth, but I’m Mississippian by choice – and I can’t think of a better place to live. In my opinion, this is the greatest state in the greatest republic on earth. I’m not the only person that has decided to make my home in the southern United States. Each year hundreds of thousands of folks leave the traditional business clusters of New York, Chicago and California, and head south. After 30 years of growth, the South is today the most populous region in the country. The South is a great success story. A generation ago, young Americans aspired to work in cities in the northeast or along the west coast. Today, the young want to go to Nashville, Atlanta or Dallas. Companies, such as Tesla, have moved South. New data published this week showed that 47 percent of all the jobs created in America since February 2020 were in either Texas or Florida. If this southern success story continues, the South will soon be America’s center of economic and demographic gravity. But, of course, there’s one state in the South not yet part of the southern success story; our own state of Mississippi. Why? If we want to improve Mississippi, we need to recognize what has been holding us back. Here are five things that are preventing Mississippi from thriving: 1\. Mississippi has too much government: Jackson has far too many government boards and commissions, each with the power to impose rules and to regulate. This might be good news for politicians, who enjoy the power to appoint people, but it is bad news for taxpayers. In Mississippi, approximately one in five of the workforce is working for the government — either at the state, local or federal level. 2\. Too many regulations: If you have an army of bureaucrats, unsurprisingly, they will generate endless bureaucracy. Our state is held back by excessive red tape. Licenses and permits are required for all kinds of activity. 3\. Taxes are too high: Every time our Governor announces that another company is coming to Mississippi, I notice that a deal is done that allows the company to pay less tax as a condition for coming. So why not allow every business in our state to pay lower taxes? Despite the recent reduction in state income tax, Mississippi’s tax burden is still too high compared to neighboring states, like Tennessee, Alabama and Louisiana. 4\. Too dependent on Washington welfare: When Lyndon Johnson created the modern welfare system under the guise of ‘The Great Society’, he did not eliminate poverty. Mississippi, meanwhile, has Jackson, a city that has lost a quarter of its population in 40 years, last year had one of the highest homicide rates in America and has long had a persistent problem providing residents with clean water. name: Cherise Trump, Speech First
subject: I was punished because my name is “Trump”
body:
Trinity University in Texas labeled me an "elevated risk" for their school's security ... simply because my last name is Trump!

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a293d6898a3a4df1a7e1ce0e2467d077&_e=qoTmUDJWip5Fwmu0wvmBpRkLSVWKgdgQ5lyu6Ny6qDooNLEhsfl02otDn7VSTSsVZjJ_qKnYmPUeXAQgyKRM-fORjcKbBhU5dr3esRAq9Z0rpPleEwdakXqjipKkACQ2fENki4rFXnOY7YFxT_wdLSnue8MxHdYEvYuxD6ho4ylrVRcowY_huquMsWtwr8zeagAcHOaRHPjoCYiJyUsDhSzJYg0UQO8YLbH_wEpWuwo5vh2-0G7TXATDb8uQMNYvdjMAFdxuMQYcCL8CYCuJg9rotZU0l_qcOTj59vD-4ls%3D)
---
Friend, **Trinity University in Texas labeled me an "elevated risk" for their school's security ... _simply because my last name is Trump!_** That's right... before I can step foot on campus for my event promoting Free Speech Rights, my organization, Speech First, is being forced to pay for special liability insurance. In fact, my hosts, the Young Conservatives of Texas, tell me they have NEVER seen this happen to a speaker before. [**Will you join me in telling the Trinity University leadership that they should overturn this****outrageous decision? Add your name to our open letter right now.** ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a293d6898a3a4df1a7e1ce0e2467d077&_e=qoTmUDJWip5Fwmu0wvmBpRkLSVWKgdgQ5lyu6Ny6qDooNLEhsfl02otDn7VSTSsVZjJ_qKnYmPUeXAQgyKRM-fORjcKbBhU5dr3esRAq9Z0rpPleEwdakXqjipKkACQ2fENki4rFXnOY7YFxT_wdLZ1wP0oBOxkRCFs55w2oSBpqNdLOBMLogOqLR5Ed141tmmGq6x5JIBIGLQpGUTz-j-SoxSEqAsb0oyBJUlJcFAW4fMY4kmOY-XH7MGb1nepdo-d10TXrbANiAVGSI203ZeLmnmsxUVbQ8TTtHYJ38sc%3D)

Friend, even if I _were_ related to President Trump (I'm no relation), Trinity University would still be making a bad call - and setting a dangerous anti-free-speech precedent. Not only is it wrong to burden anyone who shares a name with a famous political conservative ... but it also caters to the "Woke" student mob in trying to preemptively silence anyone far-left students might find objectionable. Put simply, when school administrators let "Woke" student protestors hold their schools hostage, this is where the next generation - and our educational system - ends up: A small number of far-left student activists are feared and coddled, while free speech and free thinking suffer! **After all, do you think this would be happening if my last name were Biden, Obama, or Clinton instead?** I don't think so! body:
| | |

Peter, we are so proud of the work we do together, and we're so glad you're joining us.

**Over the past two decades, Emerge has become the nation's premier organization that recruits, trains, and provides a powerful network to Democratic women who want to run for office.** But our work is more urgent than ever. Here's why:
**We’re in a battle for the direction of our country.** If we continue with politics as usual, we’ll lose this battle to Republican extremists and their anti-science, anti-voter, and anti-women policies. **That's why we MUST recruit, train, and elect bold Democratic women to turn this country around.

[Peter, we need your input to build a successful strategy and win races across the country. Will you take a minute to complete our new survey now?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60359043/396871604/-1050346632?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk818-su-welcome2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhODAwMmQxLThjYzUtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8Sv4kN4FXOqZza9VoYu8nYOi6jYQplfIDEVwgw9rJak=&emci=cb7f9e69-76a4-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=3a8002d1-8cc5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=920818)**

House Majority Forward is launching a six-figure digital and billboard campaign in Congressional districts across the country—including Tom Kean’s. If you take anything away from this, friend, it’s this: The new Republican Majority Congress has barely been sworn in. These attacks are not about Tom’s positions...his voting records...or anything he’s said or done since being elected... What’s happening here is nothing short of the Dems’ desperate attempt to take back the House and reclaim their chokehold on Americans in 2024. name: Kash Patel
subject: The REAL story of January 6th
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450606:JJByfzGfN:m:1:3365131770:2147DCDBBAB43C7FB946AFD852B0B6A9:r)

Peter,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _" deadly insurrection,"_ but the video evidence doesn't back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I 'm launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

[_**As a personal favor, can you help me raise $33,000 in the next 48 hours to fund our legal battles for the January 6th defendants in court. Click below to show your support today!**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450606:JJByfzGfN:m:1:3365131770:2147DCDBBAB43C7FB946AFD852B0B6A9:r)

**Support the January 6th Defendants**

**Goal:** $33,000
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donation: PENDING

[Donate >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450606:JJByfzGfN:m:1:3365131770:2147DCDBBAB43C7FB946AFD852B0B6A9:r) ****

**

The January 6th Committee lied.
* They lied about how Brian Sicknick died.
* They lied about Rep. Barry Loudermilk taking rioters on a reconnaissance mission.
* They lied about Rep. Josh Hawley running away.
* They lied about Ray Epps.

If they were _ "insurrectionists," _then why were some of them being led around by police officers instead of being arrested?

_What else are they lying about?_

I know they don't want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

And they used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they need your help to set them free.

[_**I am raising $33,000 to fund our legal battles to support the January 6th defendants in court. Will you send a gift of any amount today? Click here to show your support >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450606:JJByfzGfN:m:1:3365131770:2147DCDBBAB43C7FB946AFD852B0B6A9:r)

I know all about this firsthand. I've seen how the Department of Justice and the government work. I've even been on the receiving end of their spying.

This is just the beginning.

The Deep State wants to turn you against anyone who speaks out against their influence. They are trying to manipulate you into believing their version of events.

**Please send your urgent donation today to fund our new America First organization to defend our supporters in the courts. **
**
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450605:JJByfzGfN:m:1:3365131770:2147DCDBBAB43C7FB946AFD852B0B6A9:r)

Thank you,

Kash Patel

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Impulsive decisions are out of character for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friends –
Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me.
I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my family was dirt poor.
So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States Senate.
I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party switch.
I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race... doesn’t matter.
The only open question was whether the grassroots support would be there. And I thought it would be. So far, I’ve been right.
So I am asking:
Can you please use this link to split $5, $10 or whatever you can afford between Serve America and my campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation, because it all adds up when we’re all chipping in. So please. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
Thank you, and adiós,
Ruben

subject: Back-and-forth

body:
Kyrsten Sinema voted against raising the minimum wage.
#

Kyrsten Sinema voted against raising the minimum wage.
Ruben Gallego voted for raising the minimum wage.
Kyrsten Sinema voted to weaken banking regulations.
Ruben Gallego voted against that.
Kyrsten Sinema’s campaign is funded by huge donors.
Ruben’s is funded by grassroots, online donations.
This will be a tough race.
It will go back and forth.
Sinema’s donors are giving big to put her ahead.
We need you to help Ruben catch up.

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: I AM LIVID!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | **Democrats to Skip Another Border Hearing, Claim GOP Going to Texas 'to Attack' Biden**
_BREITBART_
I AM LIVID! This is a matter of national security, and the Democrats can't even show up for work...

This is not about attacking Joe Biden. It's about securing the southern border from the unprecedented influx of illegal immigrants, drugs, and terrorists.

Now that we are in the majority in the House, we can finally DO something about the unmitigated humanitarian & national security catastrophe Joe Biden is trying to sweep under the rug. But, of course, these Open-Borders Democrats are boycotting our hearings. Not only have they opened the southern border and ignored the crisis, but they are actively REFUSING to do their jobs...

This is an absolute dereliction of duty - but it's not surprising. My Republican colleagues and I made a Commitment to America - a commitment to YOU - when we asked for your vote last fall. Now, we are delivering. Democrats can't even show up for work.

We WILL secure the border, but we can't do it without YOU. If you are as serious as we are about securing the southern border, please stand with us TODAY.

**I'm setting an emergency goal of $20,000 by the end of the day to help House GOP's efforts to secure the southern border. Can I count on you for a small donation?**

name: David Trone
subject: Taking action to protect Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Congress, Inc
body:
Peter,
Last week, my team and I wrote to you asking for your urgent support of our efforts to protect Social Security. I’m so grateful to those of you who signed our petition [https://secure.ngpvan.com/as3wlZ3p7U6ho1cRDfeYQQ2] — because we can’t wait any longer to protect Social Security and the millions of Americans who rely on it to stay healthy and safe.
For far too long in Washington, our approach to Social Security has been to simply ignore it. Leaders on both sides of the aisle have avoided taking the necessary steps to ensure the program’s solvency and bring this lifeline into the 21st century. But maintaining the status quo and avoiding the topic of Social Security is no longer an option. Because some extreme Members of Congress have begun talking about cutting benefits for seniors and defunding Social Security. We can’t let that happen.
As we said last week, Social Security is one of the most successful programs in American history. Without it, more than 22 million more Americans — including 1.1 million children — would be living in poverty. More than 40% of older adults would be below the poverty line. Almost every American pays into this program from their very first paycheck. To imply that Social Security benefits are “handouts” would be an outright lie. These are life-saving benefits that we’ve paid for.
I won’t sit around and watch extremists try and tear apart this program. And I won’t wait until the Social Security Trust Fund runs out of money to take action. Too many people’s livelihoods are on the line. I’m proud to be a co-sponsor of Rep. John Larson’s Social Security 2100 bill, which will make important changes to the program, including:
*
Increased
payments
for
new
and
existing
beneficiaries
*
Improved
cost-of-living
adjustments
to
address
inflation
*
Increased
minimum
benefit
payments
to
protect
low-income
families
*
Raise
the
income
cap
on
contributions
so
the
wealthy
pay
their
fair
share
*
Extend
the
solvency
and
closing
the
Trust
Fund
gap
by
at
least
9
years
But, as with everything that I do in Washington, this must only be the beginning. Our continued progress depends on our willingness to put people over politics, have difficult conversations, and find common ground. We can’t allow partisanship to continue to impact people’s lives. This new vision for leadership can start with passing Social Security 2100. But, with your help, it will continue as we tackle some of the most pressing issues we face throughout our communities.
Thanks for your support,
David
P.S. If you didn’t get a chance, please take a moment to sign our petition to protect Social Security! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/as3wlZ3p7U6ho1cRDfeYQQ2]
Paid for by David Trone for Congress, Inc.
David Trone For Congress
P.O. Box 83998
Gaithersburg, MD 20883-3998
United States

name: President Joseph R. Biden, Jr.
subject: Everybody needs a little bit of breathing room
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
I hope you’ll join me in putting your faith in our work to elect Democrats nationwide in the years ahead. | |
---
My dad used to say everybody needs a little bit of breathing room -- just enough so that, at the end of the month, you can pay your bills and be certain your family is going to be okay. We all know that too many folks don’t have that peace of mind. That’s why, since I was sworn in as president two years ago, we have been focused intensely on getting more people affordable health care and bringing down costs -- all so that you can have a little bit of breathing room again. **We’ve made significant progress, Derek. But if we’re going to keep our country moving in the right direction, we need to continue to elect more Democrats across the country.** **[If you renew your membership to the Democratic Party today by making a donation of $10, we’ll send you an Official 2023 DNC Membership Card to signify your commitment to electing Democrats nationwide.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ymOoaZ2Tr-ojHUJEEb0iKbel_6jx5t5IoVHXReKN5GzCJcLN79V6GcZKl_WRYHbM0yib4qiERZdzUi4SJ3vbJOSIdCLE2Ls1gkHexWZK5SxQIOIyGjj7gCboGOnA-eCb2zE560jldy3No6Camm_ZwZDKSAASHVFBKnR3ovPl4JSaLHWC1ZO3tkIUbfA2rDC3Yclgcqy4BSJXTFSG7-xUn3D33MDYMkDDcm66ZNTjdLi0UJLV4wdqq7o4aNvYr1dHoAgWLv3CQdo-orI1icl_I-n3dN_g0UjiB2BkyQ27r2EOe16xeE2yjK9651wQC7YJx6PDhKskS-1juD6QPVL5KFr3nUgt2isckT5vJT1zh_mjhe-pddypkHS5re73AwUBY8SPZ5cYIQtJsdU4q0SVa0Hxf3s5avNrUupoj3Y_K8YdhqqMZ-V_9Uv07FlpL3oX0Igce6xOU7g5WHiNXXWlUoHPCNEyzrkI8WUekX12AYEmVrEO4zIwg6tNlxtbr7FECaJ3r8AffycBcYTElQNRjxGj7Soi4AuYwTdQS-tuFZs43d7XgCjJce8kxTYevt-sYoM2uSGrRqofsI3nfblur9akGx-emad0SnGbsRN-ZSP1jnuIgiR7EjDsbRRcPVVcQqd8wx7JqIDAD_NEowDj6RoryO5g4RLw0J0QcpMw5ytHAT11USP6MFnXZ9xSF41eM/3ul/iPhHzrQ6R5abi53tj7j23Q/h0/mEnDWUIKZCqS4ToJRo2nMLDDyhWd4arW-nU0DQVnNPY)**

clean_body: I hope you’ll join me in putting your faith in our work to elect Democrats nationwide in the years ahead. | | My dad used to say everybody needs a little bit of breathing room -- just enough so that, at the end of the month, you can pay your bills and be certain your family is going to be okay. We all know that too many folks don’t have that peace of mind. That’s why, since I was sworn in as president two years ago, we have been focused intensely on getting more people affordable health care and bringing down costs -- all so that you can have a little bit of breathing room again. We’ve made significant progress, Derek. But if we’re going to keep our country moving in the right direction, we need to continue to elect more Democrats across the country. Kamala and I are continuing our work to build a better America -- to rebuild our economy from the bottom up and the middle out, and to make sure all working families can have a little bit more breathing room. If we’re going to keep up our progress, it’s absolutely critical that we continue electing Democrats in every corner of this country. That’s why your contribution to the Democratic Party is so important. Day after day, the DNC is working to ensure that Democrats up and down the ballot have what they need to win. But they can’t do it without your help -- that’s why I’m coming to you today. It’d mean the world to me if you’d make a donation to power our party’s work today. Thank you for everything you do, Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr. President of the United States Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, . Team — Would you have a second to take our issues survey?

Helen Gym is fighting for a better Philadelphia for all of us, and would love to hear from you. Will you take a moment to share your priorities with her below? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/igaEFe0Jo0GscNfpXfirhQ2]

CHECK IN WITH TEAM HELEN [https://secure.ngpvan.com/igaEFe0Jo0GscNfpXfirhQ2?contactdata=fO8hqzKQuKKn5YDAotryp8b6dq4RszI2h+Xj4tHYYitMOpIJe0ENlOz+ENTvtvThWO/kGYPzxTvnGqOQPdIjPxzdg0sfdW2AdfiR0a0sYzyEnUNwF0Q/VW+CDROs2GByWfyixSCLEzQzl16xegldymZv2rjpfO+32r0wudQ9r44=]

We’re in the fight of our lifetime for stronger schools, affordable housing, ending gun violence, ensuring community safety, and building an economy where everyone — especially those who can afford it the most — gives their fair share.

In 2023, Philly will elect its 100th mayor to serve this great city, representing a new opportunity to fight for the safer, equitable communities that we all deserve. Our ambitious, people-first agenda will ensure Philadelphians get the bold leadership they need from City Hall. Everything is on the table — from ensuring we get guns off our streets, to making sure our kids have strong schools in every neighborhood. But we want to know what is at the top of your list too.

Our agenda is rooted in the neighborhoods and communities we serve. Will you share your priorities with Helen and our team? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/igaEFe0Jo0GscNfpXfirhQ2]

CHECK IN WITH TEAM HELEN [https://secure.ngpvan.com/igaEFe0Jo0GscNfpXfirhQ2?contactdata=fO8hqzKQuKKn5YDAotryp8b6dq4RszI2h+Xj4tHYYitMOpIJe0ENlOz+ENTvtvThWO/kGYPzxTvnGqOQPdIjPxzdg0sfdW2AdfiR0a0sYzyEnUNwF0Q/VW+CDROs2GByWfyixSCLEzQzl16xegldymZv2rjpfO+32r0wudQ9r44=]

Helen’s inspiration comes from supporters like you. Thank you for taking a moment to share with us!

— Team Helen
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here:

subject: An obscure Trump judge & Christian Right activist, Matthew J. Kacsmaryk, is about to overturn the FDA's approval of mifepristone--one of the more popular & safest methods of obtaining an abortion in the U.S. Can you support the fightback today?
body:
A national ban on medication abortion?!
| | | | |

| | |

| | | | | Peter, **_An obscure Trump judge & Christian Right activist, Matthew J. Kacsmaryk, is about to overturn the FDA's approval of mifepristone--one of the more popular & safest methods of obtaining an abortion in the U.S._** **_Not only will the unqualified hack who's attacked contraception & LGBTQ rights __ban mifepristone in red states, but in the United States. _Yep, blue states too__. _THIS. IS. NOT. A DRILL._** [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in donating $5, $10, or $50, to the Center for Reproductive Rights, who formed the Abortion Defense Network to fight every one of these sick attacks on our fundamental rights as Americans?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T571dc868-0490-4904-bf4c-e04c9234bbe7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**_His ruling will go beyond Dobbs: Yes, a_**_ _**_ national ban_** _. B__ _ecause one white, male, extremist thinks he knows better than the vast majority of lawyers, judges, doctors, FDA and scores of European countries that legalized mifepristone_.

---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfeae4343-74cc-4d14-9036-6046a5b719c1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Peter, An obscure Trump judge & Christian Right activist, Matthew J. Kacsmaryk, is about to overturn the FDA's approval of mifepristone--one of the more popular & safest methods of obtaining an abortion in the U.S. Not only will the unqualified hack who's attacked contraception & LGBTQ rights ban mifepristone in red states, but in the United States. Yep, blue states too. THIS. IS. NOT. A DRILL. His ruling will go beyond Dobbs: Yes, a national ban . B ecause one white, male, extremist thinks he knows better than the vast majority of lawyers, judges, doctors, FDA and scores of European countries that legalized mifepristone. | | | | | | | | Here's a taste of his radical version of Christianity in his own words: We can't allow this lunatic man to hijack women's rights in the United States. Thank you for never giving in to extremists who think they have the right to tell all the rest of us how to live. Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: President Obama
subject: Friend, redistricting is no longer a once-a-decade event.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Friend,
I am proud to be a part of All On The Line’s grassroots movement for fair maps, and I’m grateful to my friend Eric Holder for leading this movement. For the past four years, we have done the hard work together -- advocating for fair maps and fighting to protect voting rights.
Our democracy is stronger because of what we have accomplished. States that were once gerrymandered -- Michigan and Pennsylvania -- are now highly competitive, allowing voters to choose their representatives instead of the other way around.
With your help, All On The Line has been able to drive change to make the redistricting process fairer than before. But the movement doesn’t stop here. We must continue the work until we have fair maps in every state.
**[All On The Line isn’t just fighting for fair maps -- they are fighting to give people everywhere a fair shot. Will you make a donation today to help All On The Line strengthen our democracy in 2023 and beyond?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60385059/396936494/-572568336?refcode=20230318_AOTL_P_BHOMarch1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ0ZTBjM2IzLWI2YzUtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X0LoNmHtfCpRMOBPLwljScJlM9QW38z9Z3t356ATd8w=)**

Redistricting is no longer a once-a-decade event. The fight for fair maps is happening right now.
Republicans are already trying to make it harder for voters to pass ballot initiatives -- and this year, the U.S. Supreme Court could give state legislatures more power to gerrymander districts.
**But there’s hope.** Our grassroots movement helped stop gerrymandering ahead of the 2022 election. Together, we can do it again. Now is the time to build on All On The Line’s momentum ahead of 2024 and seize every opportunity to strengthen our grassroots efforts.
When you tell your friends or family that you support All On The Line, I hope you know you are part of our story. Your fight is our fight. Not every ten years, but right now, in this moment. The fight to safeguard our democracy is happening every day. That’s how it’s always been, and that’s how it will continue.

clean_body: | Friend, I am proud to be a part of All On The Line’s grassroots movement for fair maps, and I’m grateful to my friend Eric Holder for leading this movement. For the past four years, we have done the hard work together -- advocating for fair maps and fighting to protect voting rights. Our democracy is stronger because of what we have accomplished. States that were once gerrymandered -- Michigan and Pennsylvania -- are now highly competitive, allowing voters to choose their representatives instead of the other way around. With your help, All On The Line has been able to drive change to make the redistricting process fairer than before. But the movement doesn’t stop here. We must continue the work until we have fair maps in every state. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Redistricting is no longer a once-a-decade event. The fight for fair maps is happening right now. Republicans are already trying to make it harder for voters to pass ballot initiatives -- and this year, the U.S. Supreme Court could give state legislatures more power to gerrymander districts. But there’s hope. Our grassroots movement helped stop gerrymandering ahead of the 2022 election. Together, we can do it again. Now is the time to build on All On The Line’s momentum ahead of 2024 and seize every opportunity to strengthen our grassroots efforts. When you tell your friends or family that you support All On The Line, I hope you know you are part of our story. Your fight is our fight. Not every ten years, but right now, in this moment. The fight to safeguard our democracy is happening every day. That’s how it’s always been, and that’s how it will continue. = \-- Barack Obama All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. | | [**A progressive district attorney wants to put an innocent cop in prison for 99 years. This is a****death********sentence****. Please help!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450780:J61DzzGzN:m:1:3365131770:AAC39B6B7D58AEB76C0349ADC4F27F24:r)**[ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450780:J61DzzGzN:m:1:3365131770:AAC39B6B7D58AEB76C0349ADC4F27F24:r) ** This is Sheriff David Clarke. Please just take a moment to read my urgent text to you -- an innocent cop's life may depend on it. [**A progressive district attorney, bought and paid for by the infamous George Soros, wants to sentence Sgt. Josh Blake to 99 years in prison for doing his job.**** **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450780:J61DzzGzN:m:1:3365131770:AAC39B6B7D58AEB76C0349ADC4F27F24:r) If we can't raise the crucial funds needed to get a top lawyer for Josh, the rabid**** progressive**** D.A., Jose Garza will win. [**And if that happens, I'm deeply concerned Josh won't live long enough to die of old age in prison. Because violent criminals -- maybe some he arrested himself, will****murder****him.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450780:J61DzzGzN:m:1:3365131770:AAC39B6B7D58AEB76C0349ADC4F27F24:r) On May 31st, 2020, in Austin, Texas, an anti-police mob started rioting. They looted and vandalized buildings. They even set police cars on fire! Then the mob blocked a major highway that runs through Austin. No one could get through, not even police cars, fire trucks, and ambulances. The rioters then began to throw objects at the officers. So Josh and his fellow police officers deployed non-lethal bean bag rounds at the rioters that were throwing rocks and other objects. **Then what did progressive D.A. Jose Garza do? Did he indict the rioters for arson, looting, assault, and more?[NO! He indicted Josh and 19 other Austin police officers for committing first degree felonies!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450780:J61DzzGzN:m:1:3365131770:AAC39B6B7D58AEB76C0349ADC4F27F24:r)** Josh himself was charged with two counts of aggravated assault, which can mean a 99-year sentence. That's a death sentence one way or another. [**Sgt. Josh Blake may die behind bars because a rabid****progressive****D.A. is on a mission to destroy good cops!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450780:J61DzzGzN:m:1:3365131770:AAC39B6B7D58AEB76C0349ADC4F27F24:r) And Josh and his wife simply don't have the money to hire a top-shelf lawyer. Thankfully, National Center for Police Defense, Inc stepped in. With your generous support, the NCPD will help provide an excellent, aggressive legal defense for Josh. The NCPD was founded in 2015 to help law enforcement officers and military service members in their time of greatest need, when they're unjustly charged for crimes they didn't commit. NCPD helps pay for legal expenses. And even help pay for food, rent, utility bills, and more so innocent cops and their families don't go under as they endure the brutal legal process. NCPD can do all that only with the generous support of concerned people like you. You may be the only thing standing between Josh and violent criminals who plan to harm him, even kill him. [**Please help save Josh's life by fully funding his crucial legal defense with your very best gift immediately.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450780:J61DzzGzN:m:1:3365131770:AAC39B6B7D58AEB76C0349ADC4F27F24:r) Thank you so much. Retired Sheriff David Clarke

Even Worse, They Don't Work. “I have no respect for the passion of equality,” Oliver Wendell Holmes Jr., one of America’s great jurists, once declared, “which seems to me merely idealizing envy.” But envy, and its sister vice, greed, are very much back in fashion today when it comes to the progressive Left. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Let me say this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| Peter — it’s thanks to you I can do this important work.

Serving as an impeachment manager against Donald Trump. Leading the House Intelligence Committee. Shining a bright light on the corruption of Republican leadership in Congress.

**That’s all thanks to you.**

Ever since I launched my campaign to become California’s next U.S. Senator, you’ve stood by me. You’ve donated. You’ve attended our events. You’ve shared your honest feedback. You’ve read our many (many) emails. **You’ve been a part of it all, and I can’t do it without you.**

There’s something you should know, Peter: Right now, a lot of my colleagues are on the phone all day asking their big-money donors to cut checks to keep their campaigns afloat.

But thanks to your support, I can focus on what’s most important — attending important hearings, talking with constituents, and meeting with voters across our great state.

**Thanks to you, I can put all of my energy toward protecting our democracy and making our economy work for everyone. And that fight is just beginning.**

[**We have less than 14 days until our final FEC deadline of the quarter, and I’m counting on your support to reach our ambitious fundraising goal. Chip in $10 today to UniteDemocrats and our campaign so I can continue delivering for everyday Californians.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60368458/396907665/-648933138?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230318_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkNmY0ZjhlLTlkYzUtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=876dgcFGQoxEPQGwoxv9Zl7tGHkgXBwWY8onRPddYBU=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60368476/396907687/-648933138?amount=10&amounts=10,15,20&express_lane=true&refcode=UD_20230318_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJkNmY0ZjhlLTlkYzUtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=876dgcFGQoxEPQGwoxv9Zl7tGHkgXBwWY8onRPddYBU=)

clean_body: | Peter — it’s thanks to you I can do this important work. Serving as an impeachment manager against Donald Trump. Leading the House Intelligence Committee. Shining a bright light on the corruption of Republican leadership in Congress. That’s all thanks to you. Ever since I launched my campaign to become California’s next U.S. Senator, you’ve stood by me. You’ve donated. You’ve attended our events. You’ve shared your honest feedback. You’ve read our many (many) emails. You’ve been a part of it all, and I can’t do it without you. There’s something you should know, Peter: Right now, a lot of my colleagues are on the phone all day asking their big-money donors to cut checks to keep their campaigns afloat. But thanks to your support, I can focus on what’s most important — attending important hearings, talking with constituents, and meeting with voters across our great state. Thanks to you, I can put all of my energy toward protecting our democracy and making our economy work for everyone. And that fight is just beginning. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: | = = = With you part of the team, I know we can overcome anything Republicans throw our way. name: Team Foushee
subject: access to abortion is on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
Republicans have been relentless in their efforts to strip people of their reproductive freedom.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60368634/396908202/-340664628?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230318-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTZmNGY4ZS05ZGM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TMAu3Z0c_K8FkOtyFYzK9mG4zEu2E72lzvFcnLn1I4Q=)
---
| Peter,

Access to abortion is on the line.

As we wait to hear the Trump-appointed Texas judge’s decision to ban a lifesaving abortion medication nationwide, I wanted to reach out to reaffirm my commitment to securing reproductive access.

Republicans have been relentless in their efforts to strip people of their reproductive freedom. That means we must work twice as hard to get Republicans out of office and demand reproductive access. name: The Long Run PAC
subject: Why we’re asking now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
Friends -
It’s March of 2023, so you may be wondering why we are asking you to support our efforts to elect change-making candidates across the country this early in the cycle. Give us a minute to explain.
This early in campaigns, how much support we give to different candidates will directly determine how many Republicans and right-wing mega-donors will start their race against incumbent Democrats. But there is one clear way we can set those Democratic candidates up for success — investing early in campaigns.
Because when you make investments early in a campaign, it shows just how strong you are from the get-go. And that scares competitors. But most of all, when you invest early in a campaign, that donation is spent much more effectively than donations closer to Election Day. Each early donation helps campaigns engage more and more supporters throughout the entire cycle rather than just the final sprint.
So when you donate to our movement today, you are helping us provide that early support to the critical races that will determine the control of the House and Senate in 2024.
[**If you can, please contribute to our movement today. Your dollar will go much further than it will next month or next year, and will put us one step closer to creating meaningful change in races nationwide.](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-mar23.QOYevG&refcode=em230318-1-t2&t=1&akid=4270%2E196590%2EQq0gP4)**
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1281?c0=longrunpac-em-mar23.7efGeS&refcode=em230318-1-t2&t=20&akid=4270%2E196590%2EQq0gP4)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-mar23.jrcQoE&refcode=em230318-1-t2&t=21&akid=4270%2E196590%2EQq0gP4)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-mar23.tH38ms&refcode=em230318-1-t2&t=22&akid=4270%2E196590%2EQq0gP4)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-mar23.F2LVPU&refcode=em230318-1-t2&t=23&akid=4270%2E196590%2EQq0gP4)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-mar23.iC3NiK&refcode=em230318-1-t2&t=24&akid=4270%2E196590%2EQq0gP4)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-mar23.QOYevG&refcode=em230318-1-t2&t=25&akid=4270%2E196590%2EQq0gP4)
Our team is very grateful for your early support. Thank you for chipping in today.
The team at The Long Run
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-mar23.QOYevG&refcode=em230318-1-t2&t=26&akid=4270%2E196590%2EQq0gP4)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=4270%2E196590%2EQq0gP4). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=28&akid=4270%2E196590%2EQq0gP4)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=29&refcode2=4270_196590_Qq0gP4&akid=4270%2E196590%2EQq0gP4)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=30&akid=4270%2E196590%2EQq0gP4)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201

50 years ago, my mother escaped Cuba and Fidel Castro’s socialist regime with just the clothes on her back. By the grace of God, she overcame unimaginable odds to become an American. **_HUFFPOST:_ “Governors To Pharmacies: Please Clarify Your Abortion Pill Plans Using Actual Science”** Peter — **Abortion access is on the line, and Roy is fighting back!** Earlier this month, pharmacy giant Walgreens made a decision that could hurt women’s reproductive rights and their health. The chain agreed to withhold mifepristone (a key medication used in the most common form of abortion care) from the shelves in certain states, including some where abortion _remains legal_ , after threats from GOP attorneys general. _But Roy’s not standing for it._ Roy and other Democratic governors wrote a letter to demand Walgreens and other pharmacies to show their plans and follow the science on mifepristone — a safe, effective medication that has been available for more than two decades. **[Peter: Click here to stand with Roy and call on pharmacies to ensure abortion medication is accessible!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60370186/396914286/2115924730?refcode=ea.822a47bc-a1c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.822a47bc-a1c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjJhNDdiYy1hMWM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GjKmUKYssyrK8lBh1J3BuyH9z-kChCHmy_uKt5bRFfw=&emci=a4d5ec97-efc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=822a47bc-a1c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)** | [SIGN ON »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60370187/396914287/2115924730?refcode=ea.822a47bc-a1c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.822a47bc-a1c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjJhNDdiYy1hMWM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GjKmUKYssyrK8lBh1J3BuyH9z-kChCHmy_uKt5bRFfw=&emci=a4d5ec97-efc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=822a47bc-a1c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)

clean_body: | | Friend, we thought it would be fun to take some time this Women’s History Month to showcase the critical role of ballot measures during the women’s suffrage movement. Take our short quiz below to see how much you know about direct democracy’s role in women’s history! TRUE OR FALSE: Ballot measures aren’t a new tool — they were used by suffragettes in the 1920s in an attempt to give women voting rights. = = TRUE OR FALSE: Between 1867 and 1920, FIFTEEN states secured women's suffrage through ballot measures. = = TRUE OR FALSE: Some states took as many as 6 ballot measure campaigns to successfully secure women's suffrage. = = Thanks for learning with us, friend! FP Team Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: Team Fetterman
subject: Uh oh…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek, did you hear the news re: 2024? 😱
The National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC) just launched nominee funds in key swing states “to ensure the nominee in each state will have **a war chest** at the ready as soon as they win their primary.”
John might not be up for re-election next year, but he’ll be supporting + campaigning for his fellow Democrats as they go up against the GOP million$.
**[Will you donate $5 or any amount right now to help John defend our Democratic Senate majority? We’ve done it before, and now we need to do it again.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230318-1?refcode=em20230318-1-8295&refcode2=8295_434096_z67YOw&akid=8295%2E434096%2Ez67YOw)** 🔵

We can’t ignore this opening blow from the NRSC. Republicans are gathering their forces EARLY to build a cash advantage in the biggest Senate battlegrounds.
And if they take back the Senate in 2024, the consequences would be _disastrous_. Even programs like Social Security and Medicare are on the line.
But here’s the good news: we have a powerful grassroots team ready to fight back.

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Updates on recent wins and ongoing fights:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
I want to make sure that every family has what they need to thrive, from my community to yours. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvuozPxaFMmCaIg5-BwJ2ob6wEdoDwgiI13pvH0dR1WIc9qQEp_QrNnaBmTgm9xtqdQvt_38aE3ViKmNZCbRxjZg5tCxqVfZtlYrSphRf8o7KFkC1h_JiFaInNVNVp2NC8KwSeEkXYkRo_1ZfehkouhEJpHLD46XIR3rwjgirPPqjdd-KhFYJEbpfVasA_sOcQ/3ul/mdaeFBrfRU6OqqK-qSfhVg/h0/61JG45WtnkTNf8_TIkxYctHD7zXMlrbxpJ6kmCJVEKw)
---
Friend, I want to update you on some of the ways I’ve been honored to serve my community lately. I’m in Congress to fight for my neighbors, and we’ve had some recent wins.
## Environmental justice
After the train derailment in East Palestine, Ohio, Norfolk Southern chose to dispose truckloads of hazardous materials at the site of one of our region’s most negligent and notorious corporate polluters -- without any notice to local communities that could be placed at risk. Our residents and elected officials came together and pushed back against this decision and helped halt further shipments.**We will never give permission for corporate polluters to continue to sacrifice the health and well-being of our communities and our families.** Unfortunately, recent data shows asthma is on the rise in my community, largely from industrial pollution and the burning of fossil fuels. Detroiters are four times more likely to be hospitalized for asthma than Michigan residents more broadly, and within that there are dire racial disparities: Black Detroiters are over three times more likely to be hospitalized than white Detroiters. **So I’ve been working with environmental groups to push the EPA and Michigan’s Department of Environment, Great Lakes, and Energy to better regulate air pollution.** Our communities need stronger action now, and like many frontline communities, mine is all too familiar with exploitative corporations lining their pockets at our expense. **This week I partnered with grassroots groups We the People Michigan and the Michigan Environmental Justice Coalition to put together a town hall to hold our for-profit utility corporation DTE accountable** after a recent winter storm, which left nearly a million residents in Southeast Michigan without power and heat for days. Despite some of the least reliable services in the nation, DTE charges some of the highest rates in the nation. DTE is a monopoly that invests in their shareholders and executives rather than in our communities. If you agree that we need to make all utilities across the country publicly owned and operated, [check out our recent petition](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QJYwSu1YpM2AQIhgns6inQycRNBVq8COLVl6HxV2-xnpOMGGzLQJrkjPe7ZQb4V9cAjmFVyI-T5ITQDpLFs45JgrYP0kaBiSUdIksSafoyFiXQYIHkoSOCCqTycxkEbNdfsJMpxz-M7X8vfANANCN0Yg2ytOe9Zb8fQOV6g9ik74tKu4rxGi7dUOv5yXquQtweQeC7aTtkydqzTXfqA75MRbC7mmuEu2YjlC_C1wQ_cRqcgll8PGeS0lvG9UanuMgSg8iPU8m8ykvHYACQnn4r24_oQLU3Cd1m2SI03ybX1474Kog84BBoPG_fHETvegHKSYWNl-rR7ko6if9f0FrH-aFefooeAme5DI0VJbdswk/3ul/mdaeFBrfRU6OqqK-qSfhVg/h1/r6C01Qpd7vINbatYSQf8gxlwS9lowjFvn4gdNSPTXc0). I’m going to keep fighting to ensure that access to utilities (including electricity, heat, and water) is treated as the human right it is.
## Investing in communities
**This week I also rallied with activists in Detroit** asking why we're offering $800 million in tax incentives to billionaire developers without strong, enforceable community benefits. **Instead of giving away money to companies that exploit our communities, we’ve got to invest directly in communities so neighborhoods can thrive and fight poverty.** **Earlier this year, we secured over $19.6 million in federal funding for local projects in my community**. This went to support important initiatives**** ranging from community centers, to work training programs, to infrastructure updates, to affordable housing, education needs, and health facilities like the American Indian Health Family Services of Southeastern Michigan. Relatedly, I recently re-introduced the _Restoring Communities Left Behind Act_ to directly invest in local nonprofit organizations across the country working on projects such as: homeowner rehabilitation assistance, weatherization, improved housing accessibility for seniors and people with disabilities, housing counseling, refinancing, property tax relief, and infrastructure improvements. **I want to make sure that every family has what they need to thrive, from my community to yours.** That includes protecting our human rights to clean water, clean air, access to utilities, and affordable housing for all. [**If you’re able to, please pitch in to support the fight for environmental justice and thriving communities.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ywUejzifjpA1ayO0IXa-u0XgM6V0RYmqzoLOFG4O5pUMLsKypFVGxoqmVU_HiLOG_qTZrdwyai8Gxes93PLkga1MnA0KEhvaU0AUKy2pBSJdDwn2JpdZvhfJuQvaED3wVIX09LZi2C8ds0shlXhQHCA6sYunzdm-cgBWkLF0ATIa3Ww82PPmjGW75B4L3pHWsgX3Hab_QmfuCgRraW8Fi6QVUeAB5vhz2XvQq2HRIuVTfTXOP9oPbazdCleMxspvplPt1wv-eCc-Qsmg6XxIvaFdm7qlARFoaNizTiKutlq7l3zHMfy3SP_5AXBlMDX276I0ustWUNTt1jM7NDEutjcQ64-5ETEGZp8C0sy-eFfg/3ul/mdaeFBrfRU6OqqK-qSfhVg/h2/vobMsxllT2AbUCVjkF1h1j_h8Qb7FiRFWKTInU7IVwg) Thank you so much. Always in service, Rashida
[DONATE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_-yG9ZZ0OPvICJSBuTj3I3frwAQ0m6h1Uxx1i5jKkmYYBKeLy3UMAP86n79ev6qbSnOJ_saAiZzUbRkZ0rSA_zA2JUB2jIq1fi7TUsRKTJcX7lWA6X09TBgDs/3ul/mdaeFBrfRU6OqqK-qSfhVg/h3/5KMnNm5Ga9vB83C7D8VDNNVhSzWc5jjCQjOj-JYe_SE)

name: Cori Bush HQ
subject: A screenshot from ActBlue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
You might wonder: It’s not an election year, so why fundraise?
#
Peter, we'll get right to the point:
Since the 2022 election year came to a close, our online fundraising has slowed _dramatically_. A small slowdown is natural after a busy period like an election, but we're starting to get antsy that our numbers won't pick up in time to cover our operational costs.
Here's a screenshot directly from our ActBlue:
[](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230318.KUVhl1&refcode=em20230318-2352&t=1&akid=2352%2E1082990%2ES5Y-Ga)
**Our fundraising efforts now create a strong foundation for victory during the Election Year — and every fundraising goal we miss today hurts our future.** That's why we're hoping we can count on this grassroots movement to step up and help us make up the difference over the next few days.
**[Will you chip in $5 or more now to help us close the off-year fundraising gap?](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230318.KUVhl1&refcode=em20230318-2352&t=2&akid=2352%2E1082990%2ES5Y-Ga)**
**[Rush $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230318.KUVhl1&amount=5&refcode=em20230318-2352&t=21&akid=2352%2E1082990%2ES5Y-Ga)**
Thank you,
Team Cori
