name: Jasmyn Jordan
subject: Leftists called me – a black female conservative – a WHITE SUPREMACIST
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62451107:61fr9zG-N:m:1:3391001263:D590E6A6B538286944A62E2EF8791440:r)
---
Peter, I'm a student at the University of Iowa. My peers in college called me a "white supremacist," "a token," "a bigot," and a "Nazi." Why? **Because I 'm a black conservative female who believes America is not a racist country.** When I was attacked by my university's Black Student Union for not buying into their leftist ideology, I thought I was alone. **But I found a conservative family at college through Young America 's Foundation (YAF), where I was finally surrounded by like-minded friends who love America, the constitution, and free enterprise.** YAF changed my life. And they need your help today. [**Would you consider giving a tax-deductible donation to Young America 's Foundation so they can change the lives of more students like me?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62451107:61fr9zG-N:m:1:3391001263:D590E6A6B538286944A62E2EF8791440:r) My name is Jasmyn Jordan. You may have heard of Young America's Foundation before as the leading youth outreach organization in America. YAF inspires large student audiences in high schools and colleges with your conservative ideas. I'm proud to be the vice president of my YAF chapter at the University of Iowa. The Left on campus hates that I'm a conservative. But I'm proud to be, and so grateful to be a leader in YAF. YAF provides students with a nationwide campus lecture program, featuring prominent conservative leaders, including **Ben Shapiro** , **Kellyanne Conway** , **Matt Walsh** , **Dinesh D 'Souza**, **Larry Elder** , Dr. **Arthur Laffer** , **Katie Pavlich** , Lt. Col. **Allen West** , NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens** , and many others. You may have heard that Young America's Foundation as the organization that saved President Ronald Reagan's Ranch in Santa Barbara, California, and the Ronald Reagan Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois for future generations! YAF also provides young people with a "Schoolhouse for Reaganism," the Reagan Ranch Center, to teach students President Reagan's ideas and preserve his conservative legacy. In addition, **Young America 's Foundation leads the Conservative Movement teaching your conservative ideas on YouTube** with more than one million subscribers! YouTube is the #1 social media site used by young people. Through YouTube, YAF provides young Americans with full, impactful, feature-length conservative programs. [**Your tax-deductible donation to Young America 's Foundation could help minority students who have been taught to hate America and hate white people to instead embrace traditional American values.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62451107:61fr9zG-N:m:1:3391001263:D590E6A6B538286944A62E2EF8791440:r) Your tax-deductible donation will be changing the hearts and minds of students who desperately need an alternative viewpoint to the liberal ideology pushed on them in America's classrooms. [**Any amount you can give to YAF today -- will inspire young people to love (not hate) America and adopt your conservative viewpoint!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62451107:61fr9zG-N:m:1:3391001263:D590E6A6B538286944A62E2EF8791440:r) It's terrifying to see how a **hatred for America** has gripped my generation. **But I 'm living proof as a black conservative student that you can reach even the most impressionable students with your conservative values. ** Young America's Foundation is changing the tide and growing the Conservative Movement with new, young activists ready to dedicate their lives to freedom's cause. They need your help with this special mission. Thank you for helping Young America's Foundation today. And thank you for helping young Americans like me grow firm in our conservative values.
---
Gratefully,
---
Jasmyn Jordan Sophomore, University of Iowa

It was another jam-packed week filled with a massive rally, grassroots supporters, and taking on Biden’s failed policies. Take a look to see what Nikki’s been up to this week. ON THE CAMPAIGN TRAIL Nikki started the week off with a packed rally in Myrtle Beach. More than a thousand people were fired up to hear Nikki speak. She spoke about her time as governor, signing voter ID into law, passing one of the nation’s toughest immigration laws, and going toe-to-toe with the Obama-Biden administration. We want to make sure every American hears her message. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=43827ffbf38d4922a630c30b86c5c62c4f990eae1ea2cb6aeab3e8358588b39fb93503bd8ab73e0fb6d405675f09067478e5a9a1690fa5d6236c92853c34b291 Make sure to watch her rally here and then share it with 5 friends. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=43827ffbf38d4922a630c30b86c5c62c4f990eae1ea2cb6aeab3e8358588b39fb93503bd8ab73e0fb6d405675f09067478e5a9a1690fa5d6236c92853c34b291 > " alias="WATCH NOW >> " conversion="false" data-linkto="https://">WATCH NOW >> https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=43827ffbf38d49228a7ab650d861a64431d3328e030d700fe1209444af54d5082dc840a2c1e7828eab6686f05d259dcbcdecc79c99c4e9e6dc3fd5aee24be805 The State: “For nearly 40 minutes, the former S.C. governor and U.N. ambassador went after China, Washington spending, a spirit of ‘national loathing’ and ‘woke culture’ as a raucous crowd of nearly 1,000 cheered her on.” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=43827ffbf38d49222fdff5b804f842c5110eabbc48f1c05320e25392fef3f33798ab34aac322406768f98e9112f72eab976805e68e143c3e613e72f5d3e537f2 The State, 3/13/23) The Post and Courier’s Caitlin Byrd: “‘This national self-loathing is killing us,’ Haley says. ‘You elected me the first female minority governor in history. You did that. America is not racist. America is blessed.’ She says children need to be saying the Pledge of Allegiance every AM before they start school. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=43827ffbf38d49221ab5b2f29e7ea78241d4762eb901d88a8ac5cb8a17fad95d22a35818b046ef4f9e2843e9f30c68462f298cf48bb76d28aaf6182c64311c87 #scpol ” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=43827ffbf38d492263e664e19a5406a4f8555b3fe7ba344aa9bad06eb3beb71a02ee1db6d4d15f7947594f862a2ae8535bbdc24599029399083f26183c6fe4ae Twitter, 3/13/23) https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=43827ffbf38d492263e664e19a5406a4f8555b3fe7ba344aa9bad06eb3beb71a02ee1db6d4d15f7947594f862a2ae8535bbdc24599029399083f26183c6fe4ae AP’s Meg Kinnard: “That's it from Haley's Myrtle Beach, SC, campaign rally, where there were around 1000 people. Haley, who just finished taking photos with supporters, wrapped up with what's become a standard closer for her stump events: ‘I've never lost a race, and I'm not gonna start now.’” ( https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=43827ffbf38d49222fa6a5f272eb78c2a4adef7f28ee0590abcab2d3009ffaba72d477b7232cac8b9af08d685bca4d09d2eaaf8f05545f0dc1785dad29b98513 Twitter, 3/13/23) https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=43827ffbf38d49222fa6a5f272eb78c2a4adef7f28ee0590abcab2d3009ffaba72d477b7232cac8b9af08d685bca4d09d2eaaf8f05545f0dc1785dad29b98513 IN THE NEWS Nikki Haley slammed President Biden for his bank bailout and released a new video on President Biden’s Silicon Valley Bank bailout, the second largest bank bailout in U.S. history. Nikki Haley has a long record of opposing government bailouts, including the 2008 Wall Street bailout and President Obama’s handouts. Joe Biden forgave $400 BILLION in student loan debts. **But there 's a catch - he wants YOU to pay for it.**

That means millions of Americans who haven't gone to a college or university - or those who took out loans and worked their butts off to pay them back - will _pay for someone 's tuition to attend a gender studies class._

subject: 🚨 RAC Speaker Announcement 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join us this May in Kennewick for the Republican Action Conference!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! () State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. () Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press: “We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions. “Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative." Read the full statement. () Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here () . Contact: Steve Johnson Communications Director Washington State Republican Party (425) 460-0570 steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org) ============================================================

name: Trump Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: Question for you: Do you think Trump should be indicted?
body:
The New York Times reports, Trump Says His Arrest Is Imminent and Calls for Protests, Echoing Jan. 6 | | |
---
| | **BREAKING NEWS:****_The New York Times reports, Trump Says His Arrest Is Imminent and Calls for Protests, Echoing Jan. 6_ ** With the combined criminal investigations in New York, along with his efforts to overturn the election and classified documents found at his Mar-a-Lago estate – Trump could _finally_ be held accountable for his actions. This is exactly what Trump is afraid of – he’s campaigning around these investigations being a conspiracy theory to halt his 2024 campaign. But, the evidence doesn’t lie – and it’s critical Trump be held responsible for **_his actions._** [_**Indicting Trump could change _everything_ , so we’re asking Democrats in your area to share whether you think Trump should be indicted:**_](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0gVmqLBk4ptk_P_GMRx-1TZ4SEflBlBt_cGsulBEBZwDTOUq0j-y-T6pYQSDa7DwVgV8i2rDt0GhU4t8NG7MisZIY1WfVu9p0fq9QWGSUFEuh-VlmtdUhI_VKVOnZVV2jvrmLOgW-fRoYxB1OqeW-z14Ai4Z0oYys9Sp7j0WxXB9e3ko6sR3vF5W73DHhoq0MohwczjdcC46cFBHPkkvuFTZd768nLq1KNLOMSRfgQQdx9vekymwucQNSMDX07ze_A8nanFQE3Gt8DQM-G5sAq5-z9DakBbzeHQwd2RDHfsLNkrjdJK6dHe6qBDhdJ_Z2S7QroZch3mCmRMG4nwkqWyzNK6d5kZ8wjmaQCgKX5qTRx3F_bgjLVkAOD9RatSEHII9c08VyYMKe1_VIw7TNDSyDUnjVbNiP2DyWl6liNYhpla7k2b6tt8ad15U70sPqDGcxpg6BiJxxDSxgs-hIB4_Pr0uqBlKgoKjUSdC4tu7ltakIygnkv9ZN2AuIbsU7fIeNba2H985JaNFAxZoHI7R18Va-mEyAX-6fc4R9VG_KX3SxEaZ_LZFTzSTWKGksQ/3ul/ftww2E7zTiSI55g3IB_HrA/h0/iA78x4nMLQUaABQD_IzgIbvZqdSXAffEiqKDDgxLTQ0) | **Do you think Trump should be indicted?**

[name], do you have a few minutes to spare? **We’re working with a few other groups to send letters to Congress asking them to hold big banks accountable by passing the**** _Secure Viable Banking Act._** This legislation would provide federal protections for American consumers to avoid another financial crisis and reinstate Trump-era rollbacks on big bank oversight. Welcome to _Laura Reacts to the News_! This is where you will get my take on various national news stories each week.
## [Ron DeSantis hit with an ethics complaint from Trump super PAC](https://substack.com/redirect/36a8fe97-a725-44e2-8efc-bbd07eb41ed6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### By Matt Dixon at NBC News
**SUMMARY:** Donald Trump's allies are stepping up their battle with Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis, formally accusing him of violating state ethics and election laws with his "shadow presidential campaign."
**MY TAKE:**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d38a41e6-eb8d-43bd-84c5-551804116502?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**[WATCH: Trump PAC Files Ethics Complaint Against DeSantis For BREAKING THE LAW](https://substack.com/redirect/d38a41e6-eb8d-43bd-84c5-551804116502?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
I've been saying for weeks that Ron DeSantis has been illegally running a shadow presidential campaign, in violation of FEC rules, and Florida's Resign to Run law.
If you'll recall, several weeks ago I referred to Ron DeSantis' book tour as a shadow presidential campaign, and I accused him of violating Florida election laws by running for president before officially filing with the FEC.
LOOMER UNLEASHED
[Ron DeSantis Is Running For President Against President Trump, But He Needs A Florida Law To Change First ](https://substack.com/redirect/9fd025a5-06fc-411f-8028-b0ec56895bf7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

While everything here is free at the moment, your monthly financial subscription of $7 per month or $70 per year will help ensure that I can keep providing you and others with groundbreaking independent journalism and original political c...

5 days ago * 40 likes * 19 comments * Laura Loomer
And now, it looks like President Trump's Super PAC agrees with my assessment and reporting, because _NBC News_ has just published a draft of a 15-page ethics complaint that has been drafted by Make America Great Again Inc., a Pro-Trump Super PAC, against Governor Ron DeSantis for alleged campaign finance violations, FEC violations, and violations of various Florida statutes.
According to the draft, that was sent to the chairman of the Florida Commission on Ethics, there is strong evidence that Governor Ron DeSantis has engaged in illegal conduct.
Ron DeSantis is certainly conducting campaign style activities over a protracted period of time, in anticipation for the 2024 primary. This can be seen through Ron DeSantis' national book tour, and his highly publicized speeches in key caucus and primary states that one must win in order to secure the GOP nomination. Additionally, there has been wide spread speculation and media reports that Ron DeSantis and his allies, either through PACs, LLCs, and other forms of dark money, have recruited, and are allegedly paying a group of conservative social media influencers, overseen by Christina Pushaw, Governor DeSantis' official rapid response director, and former press secretary.
It is illegal for elected officials to mix their official tax payer funded staffing operations with campaign business.
On Page 5 of the drafted complaint, filed by President Trump's PAC, they rightfully accuse Ron DeSantis of using his tax payer-funded security detail as Governor of Florida to provide personal protection for him at his out of state shadow presidential activities.
If you read and subscribe to _Loomer Unleashed_ here on Substack, you wouldn't have needed to read the complaint, because most of what is included in this, has already been reported by me right here and on my Twitter, as a part of my investigation into Ron DeSantis' shadow presidential campaign.
I'm really happy I'm not the only one who has noticed these violations. It looks like the Trump campaign has been reading my Substack and my Twitter feed; Imagine that!

# **[Ron DeSantis disavows Florida GOPer's blogger registration bill](https://substack.com/redirect/cf61cfb2-f951-430e-adbd-3c48b8f4aa83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
###### By Mark Moore at The New York Post
**SUMMARY:**
[DeSantis pointed out at a news conference](https://substack.com/redirect/83d3a00d-d08d-40a0-aa38-8b223ff98f28?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that lawmakers can introduce measures independently and said he was surprised he became associated with State Sen. Jason Brodeur's proposal that would require bloggers who cover government to register with the state.
[Javier Manjarres @JavManjarres](https://substack.com/redirect/297c573f-ea52-4d55-8e70-b9546a84c2a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[BREAKING-- @GovRonDeSantis just struck down the 'Blogger Bill' that forces Bloggers to Register With State READ MORE ](https://substack.com/redirect/297c573f-ea52-4d55-8e70-b9546a84c2a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[bit.ly/3ZLiOVZ](https://substack.com/redirect/ee6eff92-3f54-4e88-bcd4-d7435df37e76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) #FlPol #Florida
[6:15 PM ∙ Mar 7, 2023
* * *
1,155Likes278Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/297c573f-ea52-4d55-8e70-b9546a84c2a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..HnwhvXFHBm4qRFU3o-UPyM-uiWcOmrBSpZGmp3YTnDs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=107831091)
**MY TAKE:**
According to Florida Senate Bill 1316 sponsored by GOP State Sen. Jason Brodeur, "Bloggers" otherwise known as independent journalists (like me!) who write about Governor DeSantis will have to "register" with the State of Florida if they want to be able to write about and report on Governor Ron DeSantis and other top elected officials in Florida, including the Florida Attorney General. If bloggers don't register with the state, then they'll be fined on a daily basis, according to the bill.
However, after widespread condemnation of the bill from both the Left and the Right, and all lovers of the First Amendment, Ron DeSantis had to walk back his ultimate end goal of banning all criticism of himself.
When asked about the bill during a press conference, DeSantis said, "Any person can file bills, and I see these people filing bills."
However, his reply was disingenuous. DeSantis made is seem like the sponsor of the bill was some random legislator who he has never heard of, when in reality, the bill was created by a pro-DeSantis Republican legislator, State Sen. Jason Brodeur, who was ENDORSED by Governor DeSantis. His Blogger Bill deliberately invokes the name of DeSantis, and there's no way Brodeur drafted this bill and filed it without consulting with DeSantis ahead of time.

He's the only thing standing between the Federal Government targeting all conservative Americans. President Trump is our last hope, which is why we must all rally behind him and do everything in our power to make sure he is re-elected. Also, not surprisingly, Governor Ron DeSantis has been SILENT over the news that President Trump may be arrested and indicted on Tuesday. Probably because like the snake he is, DeSantis is waiting, wishing for President Trump to be indicted so that it clears the path for the 2024 GOP nomination, which DeSantis is desperate to win in his disloyal quest to undermine MAGA and run against President Trump, the man he OWES EVERYTHING TO! Under FL law, the state's Governor is responsible for making sure a person in the state is arrested & delivered to another state if that person is indicted on a felony charge. This will be the ultimate test for Ron DeSantis. But, sadly, I don't think he will do anything to help President Trump. Just like he didn't do anything to help President Trump when the FBI raided his home at Mar a Lago in Palm Beach, Florida! By Mark Moore at The New York Post SUMMARY: that lawmakers can introduce measures independently and said he was surprised he became associated with State Sen. Jason Brodeur's proposal that would require bloggers who cover government to register with the state. #FlPol #Florida LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. MY TAKE: According to Florida Senate Bill 1316 sponsored by GOP State Sen. Jason Brodeur, "Bloggers" otherwise known as independent journalists (like me!) who write about Governor DeSantis will have to "register" with the State of Florida if they want to be able to write about and report on Governor Ron DeSantis and other top elected officials in Florida, including the Florida Attorney General. If bloggers don't register with the state, then they'll be fined on a daily basis, according to the bill. However, after widespread condemnation of the bill from both the Left and the Right, and all lovers of the First Amendment, Ron DeSantis had to walk back his ultimate end goal of banning all criticism of himself. When asked about the bill during a press conference, DeSantis said, "Any person can file bills, and I see these people filing bills." However, his reply was disingenuous. DeSantis made is seem like the sponsor of the bill was some random legislator who he has never heard of, when in reality, the bill was created by a pro-DeSantis Republican legislator, State Sen. Jason Brodeur, who was ENDORSED by Governor DeSantis. His Blogger Bill deliberately invokes the name of DeSantis, and there's no way Brodeur drafted this bill and filed it without consulting with DeSantis ahead of time. By Shane Trejo at Big League Politics SUMMARY: Project Veritas founder James O'Keefe has launched a new media group after being ousted by his own organization by the board of directors shortly after exposing Pfizer for gain-of-function mad science. His new venture is and will pick up where he left off after being pushed out of Project Veritas in a shameful miscarriage of justice. MY TAKE: As a former Project Veritas undercover journalist, I am thrilled to see James O'Keefe, my mentor and one of my best friends, launch his new media company, OMG, otherwise known as O'Keefe Media Group. It's the perfect acronym for the journalistic legend whose exposes often leave people with their mouth wide open saying "OH MY GOD". I wish James O'Keefe all the luck in the world! You can't keep a good man down, and it won't be long before the board members of Project Veritas, who ousted James O'Keefe from the company he created, come running, begging for him to come back! Watch his new video here! By New York Post Editorial Board SUMMARY: The agency not only sent letter after letter digging into Twitter's layoffs, it's also demanding all internal communications by, from or about Musk -- and telling him to name reporters he's shared info with. MY TAKE: Big Brother is watching you. Or, rather, the DOJ and NSA are always watching you. And, if you're Elon Musk, then the FTC under the radical, Uber-Leftist Pakistani Lina Khan is out to get you. Ahead of the recent hearing about the weaponization of the federal government, it was revealed that Mrs. Khan has had her sights focused on Elon Musk ever since he purchased Twitter and exposed Twitter's illegal political censorship and election interference through the release of the Twitter Files. As we have all seen, ff you're saying and doing things that are inconvenient to the Government and their efforts to quell all political dissent and turn our country into a communist, banana Republic, then they'll use every means under the sun to shut you up, or shut you down. The Biden regime is anti-free speech and anti- freedom of the press, which is why the FTC, under Khan, sent out over a dozen letters to Twitter and Twitter legal, demanding they "identify all journalists" who were granted access to the company's Twitter File archives, all internal communications related to Elon Musk, and an explanation as to why Twitter fired its deputy general counsel, former FBI lawyer Jim Baker. This is nothing more than blatant WEAPONIZATION OF THE GOVERNMENT to persecute political opposition and dissidents. LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. Now they know that they have nothing on Elon, yet these people don't care about the truth. Just as they've done to millions of Americans, including me, they're now getting their goons to do their dirty work. Yet it seems the government's mad dash to get Musk on anything has hilariously blown up in their faces. Instead of finding any wrongdoing on Musk's part, they've actually exposed their close relationship with Twitter's old leadership. But wait just a moment, the FTC's responsibility is to protect consumers from predatory business practices. After all, this isn't the NSA or FBI we're talking about. So why are they doing this then? It's obvious at this point. Our government has been hijacked by corrupt fools who couldn't give less of a damn about the people they're supposed to serve and represent. They only care about serving themselves and making sure that they can hold power forever. America has become the tyranny the founders warned us about. By Adam Shaw at Fox News SUMMARY: "Starting today we are going to start an information campaign for Mexicans who live and work in the United States and for all Hispanics to inform them of what we are doing in Mexico and how this initiative by the Republicans, in addition to being irresponsible, is an offense against the people of Mexico, a lack of respect for our independence, our sovereignty," he said. MY TAKE: Stolen elections have consequences! And Mexican President Andres Manuel Lopez Obrador clearly understands that. Now that our border with Mexico is wide open under the illegitimate Biden regime, Mexico doesn't have the same respect it had for our country during the Trump administration. In less than three years, we went from telling Mexico they were going to pay for our wall and work to keep illegals our of our country or else, to Mexico's President threatening to illegally interfere in US elections if Republican lawmakers continue to be tough on the cartels and the spread of Fentanyl across the border. We must militarize the US border, and embrace President Trump's proposals of giving the death penalty to drug dealers, designating the Mexican cartels as terrorists, and deporting all illegal aliens back to where they came from. WE NEED PRESIDENT TRUMP BACK! DESPERATELY! By Frankie Stockes at National File SUMMARY: Governor Glenn Youngkin was elected in a pro-parental rights wave that was largely spurred by the massive backlash to the trans bathroom rape of a teenage girl in a Loudoun County high school by a "gender-fluid" male in a skirt. During his Thursday night CNN town hall, Youngkin called for more gender-neutral bathrooms to be placed in public schools when questioned on school sports and restroom policies by a 16-year-old "transgender man." MY TAKE:** So let's go through this step by step: Conservative activists see an issue, for the sake of this scenario, let's say a young girl in High School getting raped by a biological male student wearing a dress, pretending to be a girl. Conservative activists then do the right thing and confront the school board about the cover up of the rape and the insanity of caving to transgender radicalism. The GOP then notices how popular of a political talking point parental right is, so the find a candidate who promises to fight on behalf of the activists and restore parental rights. The activists then elect this Republican, only for that very same newly elected Republican to betray them and do the EXACT OPPOSITE of what they promised to do on the campaign trail. Sound familiar? It's a story as old as time! It's also what just happened in Virginia this week when Governor Glenn Younkin did a complete 180 on his campaign promises. Governor Glenn Youngkin was elected on a platform of "parental rights" and "school reform" after a transgender male raped a man's daughter at Stone Bridge High School. The sexually confused boy was then transferred to Broad Run High School where he went on to do the EXACT SAME THING. Naturally, parents were outraged and took to their school board to demand to know what the hell was going on in the schools they fund with THEIR tax money. It turns out the public schools were indoctrinating minor students with LITERAL child porn. In a sensible country, those responsible would've been given the death penalty (if they even made it to court first!) But, we clearly now live in an asylum that is controlled by the mental patient inmates. It has become evident very quickly that the GOP has no interest in actually fixing the problem despite all of their empty, and failed promises to eradicate CRT and the sexual exploitation of children in the public school system. I won't waste your time with Youngkin's backstory, but he was the co-CEO of the Carlyle Group (a private equity firm), so he's about as swampy as they come. But despite his past, the brave parents of Virginia who showed up to advocate for their kids while facing threats of doxxing and political persecution at the hands of the DOJ, which classified these parents as "domestic terrorists", showed up to vote Younkin into office with a desperate wish for reform under his leadership. Let this be a lesson to anyone who ever takes a politician at their word: THEY ARE ALL LIARS. Youngkin has seemingly reversed his "culture warrior" stance. Appearing at a CNN town hall with Jake Tapper, Younkin said "What's most important is that we try very hard to accommodate students, that's why I have said many many times, we just need extra bathrooms in schools. We need gender-neutral bathrooms, and so, people can use the bathroom that they in fact are comfortable with." How many times does this scenario need to play out before conservative activists realize the GOP doesn't care about them or their kids??? If you enjoyed this article, please SUBSCRIBE to LOOMER UNLEASHED, where I will continue to piss off the elitist political establishment by speaking the TRUTH. It is free to sign up, but paid subscriptions of $7 per month or $70 per year help keep this publication and my investigative journalism alive. So please, consider joining for a nominal fee! Thank you for your support! I truly appreciate it. In Truth, Laura Loomer You're currently a free subscriber to . name: Robert Garcia for Congress
subject: Climate change is devastating California
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60382620/396927819/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGQ5Y2Q1MS1hZWM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qvj9x4nSXxrWPEYGUfmCHM3ic8wgOulB1I_NOez_7bM=)
Friend —
Climate change is devastating California in our strangest winter yet. We’ve seen it all — snow covers the northern terrain of our Golden State while atmospheric river storms and runoff flooding are forcing evacuations, power outages, and road closures.
In a state that was facing drought for the past two decades, the domination of snow and rain is causing an unprecedented amount of damage to the infrastructure of the state — roadways are being flooded, caused landslides and toppled trees — and it’s all a direct result of climate change.
We cannot continue to watch our planet perish. These storms are a result of the man-made climate crisis, and we must act now to fix it.
The United States must lead the global community on climate action because Congress can make the difference the world needs to protect our planet before it is far too late.
California has proven solutions to tackle climate change, and Robert himself has been a climate leader in Long Beach. He is advocating for California's aggressive action on climate in Congress, but he is counting on your support so he can continue to lead the fight.
[**So if you can afford to do so, please add a contribution to support Robert Garcia’s campaign for Congress. Every dollar you contribute will make a difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60382622/396927820/60992958?refcode2=30d9cd51-aec5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&refcode=em230318-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGQ5Y2Q1MS1hZWM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qvj9x4nSXxrWPEYGUfmCHM3ic8wgOulB1I_NOez_7bM=)
When you support Robert, you ensure we have the resources to keep him in Congress to pass transformative climate policy.
Thank you for supporting our movement and protecting our planet.
Team Robert Garcia
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60382624/396927822/60992958?refcode2=30d9cd51-aec5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&refcode=em230318-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGQ5Y2Q1MS1hZWM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qvj9x4nSXxrWPEYGUfmCHM3ic8wgOulB1I_NOez_7bM=)**

subject: Against a national sales tax 💸
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqAVzEl4LE04H7PxIJv6b2eZuzlgNWGrmM0tisZhEroq5uAvlowRGLmv7ZHfJH6WjxukU-skJDPFPhIiS1TUVT9t4ofU1s_gY9KEyrbZp2doSEro_PqEBITaE6cz5cuH38pnG_VRaD28jPjg6jcA8kTcRCMk0kzzEyvz2K8Hr7Jd7g7VSRXtMEf8L17_8LqBZ03t-XsNYHFF8eDO14tOHHcKtJchFJY5vtKl8ldCaB8uojTin7n51My16441hwstg-8aSUFCMkINnD3cX6spnoKOZ9aM5-1qQGIFQJWOdfrgCPXHuvB2oC1WbX6GEYVxupC/3ul/k0-zpaLSTmm9WqUT20Yk7g/h0/2bRXnajvl4JpaMvy7ehJ7WAjdQUCZMIMj4WoGVBxamg)

Peter, In case you hadn’t heard: A few weeks ago, House Republicans introduced a bill that would create a 30% national sales tax while eliminating corporate income taxes and the IRS altogether. **It was a clear attempt to benefit the GOP’s wealthy donors while leaving everyday Americans out to dry.** That’s why I introduced a resolution opposing the GOP’s absurd ploy and instead proposed a tax _cut_ for the middle class and working families.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmE-UZF0v-hLGyyNHgsAHFoQe_dVa_PTK2XZ8FiN2ahR_Vh9-evYIXlSBaOgi8O2mL0Pvh36bOjf3Jl675NwX0HJDKwsbvFGZENa44jbS74-HQyTXi2dK2SB15E9VJ_goqgTSC77UWwq4Sd4Ps_759nospf2yCL5_PZEn_4jee87Xxv_qxY78cLrtYrsX_KRA3NTsdh6aqFIsDzV50Q5Ltl_JaJnh7FlrBVcuNKcrsQGGQLaQhp1mCLs2XluU64I0zrythSlFexuOlesdnW0rV5/3ul/k0-zpaLSTmm9WqUT20Yk7g/h1/mpa_qGQ76xUT0HPbiM6COw8VKjgFqPR3UB9E1M_gZK4)
---
_Introducing a resolution opposing the GOP tax hike alongside
Reps. Brittany Petterson (CO) and Wiley Nickel (NC)_
---
Here's what I think, Peter: We need to _lower_ costs for the hard-working people of IL-17, including many seniors and parents struggling to make ends meet. We need to _address_ the deep economic inequalities in my district and around the country – not worsen them. With so many Americans struggling with the high costs of housing and everyday goods, **the last thing we need is another “rich-get-richer” tax scheme.** **[If you’re with me, will you sign onto our petition to show your support for lower taxes on the middle class and working families?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmE-UZF0v-hLGyyNHgsAHFoQe_dVa_PTK2XZ8FiN2ahR_Vh9-evYIXlSBaOgi8O2mL0Pvh36bOjf3Jl675NwX0HJDKwsbvFGZENa44jbS74-C4xJT4_iDilUH-a4QEAEcyTkCftAmkmzfDaCAh_8m8rtIzO8D2p6YdEinmnw523NVEWUwxRtC6F3usm_IvPQrLjKp92sZsu16hRK9Nxac4S_I511pSooFSDLyocnRVtcCtMr3vCyT3s9pdrTROcbdE794XK_ntzoee_VLgtlJM_/3ul/k0-zpaLSTmm9WqUT20Yk7g/h2/VqOAxNkoqE0CuGIhS8Hk4nKsCX4fr6HD5McFpZnsMHs)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dominic=20Rapini?=
subject: Not So Sweet 16? Lets Focus On Smart Legislation
body:
The data tells the story | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=7a78549fc6)
---
# From the Desk of Dominic Rapini
|
---
# Legislation must do good, not just feel good?
**Why it matters:**
On the table at the Capital is bill **2023SJ-00035-R00-SB** a proposal to allow for preregistering 16 year olds to vote and automatically make them registered to vote on their 18th birthday. This is an expansion of the law affording 17 year olds the same privilege. While it may seem noble to expand the registration process to the TikTok generation it is based on the premise that today’s youth are not trusted with the traits or responsibility to register to vote on their 18th birthday.
The graph shows that the preregistration of 17 years has been a dismal failure. Presumably Connecticut should should have seen a windfall of youth registrations, when in fact, 2022 showed a poor turnout of 18 year olds who only represented 0.004% of the electorate.
**Considerations:**
Lawmakers have a responsibility to study the data and judge the effectiveness of comparable laws before adding or expanding what is on the books. Instead this proposed bill has no grounding in data or a reasonable prospect of achieving a goal.
The real issue lies in the question that is not being asked; Why are the youth of this state not engaged, not registering to vote and mostly just not voting?
**The Takeaway**
Voter engagement comes from candidates connecting voters to real issues, inspiring voters to step -up and vote, by ensuring that our elections are trusted events where everyones voice is heard. Until we answer these questions let’s forget the bandaids and focus on solving the core issue, voter enthusiasm or lack there of.
**Recap and Principles:**
1) There is no basis for success for bill **2023SJ-00035-R00-SB** 2) Data shows that preregistering 17 years did not impact the youth vote in 20223) Do not expand legislation without clear, achievable goals

# Take Action and email the GAE Chairs your position on the proposed election legistlation
| [Email GAE Chair - Mae Flexer ](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=18546fb3ce&e=8763c56857)

name: Letitia James
subject: Please update your priorities, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---

Peter, in a moment, I’m going to ask you to [**take my March 2023 Priorities Survey**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60383563/396930924/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1013-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzA4YjQwNC1hZmM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CJ6rTf7z810pWZa2_U1CDdpYovWLvlm9Fk76NxYCuyo=&emci=5a22cf2a-1fc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9708b404-afc5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504) – but first, I wanted to explain why I value your opinion so much.

I didn’t grow up with any real power or privilege. While New York’s elites catered directly to the powerful and wealthy, families like my own in Brooklyn were left out of any and all decisions.

So, when this team made history in 2018 by helping me become the first Black lawmaker ever to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed to never let another person feel the same way.

I created my priorities survey to connect with my base and give folks like you a platform to use your voice – **but it looks like you STILL haven’t updated your priorities with my team.**

[**Please, Peter: Will you take my priorities survey now so I can fight for the issues that matter most to you and your loved ones?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60383564/396930925/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1013-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzA4YjQwNC1hZmM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CJ6rTf7z810pWZa2_U1CDdpYovWLvlm9Fk76NxYCuyo=&emci=5a22cf2a-1fc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9708b404-afc5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)
| | **MARCH 2023 PRIORITIES SURVEY**
---
NAME: Peter
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
STATUS: INCOMPLETE
---
_Please record your response before 11:59 p.m. to make your voice heard._
---
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60383565/396930926/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1013-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzA4YjQwNC1hZmM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CJ6rTf7z810pWZa2_U1CDdpYovWLvlm9Fk76NxYCuyo=&emci=5a22cf2a-1fc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9708b404-afc5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)
---
I’ll be honest: Our fight for progress is nowhere near complete. Right now, millions of people are still without reproductive freedom, the housing crisis is continuing to sprawl out of control, and the gun violence epidemic is still claiming innocent lives of all ages.

**With the fundamental rights of millions being attacked from all sides, it is _vital_ that I know what matters most to supporters like you, Peter. That’s why I’m counting on 1,000 fearless fighters to complete my priorities survey so I know which fights are most important to the people I represent in this new political landscape.

[Please, so that I can fight for you, will you take 60 seconds now to share your top priorities with my team before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60383566/396930927/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1013-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzA4YjQwNC1hZmM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CJ6rTf7z810pWZa2_U1CDdpYovWLvlm9Fk76NxYCuyo=&emci=5a22cf2a-1fc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9708b404-afc5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60383567/396930928/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1013-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzA4YjQwNC1hZmM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CJ6rTf7z810pWZa2_U1CDdpYovWLvlm9Fk76NxYCuyo=&emci=5a22cf2a-1fc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9708b404-afc5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)

| Fellow activist, we hate to send emails like this, but the New Pennsylvania Project is facing a **critical fundraising shortfall.**

**So far this year, we’ve raised less than one-sixth as much as we did by this point last year.**

The New Pennsylvania Project is one of the ONLY organizations conducting year-round, consistent voter registration and civic education. Our organizers have been registering voters in the communities we center across PA since January, including in the snow and rain - but we simply cannot keep doing this important work with less than a sixth of the budget. clean_body: It takes resources to expand the electorate. = | Fellow activist, we hate to send emails like this, but the New Pennsylvania Project is facing a critical fundraising shortfall. So far this year, we’ve raised less than one-sixth as much as we did by this point last year. The New Pennsylvania Project is one of the ONLY organizations conducting year-round, consistent voter registration and civic education. Our organizers have been registering voters in the communities we center across PA since January, including in the snow and rain - but we simply cannot keep doing this important work with less than a sixth of the budget. = = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60383759/396931885/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjhlZmQ2Ni1iMGM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GHoO2tJhKGy9kYaR63sn0UiOFL2UGJEYvLQPLFpVaMU=&emci=025f2e12-a6c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=af8efd66-b0c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)

The shortage of affordable housing is nothing short of a crisis. Folks across the Commonwealth and the country are getting squeezed by rising rents and house prices. We need real action to change that.

That’s why Senator Warner has been working in the Senate to help Virginians access affordable housing. He recently secured almost $100 million in investments for affordable housing, community development, and homelessness assistance throughout the Commonwealth.

These are critical investments in affordable housing, but there’s still more to be done and Mark needs your help to drive action in the Senate. **[_Will you join Senator Warner in the fight to address housing supply issues for folks across Virginia? Sign the petition right now >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60383760/396931886/394491951?refcode=mw_em_230318_1&ms=mw_em_230318_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjhlZmQ2Ni1iMGM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GHoO2tJhKGy9kYaR63sn0UiOFL2UGJEYvLQPLFpVaMU=&emci=025f2e12-a6c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=af8efd66-b0c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)**

And he’s going to continue fighting for every single federal dollar available for Virginia to help renters and homeowners alike.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Re: The Women’s Health Protection Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=65%2E35263%2E6MO1XN)
It’s not complicated, Peter. Medical decisions should be made between a patient and their doctor. Full stop. But the attacks on reproductive rights just keep on coming. Right now, a conservative federal judge in Texas is making his decision in a case that would revoke access to medication-based abortions — and the impact could be huge. That’s why I’m fighting my heart out to pass my bill, the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ , to finally protect the right to safe and legal abortions under federal law. I reintroduced the bill last week and am leading the charge to get this critical legislation across the finish line. **Last year, Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans stood in the way of the passage of this bill.** But if McConnell and Trump could eliminate the filibuster to put three Supreme Court justices on the bench, then we should do the same to pass the _WHPA_ and protect reproductive rights for millions of Americans – no matter what conservative judges and far-right legislators decide. [**Every person deserves the right to make their own health care decisions, without interference from anti-choice politicians. If you agree, add your name to my petition calling on the Senate to pass the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ quickly.**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2303_WHPA_Petition/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230318_PM1_V2_S1&t=4&akid=65%2E35263%2E6MO1XN) | [ADD MY NAME](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2303_WHPA_Petition/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230318_PM1_V2_S1&t=5&akid=65%2E35263%2E6MO1XN)
---
Thanks for signing on, Peter. No matter how difficult the battle, I’ll never stop fighting to protect reproductive freedom.
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=65%2E35263%2E6MO1XN) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=65%2E35263%2E6MO1XN)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---

name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS! Chicago mayor’s race breakdown w/ US Rep. Delia Ramirez & CTU President Stacy Davis Gates, Biden’s drilling push, and more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Deep Dive with Delia Ramirez | Chicago Teachers Union Pres.
Stacy Davis Gates on the Big Mayoral Race | Building Local Power in
Lawrence, IN | One Fair Wage Update | NEW! ‘Birdie Sanders’ Sticker | &
MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1011&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ][IMG]

This month marks the 7th anniversary of the famous bird landing on
Bernie's podium — and we're commemorating that moment of hope and joy with
a brand new limited-edition Birdie Sanders sticker!

Get yours today with a one-time donation of $10 (just $5 for members!) or
sign-up for a monthly donation of $5 or more.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8472?t=1012&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ]GET YOUR STICKER

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1013&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ][IMG]

Don’t miss our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8473?t=1014&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ]LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call with US Rep. Jamie
Raskin (MD-18) on Monday, March 27th at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT!

Rep. Raskin will help us mount a defense of the Right to Protest, and
we’ll be joined by Deepa Padmanabha of Greenpeace USA as we ramp up to
stop the Dirty Deal 2.0.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8473?t=1015&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1016&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

US Rep. Delia Ramirez joined us for a powerful conversation [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8474?t=1017&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ]Monday
Night, tracing her journey from the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8475?t=1018&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ]daughter of immigrants to becoming
the first Latina from the Midwest to serve in Congress.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1019&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ][IMG]

Years ago, Delia helped found Our Illinois Revolution. And this year, she
gave the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8476?t=1020&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ]progressive response to Biden’s State of the Union Address,
calling for bold urgent action before 2024.

“We must push back against MAGA but also prove to people that we’ll
actually deliver — that means doing everything in our power with executive
action in this moment,” she said.

“We shouldn’t make an excuse that we’ll get to things when we get a
majority again. Let’s be honest, we had the House and there were things we
just never delivered on,” Delia said. “DACA can’t wait til we get a
majority, rent price-gouging can’t wait, prescription drug prices can’t
wait.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1021&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ][IMG]

Our Revolution is backing Brandon Johnson, a former public school teacher
and union organizer, for Mayor of Chicago.

Like Delia Ramirez [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8475?t=1022&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ]told us Monday, “This is a unique opportunity for
our progressive multicultural coalition to elect one of our own to the
Fifth Floor.”

Brandon’s opponent? Conservative Paul Vallas, who is flush with corporate
cash and calls himself “more of a Republican than a Democrat.”

“This didn’t happen overnight, that all of a sudden Brandon emerged to run
for mayor,” Delia said. “This is years of local grassroots
movement-building, and now we’re in a moment when the soul of a city is on
the line.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1023&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ][IMG]

Chicago Teachers Union President [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8477?t=1024&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ]Stacy Davis Gates laid out the
history leading to this moment where a middle school teacher could defeat
a school privatizer to lead the city.

“It means when you fight you can win,” Stacy told us. “I am so proud of
our movement in Chicago. I am so proud that we have the chance to bring
forth a vision of co-governance.”

“Brandon believes every child deserves a fully-funded school and that
safety begins with investment,” she said. “He believes if we don’t fight
for it and organize for it, we don’t get it. In Chicago, we’re sending our
best to transform this city with us.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1025&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ]Chip in a donation to specifically help fund our work around the
Chicago Mayoral Race — every bit helps!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1026&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ][IMG]

Martin Luther King Jr. said: “If we crack Chicago, we crack the world!” On
April 4, the anniversary of his assassination, voters will decide in
Chicago.

This race will have reverberating impacts, and we can each play a role to
tip the balance. Make calls to mobilize 100,000 Our Revolution supporters
to the polls in Chicago.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8478?t=1027&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ]MAKE CALLS FOR BRANDON

★ ★ ★

ST. LOUIS SLATE ADVANCES!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1028&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ][IMG]

Nearly our entire progressive slate in slate advanced to the general
election, including Mayor Tashaura Jones, Board President, and former
Bernie delegate Megan Green — and 9 of our 10 ward candidates!

Our Revolution has been working for multiple election cycles in St. Louis
and now we’re looking to strengthen our progressive majority, which passed
a Basic Income trial in the city this year.

Our team is making 150,000 voter contacts in the city ahead of the April
4th election, and we’re hearing a lot of excitement on the ground around
our slate! Early voting starts this Tuesday.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8364?t=1029&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ]PHONEBANK FOR ST. LOUIS!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1030&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ][IMG]

Building local power is critical, and Our Revolution is proud to endorse
Shawn Denney for mayor of Lawrence, Indiana — a 50,000-person city next
door to Indianapolis.

Shawn is a former teacher, school board member, and Bernie Sanders
supporter, and he is the leading voice on the Lawrence City Council right
now.

Shawn is also working with a diverse and progressive slate of candidates
that are running for city council — and this is a winnable race against a
Republican extremist who hangs out with Mike Pence.

“We are staying focused on the people that live in our community,” Shawn
told us Monday night. “We passed a $15 minimum wage for city employees,
and this past year, we helped 500 families facing evictions stay in their
homes.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1031&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ][IMG]

Power is up for grabs in major cities across the country, and we’ll be
working to elect progressives in St. Louis, NYC, Philly, Nashville,
Dallas, and more.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8223?t=1032&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1033&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1034&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ][IMG]

It’s been a busy couple of weeks in our campaign with One Fair Wage to
raise wages state by state — and not leave tipped workers behind!

Our organizers and worker activists in NY, MD, CT, and IL, have been busy
rallying and lobbying lawmakers to make sure workers are paid a living
wage with tips on top!

The federal tipped minimum wage has been $2.13 for 32 years because of
corporate lobbying by groups like the National Restaurant Association.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1035&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ][IMG]

Last week, Our Revolution joined US Reps. Ro Khanna, Jan Schakowsky,
Debbie Dingell, and other progressive leaders in DC for a press event
calling out the National Restaurant Association.

Sens. Bernie Sanders, Jeff Merkley, Elizabeth Warren and others have also
stood with us demanding answers from the ‘Other NRA,’ which spent $25M in
workers’ food safety dues to lobby against wage increases.

That’s why we’re calling on all elected officials to reject dirty money
from the restaurant lobby.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1036&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ][IMG]

Call your Reps and demand they join Ro Khanna, Greg Casar, and the many
others who have already signed the pledge to reject NRA money.

Thanks to lobbying, the federal minimum wage has been stuck at $7.25/hr
for 14 years, and the federal tipped wage sits at just $2.13/hr since
1991!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8247?t=1037&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ]CALL YOUR REP!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1038&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ][IMG]

Our Revolution and our coalition will rally on Wednesday for worker
meetings with legislators in Lansing, Michigan to raise the state minimum
wage and abolish the subminimum wage.

We'll be urging key legislators to take the pledge to reject campaign
contributions from the Michigan Restaurant Lobby or National Restaurant
Association — and engage in some hands-on activities.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8455?t=1039&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ]COME OUT IN MICHIGAN

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1040&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ][IMG]

Despite climate promises, the Biden Administration, unfortunately, doubled
down on dirty energy this week and approved the Willow Project for more
drilling in the fragile ecosystem of Alaska.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8479?t=1041&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ]TAG24 featured our call on all Democrats to represent the young voters
who delivered Biden’s victory and held off a red wave in the Midterms.

Now, they hope to resurrect Manchin’s Dirty Deal and fast-track fossil
fuel permitting. With your help, we defeated the Dirty Deal three times
last year and we can do it again.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8473?t=1042&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ]For more info, RSVP to join Our Revolution’s next National Organizing
Call with Greenpeace USA and US Rep. Jamie Raskin on Monday, March 27th!

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1043&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ][IMG]

LOCAL VICTORY! This week, Our Revolution New Jersey celebrated the passage
of another local resolution for Medicare For All — the 16th in the state
and 100+ nationwide!

Our activists were welcomed at the council hearing by Neptune Township
Mayor Keith Cafferty, who spoke out against medical debt and financial
barriers to health care as a human right.

“Medicare for All is a serious solution for an armada of serious
problems,” he said. “I’m proud that our Township Committee is joining the
effort to make it law.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1044&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ][IMG]

Our Revolution Harris County helped organize the Texas Grassroots Alliance
Summit this month, with 300+ groups coming together to lay the foundation
for 2025 legislative elections to reclaim Texas for Texans!

ORHC is led by LaTonya Whittington, founder of Cannabis Reform of Houston,
who built a team of volunteer phone bankers to mobilize Our Revolution
members to join the summit.

Folks also took a bus ride to Austin, TX to meet and organize with
progressive legislators like State Rep. Ron Reynolds.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1045&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ][IMG]

Join Our Revolution Ohio for a statewide meeting Wednesday with Protect
Choice Ohio Field Director Destinee Burse on how we can help pass an
abortion rights amendment in the state.

This week, the abortion rights amendment filed by Protect Choice Ohio was
certified by the Ohio Ballot Board! Now, our reproductive justice
coalition is gearing up to gather 40k signatures to get it on the ballot
by July 4th.

Also on the call, hear from Tara Mosley on her run for Akron Mayor and
Adrienne Hood for Columbus City Council, and learn about Shaker Heights
initiative for Fair Ticketing.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8454?t=1046&akid=4132%2E5885482%2EjC8bzv ]RSVP FOR OHIO CALL

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Delia Ramirez joined us for a powerful conversation [ ]Monday Night, tracing her journey from the [ ]daughter of immigrants to becoming the first Latina from the Midwest to serve in Congress. [ ][IMG] Years ago, Delia helped found Our Illinois Revolution. And this year, she gave the [ ]progressive response to Biden’s State of the Union Address, calling for bold urgent action before 2024. “We must push back against MAGA but also prove to people that we’ll actually deliver — that means doing everything in our power with executive action in this moment,” she said. “We shouldn’t make an excuse that we’ll get to things when we get a majority again. Let’s be honest, we had the House and there were things we just never delivered on,” Delia said. “DACA can’t wait til we get a majority, rent price-gouging can’t wait, prescription drug prices can’t wait.” ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution is backing Brandon Johnson, a former public school teacher and union organizer, for Mayor of Chicago. Our Revolution has been working for multiple election cycles in St. Louis and now we’re looking to strengthen our progressive majority, which passed a Basic Income trial in the city this year. Our team is making 150,000 voter contacts in the city ahead of the April 4th election, and we’re hearing a lot of excitement on the ground around our slate! Early voting starts this Tuesday. [ ]PHONEBANK FOR ST. LOUIS! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Building local power is critical, and Our Revolution is proud to endorse Shawn Denney for mayor of Lawrence, Indiana — a 50,000-person city next door to Indianapolis. Shawn is a former teacher, school board member, and Bernie Sanders supporter, and he is the leading voice on the Lawrence City Council right now. Shawn is also working with a diverse and progressive slate of candidates that are running for city council — and this is a winnable race against a Republican extremist who hangs out with Mike Pence. “We are staying focused on the people that live in our community,” Shawn told us Monday night. “We passed a $15 minimum wage for city employees, and this past year, we helped 500 families facing evictions stay in their homes.” ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Power is up for grabs in major cities across the country, and we’ll be working to elect progressives in St. Louis, NYC, Philly, Nashville, Dallas, and more. subject: Their attacks will NEVER intimidate me

body:
Their attacks will NEVER intimidate me
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kE-PgjAQxT9NuUFg-ody4LAu8WKy8bZmL6a2g9bQglA0-um3EHeTZg6_mXnT97AuRFkVIlZITA1agtaJrSEHmtNCFiVjQDPkXOaGVZxXKGShCMsf1mem96oz1zDObsh075JLjZRpzkTcFqeWFy2cQLaFqUSbM0bZKenqSwjDROgHgW18E-p5xCzKjWgWkYWpO6bK4Wi1Sq-99SFtZ29GZSfrz2kccjYExDjqdYeF5vpUGdNyo1EyQrdzcEeHxs6O0Aadsh0BscCpn0eNEWp7VG-mlRuUPftI_2z_dXof0IfYkCwvIzz6zppl2z1f_IWS3lZ4sSYaakY87MNelIdkrM3wsF1nJ1HGrM7LD9aA4qnOts-alBsCsO4BrFnAjm0OX2L3vWvSn1t-TxvB2WPpwmes4Tng_-hbJXs7A1I2v_7FjcI)
---
Friend,
Our enemies are hoping to intimidate me with their latest set of witch hunts.
They think they can deal a final blow to our movement – and that I’ll walk away from our fight to save our country.
But here’s my message for them – **I WILL NEVER SURRENDER.**

body:
This month, Georgia lawmakers considered new legislation that could end runoff elections in the state. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60384459/396934609/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230318_e_runoff_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ffa_20230318_e_runoff_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmE2MWZlZS1iNGM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bzru6Wmxil-fiq3OF1gXK0-BhYPTkXqs7Dl8aHIhsc4=&emci=f1a61fee-b4c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f2a61fee-b4c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1037277)

| | This month, Georgia lawmakers considered new legislation that could affect the future of runoff elections in the state. Since the 1960s, Georgia’s majority voting law has required that a candidate get more than 50 percent of the vote in order to be declared the winner, even if there is a clear winner. This makes it more difficult for any minority group in the population to elect leaders who represent them — disproportionately affecting Black and brown voters. In the past two elections alone the entire country has collectively watched two runoff elections in the Peach State determine the future of Congress. **This runoff rule is a relic of the Jim Crow-era and exists to uphold white supremacy — and ending it will help ensure that the will of majority voters is upheld.** [_**W**_ _****__**e want to know that there is strong support across the country for ending runoffs in Georgia. Please add your name if you agree that Georgia lawmakers should eliminate this racist voting practice.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60384460/396934610/1560629066?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230318_e_runoff_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ffa_20230318_e_runoff_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmE2MWZlZS1iNGM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bzru6Wmxil-fiq3OF1gXK0-BhYPTkXqs7Dl8aHIhsc4=&emci=f1a61fee-b4c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f2a61fee-b4c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1037277) | [SIGN YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60384461/396934611/1560629066?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230318_e_runoff_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ffa_20230318_e_runoff_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmE2MWZlZS1iNGM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bzru6Wmxil-fiq3OF1gXK0-BhYPTkXqs7Dl8aHIhsc4=&emci=f1a61fee-b4c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f2a61fee-b4c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1037277)

Runoffs are a form of racist voter suppression — period.
The former Georgia representative who first introduced the idea of runoff elections said it himself: “I was a segregationist...if you want to establish if I was racially prejudiced, I was. If you want to establish that some of my political activity was racially motivated, it was.”
That’s why now that the Georgia legislature has discussed reversing this racist form of voter suppression, Fair Fight Action is ready to pressure lawmakers to revisit these bills in the future.
[_**Please sign your name if you agree that the state of Georgia should listen to the majority of voters and end the racist runoff election process.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60384462/396934612/1560629066?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230318_e_runoff_v1s3&ms=bsc_emm_ffa_20230318_e_runoff_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMmE2MWZlZS1iNGM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bzru6Wmxil-fiq3OF1gXK0-BhYPTkXqs7Dl8aHIhsc4=&emci=f1a61fee-b4c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=f2a61fee-b4c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1037277)

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Defining “grassroots”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
More than a buzzword for our campaign
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=19604%2E3422442%2EAZnsbB)
Derek,
You’ve heard us say it again and again: this is a grassroots powered campaign. Here’s what that really means:
* Katie doesn’t take any money from federal lobbyists.
* We don’t take contributions from Big Banks, Big Oil, or Big Pharma CEOs.
* Not a dime from corporate PACs—ever.
* Our average contribution is less than $30.

**Katie’s the only Democrat in this race who can say all of these things,** and we’re proud of it. Our first federal deadline of this campaign is coming up at the end of this month. **[Can you chip in today to help us send Katie Porter to the Senate?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230318-1?refcode=em20230318-1&refcode2=19604_3422442_AZnsbB&akid=19604%2E3422442%2EAZnsbB)**
**[Donate $5 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230318-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF18_1_GRA_20230318_V1_F&refcode2=19604_3422442_AZnsbB&akid=19604%2E3422442%2EAZnsbB)**
Thanks for being on Team Porter,

body:
Florida Republicans are only getting more and more extreme. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60384653/396935375/877750209?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTg1MDNmYy1iNWM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vjpPTNl-8mKnY0MigK0zbNZOCNemp1aXEQownlnGWYU=)
Folks — 🚨Florida Republicans are once again attacking the LGBTQ+ Community.🚨 Their new bill will prohibit public school teachers from referring to a student by their pronouns if they do not correspond to that person's sex. We’re calling this bill _"Don't Say They."_ Needless to say, it is a **disgusting example of GOP bigotry on full display and another senseless attack on transgender and gender-nonconforming youth.** House Bill 1223 is a continuation of the _Parental Rights in Education_ bill, or the "Don't Say Gay" bill, that was passed in 2022. “Don’t Say Gay” prohibited teaching and discussions of gender identity and sexuality in grades K-3. **This bill is even more extreme, raising that limit to 8th grade.** **Students in the LGBTQIA+ community are already at increased risk of bullying, physical assault, and homelessness. The potential for harm here cannot be overstated, team. We must stop this bill in its tracks and put an end to this disturbing trend of anti-LGBTQ+ bills.[Can you rush a contribution today so we can continue fighting for dignity and equality for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60384654/396935376/1997768663?refcode=E20618-20230318-FLBill-SL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTg1MDNmYy1iNWM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vjpPTNl-8mKnY0MigK0zbNZOCNemp1aXEQownlnGWYU=)** | [STAND WITH LGBTQIA+ STUDENTS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60384655/396935377/1997768663?refcode=E20618-20230318-FLBill-SB-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTg1MDNmYy1iNWM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vjpPTNl-8mKnY0MigK0zbNZOCNemp1aXEQownlnGWYU=)
---
This is yet another case of conservatives manufacturing subjects for outrage in the invented “culture wars” taking place both in and out of schools across the country. From banning books to critical race theory, conservatives are undermining American education at every turn. **Enough is enough.**
**[We stand with LGBTQIA+ students and their teachers, and we must use our voices to stand up to all forms of bigotry.
