name: Matthew Davis, LCV
subject: I testified before the EPA about clean air protections
body:
Environmental justice and healthy lungs, for everyone. |
---

** **
|
Peter -- right now, LCV is in the middle of an all-out campaign to clean up the air we breathe. _63 million people in America_ are currently exposed to unhealthy spikes of daily soot air pollution, and more than _20 million people_ experience dangerous soot pollution year-round.

As part of that campaign, LCV members have been flooding the EPA with comments -- more than **41,000 of them so far**! -- demanding stronger air quality standards.

To help bring the point home, I recently testified before the EPA. **This is long -- and more scientific detail than we usually share -- but I wanted to give you all the background on this issue because this is a situation where the science really matters:**
_Hello, my name is Matthew Davis, and I am currently Senior Director of Government Affairs for the League of Conservation Voters, or LCV, and formerly was a health scientist in the EPA 's Office of Children's Health Protection where I worked on a previous review of this particulate matter standard.

On behalf of LCV's more than half a million members, its Latinx community organizing project, Chispa, and network of 33 state partner organizations across the country, I urge EPA Administrator Regan to protect public health with an adequate margin of safety in the final rule -- decreasing the allowable level of toxic soot in the air to 8ug/m3 annually and 25ug/m3 daily.

Particularly for those disproportionately exposed nearest to polluting industries and busy roadways in communities of color and low income communities, sensitive groups such as those with asthma and heart disease, and vulnerable lifestages such as babies to be, children, and older adults,**it is critical that EPA tighten both the annual and daily limit to the lowest level that scientific experts and advisors have recommended.**

Families around the country are depending on the EPA to help them achieve a very basic and important goal - allowing their children to grow up as healthy as possible and not be limited by disease or ill health.

As a parent, I understand that feeling, as I'm sure Administrator Regan does too - my son Jasper is the same age as his son Matthew. I'm fortunate to be able to afford living where there isn't a lot of diesel or industrial pollution and most folks do not heat their homes primarily with old inefficient wood stoves.

**The good news for everyone is that cleaner air is achievable and it is associated with improved health in kids ' growing and developing lungs.** There is strong scientific evidence that improvements in air quality result in significant population - level improvements in lung capacity and health in school-aged children. Studies from researchers at the University of Southern California found that reductions in particulate and other air pollution meant kids in school had healthier, more robust lungs - improvements that will help them throughout childhood and adulthood, allowing those younger cohorts the opportunity to lead more active, healthier lives than their older siblings.

The 2019 Integrated Science Assessment found evidence that children and communities of color were at elevated risk of negative health effects due to increased exposure to soot pollution. Studies have also shown that toxic soot pollution even harms babies before they are born and the mothers gestating them, leading to increased risk of preterm birth, low birth weight, and other potentially health-harming pregnancy outcomes.

Here too we see big, unfair disproportionate harm to Black mothers and their babies, who also have disproportionately high exposures to particle pollution across a variety of locations, both rural and urban.

Strengthening these soot standards to the lowest levels recommended by the outside scientific experts, as EPA's Children's Health Protection Advisory Committee has previously recommended, would help President Biden and Administrator Regan to deliver on their commitments to advance environmental justice and healthy lungs for everyone._
Peter -- the truth is, the EPA needs to hear from all of us right now. If you haven't sent a message yet, please: [add your name and urge the EPA to enact the strongest possible standards to limit soot pollution and protect public health.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

Thanks for taking the time today, Peter -- and for standing with us.

Onward,

Matthew Davis
Senior Director of Government Affairs
League of Conservation Voters |

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9307611&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcwMDQ1OTM5NwS2&spReportId=MTcwMDQ1OTM5NwS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9307611&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcwMDQ1OTM5NwS2&spReportId=MTcwMDQ1OTM5NwS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.) |

name: American Briefing
subject: Ego And Greed
body:

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Dems created the blacklist just for us 👀
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, do you know
the story of the DCCC blacklist?

In 2018, AOC defeated the 4th most powerful Democrat in the House.
Corporate Democrats were reeling.

The DCCC went to extreme lengths to stop progressives like AOC from ever
winning again. The DCCC blacklisted any vendors, staffers, and
organizations that supported primary challengers to Democratic incumbents,
to weaken our movement.

The DCCC wanted to block working-class progressives like AOC from critical
campaign resources. Of course, they had no issue using corporate firms
that bust unions, work with Big Oil, and even lobby for the GOP’s
right-wing agenda.

It’s not right,
Peter. The DCCC ended the
blacklist after it became a PR nightmare, but they laid the groundwork for
groups like AIPAC and the Moderate PAC that want to take down our
candidates.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131600?refcode=em20230318-28045&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=28045%2E1203867%2E_CW6z- ]In order to change the Democratic Party, we have to weather their
ongoing attacks and get our candidates elected. Can you chip in
$3 so we can fight the status quo, overcome the odds, and
expand the Squad?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131600?refcode=em20230318-28045&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=28045%2E1203867%2E_CW6z- ]Contribute $3

We’re not like the DCCC.

1. We don’t take a cent from corporate PACs. Our candidates' and our own
work are 100% grassroots-funded.
2. We don’t work with “Democratic” firms associated with union busting,
corporate America, or the GOP.
3. Our strategy pays off — we have elected Justice Democrats and grown
the Squad every cycle, while the last Chair of the DCCC lost the seat
to a Republican.

Corporate Democrats take money from Wall Street, Big Oil, Big Pharma,
payday loan companies, and union-busters. It’s clear: Justice Democrats
will fight for the people, the Democratic establishment will work for
their corporate donors.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131600?refcode=em20230318-28045&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=28045%2E1203867%2E_CW6z- ]Peter,
we’re determined to keep winning against
the Democratic establishment and its Wall Street-backed candidates. Will
you chip in to help power our work so we can elect more Justice Democrats?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230318-28045-footer&t=1022&refcode2=28045_1203867__CW6z-&akid=28045%2E1203867%2E_CW6z-

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=28045%2E1203867%2E_CW6z-

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com

Knoxville, TN 37932

body:

| |
---
|
---
---
| | [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652405%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uTNu%2f4PbnXMHylQ%2bIEMByQ&sysid=1)
---
| [ Drew Barrymore KNEELS To Transgender Activist Dylan Mulvaney ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652408%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tvcNEg1DZGcNRPYZNOuV9Q&sysid=1)
---
[ During a recent episode of her talk show, actress Drew Barrymore knelt down in front of transgender male-to-female activist Dylan Mulvaney. Mulvaney appeared on the show to discuss their popular TikTok series “Days of Girlhood,” which documented his transition process day by day. name: Urgent Message (Via DLCC)
subject: Michelle and Barack Obama are calling on you
body:
Michelle and Barack Obama know the critical importance of coming together to create change – now they’re calling on you | | |
---
| | **The GOP has spent decades building state power, gerrymandering districts, and propelling their anti-American agenda across the country. From gutting abortion access to infringing on LGBTQ+ rights, state Republicans have become a one-stop shop for advancing the far-right agenda in state after state.** But state Democrats are right on their heels. They’re doing everything in their power to ensure these extremist policies don’t come to fruition. Even the Obamas have sounded the alarm: [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrq1lFR55S3_Ci6S1MgB3mG0Qg8yugJl403qXkT7H5yoCUfQUeopO57h8uppZfr07zo2avPAy8BDKUXsfddcSj-FIqrznkOULkFix33-yPYF6ldotZuQXgRwj4HnplouGsuw96dr1Ewd7im3UeONaLs5AQJXMjIguJvfOeMu73JIyJH8lhfkzECZ1fE91-ZouLN2_nQjceo1HL8Aqhv6gXey2hA4YbOGSvwjOZmA-2to29jLXrpMDRO5w9kABbBw7gWDTvItxkoom5raD3jafeVO2jbFCwOu79avqNOjvFZHiBQmi54YCw8PmiYjTELsNZrHbW89poeMGXeohnGxsm9-PIC44LCxpOE1AvgVG5gQ_vcT1LBPMoyXHtcsL4uNfJsL7yyixaWqg4igJNBJPFHICPBg6xnfyQweHHoM4GVwkdVxU5-WqIYLonqkVTZppRgzI8oh2QT_Y_6I9MZa7ivJ7i8xplQBmPSTRvekP1Kd-ZBDVtj1cTew_cTZi-hHUafg2LIvEaPSDL5V8r0ehU0A/3ul/i5V5Ka66Tt2zxJkzXBUd2Q/h0/ZzYmo2k-spq5yWEesRzQ6796rZ-Jc0RaWVmdmihb4es) Former President Barack Obama and former First Lady Michelle Obama know just how critical coming together right now to rally behind Democrats is. That’s why they’re calling on members of this community – yes, you! – to help fight Republican extremism across the country. clean_body: Michelle and Barack Obama know the critical importance of coming together to create change – now they’re calling on you | | | | | The GOP has spent decades building state power, gerrymandering districts, and propelling their anti-American agenda across the country. From gutting abortion access to infringing on LGBTQ+ rights, state Republicans have become a one-stop shop for advancing the far-right agenda in state after state. But state Democrats are right on their heels. They’re doing everything in their power to ensure these extremist policies don’t come to fruition. Even the Obamas have sounded the alarm: Former President Barack Obama and former First Lady Michelle Obama know just how critical coming together right now to rally behind Democrats is. That’s why they’re calling on members of this community – yes, you! – to help fight Republican extremism across the country. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | GOP lawmakers have already started to propose dangerous legislation like: The death penalty for women who have abortions Infringing on LGBTQ+ rights Enacting execution by firing squad And so much more! We can’t afford to have anyone sit on the sidelines if we want to expand Democratic power.** Thank you, DLCC Team | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. name: Andy Beshear
subject: We want to put our best foot forward
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
March 31st is the first quarterly reporting deadline of 2023. Peter,

We're quickly approaching our first quarterly reporting deadline of the election year. Soon, the fundraising reports for every campaign in this race for Kentucky governor will be published and available to the public.

My opponents will be looking at our numbers for any sign of weakness. We need to put our best foot forward and show them that this campaign has the support of Kentuckians across the Commonwealth who are ready to protect the progress we've made.

[**As we near our first quarterly filing deadline of 2023, let's show my opponents what a strong grassroots campaign can do. Please, donate any amount you can today. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60386707/396945543/1737192232?refcode=em23_230318_mm3_fndd_gq_nopn___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230318_mm3_fndd_gq_nopn___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=25c35f76-c7c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWMzNWY3Ni1jN2M1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6xw21CEXgwrD503ivjGXwhcS2qO5EC4OesExqkCdzFQ=)

Peter, our economy is strong. Every year, we're creating more and more jobs and opportunities here at home. My administration is showing that real leadership means working together, across party lines, to make life better for millions of Kentuckians.

We've made great progress over the last three years, and I'm ready to continue fighting for Kentucky’s future. But winning this race won't be easy. I have 12 Republican opponents, and outside spending has already begun to flood the Commonwealth. I'm hoping I can count on your support to finish the first quarter of this election year strong and ensure we have the resources to protect Kentucky's progress.

[**Will you contribute to my re-election campaign before our first filing deadline of 2023? I need your help to ensure I have the resources to compete with my 12 opponents so we can continue moving Kentucky forward together. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60386709/396945572/1737192232?refcode=em23_230318_mm3_fndd_gq_nopn___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230318_mm3_fndd_gq_nopn___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=25c35f76-c7c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWMzNWY3Ni1jN2M1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6xw21CEXgwrD503ivjGXwhcS2qO5EC4OesExqkCdzFQ=)

Thank you,

Andy | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign?** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60386711/396945574/1737192232?refcode=em23_230318_mm3_fndd_gq_nopn___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230318_mm3_fndd_gq_nopn___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=25c35f76-c7c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWMzNWY3Ni1jN2M1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6xw21CEXgwrD503ivjGXwhcS2qO5EC4OesExqkCdzFQ=)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Bad news for Republicans:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1962%2E5257348%2EOUJb-E ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hey Derek,

In a moment, I’m going to [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230318_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=1962%2E5257348%2EOUJb-E ]ask you to make a small donation ahead of our
FEC deadline. But first, I wanted to explain why your gift is so important
– especially right now.

I announced my campaign for U.S. Senate a little more than a month ago.
From the moment I jumped into the race, Republicans piled on.

It actually started the night right before I announced my campaign. In one
of Kevin McCarthy’s first acts as Speaker, he unilaterally removed me from
serving on the House Intelligence Committee.

Then it was Matt Gaetz. He introduced legislation trying to bar me from
accessing classified information.

Then came Tucker Carlson. He recently launched into a desperate rant about
me on his primetime Fox News show. At this point, he attacks me about once
a week on the air.

Then Donald Trump piled on too. He couldn’t resist. He dedicated part of
his CPAC speech to hurl insult after insult against me.

And I’m going to be honest, I don’t even send you the really crazy stuff.

It’s just the beginning. After every one of their attacks, I then receive
thousands more like it online from their MAGA loyalists trying to sabotage
our work to defend democracy.

Republicans see me as their boogeyman this election. Why? Because I’ve
stood up to these bullies and called out their lies.

It’s clear they don’t want me in the Senate. They don’t want oversight.
They don’t want me to hold them accountable. They don’t want an outspoken
defender of democracy on the Senate floor.

Bad news for Republicans: I’ve never been one to give up a fight —
especially when it gets tough. I’m not going to let Donald Trump or any
one of his lackeys tear our campaign down.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=mar2023_abs_em.dt2mVY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230318_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=1962%2E5257348%2EOUJb-E ]Derek, I need to know you have my back the entire way. Will
you pitch in a donation of $3 or more before our FEC deadline? The attacks
are only going to get nastier from here, so we need to prepare for
everything they’re going to launch our way:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=mar2023_abs_em.DC74Jc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230318_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=1962%2E5257348%2EOUJb-E ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=mar2023_abs_em.dZVEvl&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230318_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=1962%2E5257348%2EOUJb-E ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=mar2023_abs_em.7h-CrL&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230318_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=1962%2E5257348%2EOUJb-E ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=mar2023_abs_em.o650ZW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230318_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=1962%2E5257348%2EOUJb-E ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=mar2023_abs_em.5OS6KE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230318_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=1962%2E5257348%2EOUJb-E ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230318_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=1962%2E5257348%2EOUJb-E ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you for your support,

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230318_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=1962%2E5257348%2EOUJb-E ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: 1 in 5 transgender kids
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
I want to take a moment to speak about something incredibly close to my heart, something incredibly **_important_**. So here’s the deal: House Republicans are trying to pass a bill that will **_ban all trans women and girls_** from playing on sports teams that align with their gender. Get this: they say it’s about “defending women.”
I don’t understand why Republican legislators are so fixated on making life harder for already vulnerable children who are just trying to live their lives. Trans kids are **_kids_** — and dangerous rhetoric from the GOP quite literally endangers them.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/40893?refcode=em20230318-2285&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2285%2E420207%2EM0ARRz)
---
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/40893?refcode=em20230318-2285&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2285%2E420207%2EM0ARRz)**
So when this bill came before me, I proposed a very straightforward change — that we rename the amendment the **“Stigmatizing Vulnerable Children Act.”** Because that’s what they’re trying to do here.
[**I will NOT stop fighting to protect the fundamental human rights of every trans kid, athlete, and person in our country. Together, we can fight the GOP’s agenda AND fight for a better vision. Will you donate to help power our work today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/40893?refcode=em20230318-2285&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2285%2E420207%2EM0ARRz)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/40893?refcode=em20230318-2285&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2285%2E420207%2EM0ARRz)**
The GOP’s not-so-subtle attacks on children are insulting to me as a legislator and a mother. I am the proud mom of a trans kid and it hurts me **_every single day_** to watch these attacks on trans youth who are simply trying to make it through life.
When my daughter came out, I supported her completely. But not every child has that experience. **_1 in 5_** trans kids seriously considers suicide before the age of 18. Trans children experience mental illnesses like depression and anxiety at elevated rates. One of the interventions that can make a difference to trans childrens’ mental health is access to gender-affirming medical care — also under attack from the GOP.
It should not be the case that trans kids have to grow up while politicians condemn them from positions of power for having the audacity to exist. It is **_shameful._** And I will not allow it to stand — not now, not ever.
**Peter, it’s important that we stand together in our fights for justice.** That’s my job as a legislator, as a mom, and as a committed member of our powerful progressive movement. [**This is a defining issue of our time — and I need your help to keep fighting for what’s right. Will you chip in $3 toward our work today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/40893?refcode=em20230318-2285&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2285%2E420207%2EM0ARRz)
In solidarity,
Pramila

clean_body: Peter, I want to take a moment to speak about something incredibly close to my heart, something incredibly important. So here’s the deal: House Republicans are trying to pass a bill that will ban all trans women and girls from playing on sports teams that align with their gender. Get this: they say it’s about “defending women.” I don’t understand why Republican legislators are so fixated on making life harder for already vulnerable children who are just trying to live their lives. Trans kids are kids — and dangerous rhetoric from the GOP quite literally endangers them. So when this bill came before me, I proposed a very straightforward change — that we rename the amendment the “Stigmatizing Vulnerable Children Act.” Because that’s what they’re trying to do here. The GOP’s not-so-subtle attacks on children are insulting to me as a legislator and a mother. I am the proud mom of a trans kid and it hurts me every single day to watch these attacks on trans youth who are simply trying to make it through life. When my daughter came out, I supported her completely. But not every child has that experience. 1 in 5 trans kids seriously considers suicide before the age of 18. Trans children experience mental illnesses like depression and anxiety at elevated rates. One of the interventions that can make a difference to trans childrens’ mental health is access to gender-affirming medical care — also under attack from the GOP. It should not be the case that trans kids have to grow up while politicians condemn them from positions of power for having the audacity to exist. It is shameful. And I will not allow it to stand — not now, not ever. Peter, it’s important that we stand together in our fights for justice. That’s my job as a legislator, as a mom, and as a committed member of our powerful progressive movement. In solidarity, Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

| | | FIRST: The Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ on June 24th, 2022, taking away the Federal Constitutional Right to Abortion

THEN: States across the country passed restrictive Abortion bans, further limiting the access to abortion of women across the country, especially those in Republican controlled states

NOW: Anti-Abortion activists have brought a legal case against one of the drugs involved in a medical abortion, Mifepristone, to try and get the drug pulled from the shelves across the country.

Peter, it doesn’t matter if you live in a red state or a blue state. If the judge in this federal court in Texas rules to pull mifepristone from shelves, **it will impact your ability to obtain a medication abortion in _EVERY_ state in the country.**

[These attacks cannot go unanswered, Peter. Add your name to our petition today and stand up for the rights of women across the country.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnTd1PuNp4lpsS3xfGoIbNTs8Pq4FWxS4gjZJ1zMzvUNg5DUthX-hCJXEVBPC3VMGHJmuGhC93T4TYG_3R9h-Y779pibA9_LZeqpaAuppfEF3S8p9XccdjwXpl3aGbifpeofy3sxGd-tPpPKniTb3Xqm7rcXro4TcUrt2TyajljmQOPMg0xmyGbsng1lbFZXR2AC21mUr4kKOGVwuSCCn68jF7aJmM9GB-_sXvKKBg8tV6I3Jhgyu7MUjvB64Ai1t1de6kf74CC8HgzhW8KEkYSHnG4I6zGxln7tCqfKUsrRZFMoUZoqoN3nTRG3Rd7MBpwn1ZKJPb9VwhnNyprfcz7_ZpFGe7eqUuaWbsrWuuooQ/3ul/3Je3oCFKRrGD9FpIwTJNKQ/h1/1bvlpsNzeWrRbmbEaWz9J07_UAtZ38gkriyHQRl2ejk)

| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnTd1PuNp4lpsS3xfGoIbNTs8Pq4FWxS4gjZJ1zMzvUNg5DUthX-hCJXEVBPC3VMGHJmuGhC93T4TYG_3R9h-Y779pibA9_LZeqpaAuppfEF3S8p9XccdjwXpl3aGbifpeofy3sxGd-tPpPKniTb3Xqm7rcXro4TcUrt2TyajljmZfvm4PcozJ7WpQKW71T-AsNndwG0bgEU4-sQqBcdWxeyXFJd5_bV8wkWLuSnurWVSb3tRDv8FF44rfEf50A9vZYn-f1owhjXoeGy0OONPNnypw19pwBOejPe3RdEQcgpfEBEI27XfS2d-f3kGcSi3yi2xJ0MZbXoJfqVeynXjbTtJZvkI45SbAO2qRQDozvpw/3ul/3Je3oCFKRrGD9FpIwTJNKQ/h2/nMW4waWS8uYy2ymluCh79PA68zqrpjaYYlt-snBYHtU)
---
Attacks on abortion like these are not popular, Peter. We’ve seen that in special elections across the country and in the results of the 2022 midterms.

This is about right-wing extremists trying to take away YOUR rights. Your right to make your own medical decisions. Your right to control your future. Your right to have access to life-saving healthcare!

[Will you add your name to our petition and stand up for your rights?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnTd1PuNp4lpsS3xfGoIbNTs8Pq4FWxS4gjZJ1zMzvUNg5DUthX-hCJXEVBPC3VMGHJmuGhC93T4TYG_3R9h-Y779pibA9_LZeqpaAuppfEF3S8p9XccdjwXpl3aGbifpeofy3sxGd-tPpPKniTb3Xqm7rcXro4TcUrt2Tyajljmc955GXFQVOE2EONGz3As29_LVr6uhe45_ssKw2rusX_qRCIRVbV9pNWjcmjYpmiwaIDQ9ilIZeMqIbMKUd3KcHcWeRzZnCiD736oNO7B7RSa4V6Mz6KO17jKosllfhrlYuAbJ1bOcY7z8bjhr8Q7BL4JZWF7-zdnknP2IgdTOKff4QGEMQT6E6ffo0bep4VnQ/3ul/3Je3oCFKRrGD9FpIwTJNKQ/h3/U6LE8ZdQibUQQ2hNhGHyNslB2hRVu83e-ovWukYCyyI)

The Collective PAC

* * *

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5O3Wwmdygae0W-34efSvb_hfX51xtIkq_nCgr0tl8iRqUTOndcJRC4vm20WcsKLj2DwzPvAnSN52QJSCM2wlB9qDuiAzDTT_z6aXu--DoVgL5bI-OJYxNV970uD5an0wkNJNSciicallED97-xPU2ExySFKM5RfmkvROmssPIegeABJDfQqtbrghI6t_jSpRsNQR_yKF6Gj4UB9UHqiiRKbgfjzAhFYVfjzW5IUvwtJ6FM-aCjPEp-JGEMmZy06Z5eItgp6E62u5F7rFIjzSeVVieDD_9wYV2alX5_i0y9nn17P9TD_e8zC7fK3oKSc7-mkOoVN1tPwTpiSyhdFfqG7xQYdvZCYZaSPyrt3e6ghauTHnbLOowJCshvl40sdZ5o5-QPuJ0GwlqklwFFu8veGojKfr8Tomo2XsxxIO3HA/3ul/3Je3oCFKRrGD9FpIwTJNKQ/h5/_KGiTTHId-sCMtATHyvjmalcZrKx6kQqlUP3onTpHos) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | FIRST: The Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade on June 24th, 2022, taking away the Federal Constitutional Right to Abortion THEN: States across the country passed restrictive Abortion bans, further limiting the access to abortion of women across the country, especially those in Republican controlled states NOW: Anti-Abortion activists have brought a legal case against one of the drugs involved in a medical abortion, Mifepristone, to try and get the drug pulled from the shelves across the country. Peter, it doesn’t matter if you live in a red state or a blue state. If the judge in this federal court in Texas rules to pull mifepristone from shelves, it will impact your ability to obtain a medication abortion in EVERY state in the country. | Attacks on abortion like these are not popular, Peter. We’ve seen that in special elections across the country and in the results of the 2022 midterms. This is about right-wing extremists trying to take away YOUR rights. Your right to make your own medical decisions. Your right to control your future. Your right to have access to life-saving healthcare! Thank you, The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. Even the $1, the $2, the $5... because these contributions are coming from Americans who are UNITED to take back our country from a corrupt globalist ruling class that believes it can weaponize our justice system to rob you of your voice. Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

Our #1 priority at Democrats Serve is flipping the House in 2024 – and thirteen of our endorsed House members were just added to the list of Frontline Democrats whose races will decide control of the House. Thanks so much! Brett Broesder Executive Director Begin Forwarded Message: Peter — Our Democrats Serve members are running in the most competitive districts in the entire nation. Thirteen of our successful 2022 candidates were just named Frontline Democrats – the most vulnerable Democratic members serving in the House. Then, national Republicans announced that they were adding our members to their target list in 2024. Republicans are gearing up to target our Frontline members and spend whatever it takes to defeat them. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Supporting Janet for Justice
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=63%2E35263%2ENwrmcq ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Hey Peter — With less than three weeks until the pivotal Supreme
Court of Wisconsin election on April 4, I’m reaching out to explain why
I’m supporting Janet Protasiewicz.

Janet Protasiewicz is the best candidate to return fairness and
impartiality back to the Wisconsin Supreme Court. For too long, our state
Supreme Court has been too concerned with advancing a partisan political
agenda.

We need to elect Janet because Wisconsinites deserve a court that follows
the law, gives every case a fair hearing, and protects the rights
guaranteed to everyone in our state. Our justices should be focused on
upholding the law and doing what is right and just, not playing party
politics from the bench.

I trust that Judge Protasiewicz will bring common sense and decency back
to our court, and I know she’ll be on the right side of protecting our
freedoms.

I’m hard at work reaching out to Wisconsinites across our great state to
remind them of the stakes of this election and to make sure they turn out
to vote for Judge Janet Protasiewicz, but far-right super PACs are
spending big to defeat her and prop up their MAGA candidate.

To win big next month, it’s going to take all of us doing our part to
support Janet’s campaign.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2140?t=1004&akid=63%2E35263%2ENwrmcq ]Peter, will you split a contribution to Judge Janet
Protasiewicz’s campaign and our own so we can send her to the Wisconsin
Supreme Court and bring back common sense and fairness to our court?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Janet Protasiewicz and Tammy Baldwin will go through
immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2135?t=1005&akid=63%2E35263%2ENwrmcq ]CHIP IN $5 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2140?t=1010&akid=63%2E35263%2ENwrmcq ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you for stepping up today in support of my friend Janet.

— Tammy

P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Ted Cruz eagerly met with bankers for gobs of cash in 2017. He's knee-deep in this banking crisis and up for reelection in 2024, after barely holding on by 2% in 2018. It’s an open secret he can be beaten in 2024.
body:
Ted Cruz out in 2024
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tec460347-cc10-4aea-9641-64a4e50e73d7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **The SIlicon Valley Bank (SVB) crash was the second largest in U.S. history. Repulsive Senator Ted Cruz is a big reason this happened. ** **[_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the candidate fund to remove Ted Cruz from public life?_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teec1dacd-d1d6-4e69-a940-0743c5ac97ab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** _We cannot let right-wingers who deregulated railroads, leading to the Ohio tragedy, and cut a hole in President Obama's Dodd-Frank bank regulations--created specificially for banks like SVB--get away with it. This piece from 2017 about the banking de-regulation frenzy in Washington makes Cruz's role clear:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T130d3bc3-9493-4c4f-9da7-9aa2f24c1fd5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Cruz was eager to meet with bankers for gobs of cash. He's knee-deep in this crisis and up for reelection in 2024, after barely holding on by 2% in 2018. It’s an open secret he can be beaten in 2024._**_And, of course, Cruz won't be hurt by the bank crash he helped cause. His wife's an executive at Goldman Sachs. He's probably on his way to Cancun. _
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T06bd9e1f-9df1-4adf-93fc-854a35eca8b4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_Meanwhile, Dallas-area Congressman Collin Alred's preparing to join the race. Raised by a single mother, Allred played in the NFL, worked in the Obama Administration and, in a huge upset, knocked out incumbent Republican Rep. Pete Sessions in a swing seat in 2018. He's the highest profile Black politician in elective office in Texas, has a ton of charisma and is a great public servant._** **There's a candidate fund set up to go to Allred when he gets in the race: ****[_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the candidate fund for Allred as he removes Ted Cruz from public life?_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9af510b1-53ec-4da2-ae72-10c83e9bdc78/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **Thank you for helping take this blight on Congress and our democracy out of office.** Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T95dea9ad-6abc-46cb-9138-40ebca6ad0f8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Working Families Party
subject: Major endorsements for Brandon Johnson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, At the Working Families Party, we know that former public school teacher and Chicago Teachers Union organizer Brandon Johnson has what it takes to build a stronger, safer, and more equitable Chicago. And Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren agree. **In the last week, Elizabeth and Bernie shared their endorsements for Brandon Johnson for Mayor of Chicago** in a critical race against an opponent with a history of destroying public schools, opposing abortion, supporting far-right homophobic groups, and more. Early voting starts this Monday, and the polls have Brandon and his opponent in a tight race. **[Can you pitch in to Brandon’s campaign to make sure every voter knows why Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, Rep. Chuy Garcia, Rep. Delia Ramirez, and more are all-in to make him the next Mayor of Chicago?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUrSPepQ252Z8fDWlcs4l54cX9_WFe_DYssionooZg6ikrFOYjoLKjNIaHqvlNPfu2VAP6ryF-HmQG-pTHvsoog_GiC6HptOGq534NuJGrHvp_Qak7gk6xRr8L0Z5HJGCcTwcJvPiplGzB_NZEPyXj2j_U57L1b1M27aB1E4vaFQ0dDQ0HfNR7CnK8C9n_r6y77YI_Oh9Np4_KJSyRwMzgwTZ23vTE57VCdB-v25UMzKqghVmrQUmn-udpSzvQSKvYQWNiwcdLZVHLWNMxB1e74TFnWpveIiiSZSPQjtfUF3pDcn4iJR0uO_uXKnczdbp9Xnwv4vUsF6VoAmBRWGdsyLQFt83Ckyf0TFfTRVuSUqCdfLAqXtbO-VAbiydgcIGf/3ul/QERW1XWPQwioZM5DAbRSCg/h0/gLU_LTPNI9Ivip6n9ORrfxIbogzY5pIRHDKZPaY61Pg)** **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUrSPepQ252Z8fDWlcs4l54cX9_WFe_DYssionooZg6ikrFOYjoLKjNIaHqvlNPfu2VAP6ryF-HmQG-pTHvsoog4u0bsflXilwBUc4jSOFXt7KuW_WcZDunYAYky4dJhuxD-PD_7x9_7iKG6oOW1RPXJeEjne5zN0Bwo9l32UlXmxxSS0U8k0xuCvwJDs2m3ncRs6F6QtoYQ3-tJV-53OFnk3KKRa6iKVtuqj1amBl14LMxWG1F7YseaZtjKTqByv2u_aaMWPn3gyGmqFtO2oUuTyyprQprKMXSzEjaQHRIIQ4tP1O2-AomAt84LICi_z9bJc-injKOjP4U4VZFI6JSUs_rhIa0NR00fkMGWDa3gSRTsclnLSiEeUjCfze3X7n/3ul/QERW1XWPQwioZM5DAbRSCg/h1/MSeM0DrhlpRjb8LVekicV_RRScpMLdWVgIKpFQbnAgs)** Brandon is deeply dedicated to ensuring that every Chicagoan has access to safe, vibrant neighborhoods, affordable housing, healthcare for all, and fully-funded schools. That’s why he’s earned endorsements from major labor unions and some of our nation’s fiercest fighters for working people. His opponent, Paul Vallas, on the other hand, boasts endorsements from the Chicago Fraternal Order of Police, and when he ran for mayor in 2019, happily accepted an endorsement from the Chicago Republican Party. **The choice is clear, Peter. clean_body: | | | Peter, At the Working Families Party, we know that former public school teacher and Chicago Teachers Union organizer Brandon Johnson has what it takes to build a stronger, safer, and more equitable Chicago. And Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren agree. In the last week, Elizabeth and Bernie shared their endorsements for Brandon Johnson for Mayor of Chicago in a critical race against an opponent with a history of destroying public schools, opposing abortion, supporting far-right homophobic groups, and more. Early voting starts this Monday, and the polls have Brandon and his opponent in a tight race. Brandon is deeply dedicated to ensuring that every Chicagoan has access to safe, vibrant neighborhoods, affordable housing, healthcare for all, and fully-funded schools. That’s why he’s earned endorsements from major labor unions and some of our nation’s fiercest fighters for working people. His opponent, Paul Vallas, on the other hand, boasts endorsements from the Chicago Fraternal Order of Police, and when he ran for mayor in 2019, happily accepted an endorsement from the Chicago Republican Party. The choice is clear, Peter. And we need to make sure that come April 4, we make Brandon Johnson the next Mayor of Chicago. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . body:
| | |
---
**$26.**

I'm proud to share that $26 is the average grassroots donation to our campaign, friend.
I know that might not seem like much when you think about the tens of millions that GOP super PACs are going to spend to try to defeat me and flip the Senate. But that's the power of this grassroots movement – it's made up of folks like you who believe in this fight and chip in what they can, when they can.
This movement is how we're going to defy the pundits who are calling me one of the most vulnerable senators in the country, win in Ohio, and defend our Senate majority._ _

But here's the problem: **_The Cook Political Report_ ranks this race a toss-up – and Washington Republicans are already launching attack ads against me. We need all hands on deck to fight back – but right now, we're coming up short.**

**If everyone reading this email chipped in $26 – or even just a few dollars – we could reach our $15,000 fundraising goal before the midnight deadline. But not everyone will, so I'm personally asking if I can count on you, friend.**
**[Please, will you chip in $26 – or as much as you can right now – to help me fight back against GOP attacks, defend this seat, and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60388939/396953938/691330013?amounts=5,26,50,100,250&amount=26&refcode=jtk12-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjg3ZDFlOC1kOGM1LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=83Wro_kQ4g6ffhiUDpXQNbSu5mvWl6cR72HNHoh4VNg=)**

clean_body: | | | $26. I'm proud to share that $26 is the average grassroots donation to our campaign, friend. I know that might not seem like much when you think about the tens of millions that GOP super PACs are going to spend to try to defeat me and flip the Senate. But that's the power of this grassroots movement – it's made up of folks like you who believe in this fight and chip in what they can, when they can. This movement is how we're going to defy the pundits who are calling me one of the most vulnerable senators in the country, win in Ohio, and defend our Senate majority. But here's the problem: The Cook Political Report ranks this race a toss-up – and Washington Republicans are already launching attack ads against me. We need all hands on deck to fight back – but right now, we're coming up short. If everyone reading this email chipped in $26 – or even just a few dollars – we could reach our $15,000 fundraising goal before the midnight deadline. But not everyone will, so I'm personally asking if I can count on you, friend. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = With gratitude, = Sherrod | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Joe Biden
subject: It’d mean the world if you’d make a donation to power our party’s work...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
I hope you’ll join me in putting your faith in our work to elect Democrats nationwide in the years ahead. | |
---
My dad used to say everybody needs a little bit of breathing room -- just enough so that, at the end of the month, you can pay your bills and be certain your family is going to be okay. We all know that too many folks don’t have that peace of mind. That’s why, since I was sworn in as president two years ago, we have been focused intensely on getting more people affordable health care and bringing down costs -- all so that you can have a little bit of breathing room again. **We’ve made significant progress, Derek. But if we’re going to keep our country moving in the right direction, we need to continue to elect more Democrats across the country.** **[If you renew your membership to the Democratic Party today by making a donation of $10, we’ll send you an Official 2023 DNC Membership Card to signify your commitment to electing Democrats clean_body: I hope you’ll join me in putting your faith in our work to elect Democrats nationwide in the years ahead. | | My dad used to say everybody needs a little bit of breathing room -- just enough so that, at the end of the month, you can pay your bills and be certain your family is going to be okay. We all know that too many folks don’t have that peace of mind. That’s why, since I was sworn in as president two years ago, we have been focused intensely on getting more people affordable health care and bringing down costs -- all so that you can have a little bit of breathing room again. We’ve made significant progress, Derek. But if we’re going to keep our country moving in the right direction, we need to continue to elect more Democrats across the country. Kamala and I are continuing our work to build a better America -- to rebuild our economy from the bottom up and the middle out, and to make sure all working families can have a little bit more breathing room. If we’re going to keep up our progress, it’s absolutely critical that we continue electing Democrats in every corner of this country. That’s why your contribution to the Democratic Party is so important. Day after day, the DNC is working to ensure that Democrats up and down the ballot have what they need to win. But they can’t do it without your help -- that’s why I’m coming to you today. It’d mean the world to me if you’d make a donation to power our party’s work today. Thank you for everything you do, Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr. President of the United States Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, . name: Team Lucas
subject: Your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Every person like you who adds their name is another signal of strength to the insiders watching our race.
#
Here’s the situation, Peter.
Since Lucas Kunce launched his campaign to replace Josh Hawley earlier this year, we’ve seen incredible momentum. **But now, we’ve got to keep it going.**
GOP insiders and political pundits are trying to find anything they can to measure Lucas’ success early on in this race — and we need to show them the huge amount of support Lucas and our campaign has from real people like you in Missouri and all across the country.
**[So Peter, will you join the tens of thousands of grassroots supporters standing behind Lucas by personally endorsing his campaign today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20230318_endorse-lucas?t=1&akid=2869%2E614464%2Eb9Prvq)**
**[ENDORSE LUCAS](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20230318_endorse-lucas?t=2&akid=2869%2E614464%2Eb9Prvq)**
Lucas is on a mission to give power back to everyday people in Missouri and across the country by taking on the corrupt politicians and corporate elites who’ve spent years stripping our communities for parts.
But if he’s going to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this Senate seat in 2024, he needs early support from real people just like you. **So Peter:**
**[Will you join the tens of thousands of grassroots supporters standing behind Lucas by personally endorsing his campaign today? Every person who adds their name is another signal to the insiders watching our race that we have the strength to stand up to Josh Hawley and take back Missouri’s Senate seat.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20230318_endorse-lucas?t=3&akid=2869%2E614464%2Eb9Prvq)**
**[ENDORSE LUCAS](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20230318_endorse-lucas?t=4&akid=2869%2E614464%2Eb9Prvq)**
Thank you so much,
Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230318-2869-footer&t=5&refcode2=2869_614464_b9Prvq&akid=2869%2E614464%2Eb9Prvq)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=2869%2E614464%2Eb9Prvq). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Since Lucas Kunce launched his campaign to replace Josh Hawley earlier this year, we’ve seen incredible momentum. But now, we’ve got to keep it going. GOP insiders and political pundits are trying to find anything they can to measure Lucas’ success early on in this race — and we need to show them the huge amount of support Lucas and our campaign has from real people like you in Missouri and all across the country. Lucas is on a mission to give power back to everyday people in Missouri and across the country by taking on the corrupt politicians and corporate elites who’ve spent years stripping our communities for parts. But if he’s going to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this Senate seat in 2024, he needs early support from real people just like you. So Peter: Thank you so much, Team Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

He dodged and avoided addressing anything related to his history of consistently aligning with conservative outlets and organizations. He smoothed over his endorsement from Republican billionaire Ken Griffin and his personal social media accounts liking Trump talking points, comments attacking Democrats, and comments attacking the city of Chicago.
